16 },
17 protocol::{
18 AccountSnapshot, Address, AlertFact, BlockBody, BlockHash, BlockHealthBatch,
19 DNS_LEASE_COST_PER_SUBDOMAIN_SECOND, DomainIsolationMode, DomainLeaseRecord,

21 HeartbeatAuth, HeartbeatAuthMode, HeartbeatSignal, LedgerSnapshot,

23 MonitorBrowserBatch, MonitorConfirmationBatch, MonitorEvaluation, MonitorEvaluationKind,

28 canonical_heartbeat_client_message, compute_hash, confirmation_probe_cost,
29 default_block_time_secs, default_min_health_receipts, dns_lease_cost, domain_fqdn,
30 health_check_cost, monitor_browser_request_id, monitor_browser_slot_cost,
31 monitor_browser_tx_hash, monitor_minimum_slot_balance, required_delegated_probe_receipts,
32 required_monitor_confirmation_receipts, schedule_current_slot_start,

34 storage_chunk_count, storage_reward_for_elapsed, validate_block_body_limits,
35 validate_domain_label, validate_domain_offering_input, validate_health_check_spec,

37 },

41 verify_signed_message, verify_storage_proof_receipt, verify_swap_quote, verify_transaction,
42 },
43 };

45 #[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize, Default)]
46 pub struct AccountState {
47 pub balance: u64,
48 pub storage_balance: u64,
49 #[serde(default)]
50 pub compute_balance: u64,
51 pub dns_balance: u64,
52 pub nonce: u64,
53 pub locked_balance: u64,
54 }
55
56 #[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)]
57 pub struct FinalizedHealthCheck {
58 pub tx_hash: TxHash,
59 pub requester: Address,
60 pub finalized_at: DateTime<Utc>,
61 pub receipts: Vec<SignedHealthReceipt>,
62 #[serde(default)]
63 pub rewarded_receipts: Vec<SignedHealthReceipt>,
64 pub consensus_success: bool,
65 pub success_count: usize,
66 pub failure_count: usize,
67 pub divergent_count: usize,
68 pub requester_cost: u64,
69 }
70
71 #[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)]
72 pub struct FinalizedBrowserCheck {
73 pub tx_hash: TxHash,
74 pub requester: Address,
75 pub finalized_at: DateTime<Utc>,
76 pub receipts: Vec<SignedBrowserReceipt>,
77 #[serde(default)]
78 pub rewarded_receipts: Vec<SignedBrowserReceipt>,
79 pub consensus_success: bool,
80 pub success_count: usize,
81 pub failure_count: usize,
82 pub divergent_count: usize,
83 pub requester_cost: u64,
84 pub package_hash: String,
85 pub runtime_hash: String,
86 }
87
88 #[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)]
89 pub struct FinalizedComputeJob {
90 pub tx_hash: TxHash,
91 pub requester: Address,
92 pub finalized_at: DateTime<Utc>,
93 pub receipts: Vec<SignedComputeReceipt>,
94 #[serde(default)]
95 pub rewarded_receipts: Vec<SignedComputeReceipt>,
96 pub consensus_success: bool,
97 pub success_count: usize,
98 pub failure_count: usize,
99 pub divergent_count: usize,
100 pub requester_cost: u64,
101 pub job_hash: String,
102 #[serde(default, skip_serializing_if = "Option::is_none")]
103 pub reduced_output: Option<serde_json::Value>,
104 }
105
106 #[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)]
107 pub struct PendingSwapLock {
108 pub quote: SignedSwapQuote,
109 pub owner: Address,
110 pub locked_at: DateTime<Utc>,
111 }
112
113 #[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)]
114 pub struct ChainState {
115 pub chain_id: String,
116 pub treasury: Address,
117 pub validators: Vec<Address>,
118 pub chain_started_at: DateTime<Utc>,
119 pub block_time_secs: u64,
120 pub min_health_receipts: usize,
121 pub height: u64,
122 pub last_block_hash: BlockHash,
123 pub accounts: BTreeMap<Address, AccountState>,
124 #[serde(skip_serializing, default)]
125 pub finalized_health_checks: BTreeMap<TxHash, FinalizedHealthCheck>,
126 #[serde(default)]
127 pub finalized_health_check_ids: BTreeSet<TxHash>,
128 #[serde(skip_serializing, default)]
129 pub finalized_browser_checks: BTreeMap<TxHash, FinalizedBrowserCheck>,
130 #[serde(default)]
131 pub finalized_browser_check_ids: BTreeSet<TxHash>,
132 #[serde(skip_serializing, default)]
133 pub finalized_compute_jobs: BTreeMap<TxHash, FinalizedComputeJob>,
134 #[serde(default)]
135 pub finalized_compute_job_ids: BTreeSet<TxHash>,
136 #[serde(default)]
137 pub pending_swap_locks: BTreeMap<String, PendingSwapLock>,
138 #[serde(default)]
139 pub monitors: BTreeMap<String, MonitorRecord>,
140 #[serde(default)]
141 pub monitor_slot_history: BTreeMap<String, BTreeMap<String, MonitorSlotRecord>>,
142 #[serde(default)]
143 pub alert_facts: BTreeMap<String, AlertFact>,
144 #[serde(default)]
145 pub storage_contracts: BTreeMap<String, StorageContractRecord>,
146 #[serde(default)]
147 pub domain_offerings: BTreeMap<String, DomainOfferingRecord>,
148 #[serde(default)]
149 pub domain_leases: BTreeMap<String, DomainLeaseRecord>,
150 #[serde(skip_serializing, default)]
151 pub block_history: Vec<BlockHash>,
152 }
153
154 impl ChainState {
155 pub fn from_genesis(genesis: &GenesisConfig) -> Result<Self> {
156 if genesis.validators.is_empty() {
157 bail!("genesis must define at least one validator");
158 }
159 if genesis.min_health_receipts == 0 {
160 bail!("min_health_receipts must be at least 1");
161 }
162
163 let mut validators = Vec::new();
164 let mut seen = BTreeSet::new();
165 for validator in &genesis.validators {
166 if seen.insert(validator.clone()) {
167 validators.push(validator.clone());
168 }
169 }
170
171 if !seen.contains(&genesis.treasury) {
172 bail!("treasury address must be part of the validator set");
173 }
174 if genesis.min_health_receipts > validators.len() {
175 bail!("min_health_receipts cannot exceed the validator set size");
176 }
177
178 let mut accounts: BTreeMap<Address, AccountState> = BTreeMap::new();
179 for validator in &validators {
180 accounts.entry(validator.clone()).or_default();
181 }
182 for (address, amount) in &genesis.airdrops {
183 accounts.entry(address.clone()).or_default().balance += amount;
184 }
185 for (address, amount) in &genesis.storage_airdrops {
186 accounts.entry(address.clone()).or_default().storage_balance += amount;
187 }
188 for (address, amount) in &genesis.compute_airdrops {
189 accounts.entry(address.clone()).or_default().compute_balance += amount;
190 }
191 for (address, amount) in &genesis.dns_airdrops {
192 accounts.entry(address.clone()).or_default().dns_balance += amount;
193 }
194
195 Ok(Self {
196 chain_id: genesis.chain_id.clone(),
197 treasury: genesis.treasury.clone(),
198 validators,
199 chain_started_at: genesis.chain_started_at,
200 block_time_secs: if genesis.block_time_secs == 0 {
201 default_block_time_secs()
202 } else {
203 genesis.block_time_secs
204 },
205 min_health_receipts: if genesis.min_health_receipts == 0 {
206 default_min_health_receipts()
207 } else {
208 genesis.min_health_receipts
209 },
210 height: 0,
211 last_block_hash: "genesis".into(),
212 accounts,
213 finalized_health_checks: BTreeMap::new(),
214 finalized_health_check_ids: BTreeSet::new(),
215 finalized_browser_checks: BTreeMap::new(),
216 finalized_browser_check_ids: BTreeSet::new(),
217 finalized_compute_jobs: BTreeMap::new(),
218 finalized_compute_job_ids: BTreeSet::new(),
219 pending_swap_locks: BTreeMap::new(),
220 monitors: BTreeMap::new(),
221 monitor_slot_history: BTreeMap::new(),
222 alert_facts: BTreeMap::new(),
223 storage_contracts: BTreeMap::new(),
224 domain_offerings: BTreeMap::new(),
225 domain_leases: BTreeMap::new(),
226 block_history: vec!["genesis".into()],
227 })
228 }
229
230 pub fn account(&self, address: &str) -> AccountState {
231 self.accounts.get(address).cloned().unwrap_or_default()
232 }
233
234 pub fn snapshot(&self) -> LedgerSnapshot {
235 let accounts = self
236 .accounts
237 .iter()
238 .map(|(address, account)| AccountSnapshot {
239 address: address.clone(),
240 balance: account.balance,
241 storage_balance: account.storage_balance,
242 compute_balance: account.compute_balance,
243 dns_balance: account.dns_balance,
244 nonce: account.nonce,
245 locked_balance: account.locked_balance,
246 })
247 .collect();
248
249 LedgerSnapshot {
250 chain_id: self.chain_id.clone(),
251 height: self.height,
252 last_block_hash: self.last_block_hash.clone(),
253 accounts,
254 }
255 }
256
257 pub fn scheduled_proposer(&self, next_height: u64) -> &Address {
258 self.scheduled_proposer_for_view(next_height, 0)
259 }
260
261 pub fn scheduled_proposer_for_view(&self, next_height: u64, view: u64) -> &Address {
262 let index = ((next_height - 1) as usize) % self.validators.len();
263 let index = (index + (view as usize % self.validators.len())) % self.validators.len();
264 &self.validators[index]
265 }
266
267 pub fn required_block_approvals(&self) -> usize {
268 (self.validators.len() / 2) + 1
269 }
270
271 pub fn spendable_balance(&self, address: &str) -> u64 {
272 let account = self.account(address);
273 account.balance.saturating_sub(account.locked_balance)
274 }
275
276 pub fn effective_compute_replication(&self, spec: &ComputeJobSpec) -> u64 {
277 usize::from(spec.replication)
278 .max(self.min_health_receipts)
279 .min(self.validators.len()) as u64
280 }
281
282 pub fn compute_request_cost(&self, spec: &ComputeJobSpec) -> Result<u64> {
283 compute_job_cost_for_replication(spec, self.effective_compute_replication(spec))
284 }
285
286 pub fn is_finalized_health_check(&self, tx_hash: &str) -> bool {
287 self.finalized_health_check_ids.contains(tx_hash)
288 || self.finalized_health_checks.contains_key(tx_hash)
289 || self.finalized_browser_check_ids.contains(tx_hash)
290 || self.finalized_browser_checks.contains_key(tx_hash)
291 || self.finalized_compute_job_ids.contains(tx_hash)
292 || self.finalized_compute_jobs.contains_key(tx_hash)
293 }
294
295 pub fn finalized_health_check_count(&self) -> usize {
296 self.finalized_health_check_ids
297 .len()
298 .max(self.finalized_health_checks.len())
299 }
300
301 pub fn validate_transaction_basic(&self, tx: &SignedTransaction) -> Result<()> {
302 verify_transaction(tx)?;
303
304 if tx.body.chain_id != self.chain_id {
305 bail!("transaction is for a different chain");
306 }
307
308 let account = self.account(&tx.signer);
309 if tx.body.nonce == 0 {
310 bail!("transaction nonce must start at 1");
311 }
312 if tx.body.nonce <= account.nonce {
313 bail!("transaction nonce is stale");
314 }
315
316 match &tx.body.kind {
317 TransactionKind::Transfer { to, amount } => {
318 if to.is_empty() {
319 bail!("transfer target cannot be empty");
320 }
321 if *amount == 0 {
322 bail!("transfer amount must be greater than zero");
323 }
324 }
325 TransactionKind::StorageTransfer { to, amount } => {
326 if to.is_empty() {
327 bail!("storage transfer target cannot be empty");
328 }
329 if *amount == 0 {
330 bail!("storage transfer amount must be greater than zero");
331 }
332 }
333 TransactionKind::ComputeTransfer { to, amount } => {
334 if to.is_empty() {
335 bail!("compute transfer target cannot be empty");
336 }
337 if *amount == 0 {
338 bail!("compute transfer amount must be greater than zero");
339 }
340 }
341 TransactionKind::DnsTransfer { to, amount } => {
342 if to.is_empty() {
343 bail!("dns transfer target cannot be empty");
344 }
345 if *amount == 0 {
346 bail!("dns transfer amount must be greater than zero");
347 }
348 }
349 TransactionKind::HealthCheck { spec } => {
350 validate_health_check_spec(spec)?;
351 let _ = health_check_cost(spec)?;
352 }
353 TransactionKind::BrowserCheck { spec } => {
354 validate_browser_check_spec(spec)?;
355 let _ = browser_check_cost(spec)?;
356 }
357 TransactionKind::ComputeJob { spec } => {
358 validate_compute_job_spec(spec)?;
359 self.validate_compute_storage_refs(spec)?;
360 let _ = self.compute_request_cost(spec)?;
361 }
362 TransactionKind::SwapLock { quote } => {
363 verify_swap_quote(quote)?;
364 if quote.quote.chain_id != self.chain_id {
365 bail!("swap quote is for a different chain");
366 }
367 if quote.quote.wallet != tx.signer {
368 bail!("swap lock signer does not match the quoted wallet");
369 }
370 if quote.quote.side != crate::protocol::SwapSide::Sell {
371 bail!("swap locking is only supported for sell quotes");
372 }
373 if !self.validators.contains(&quote.quoted_by) {
374 bail!("swap quote signer is not a validator");
375 }
376 }
377 TransactionKind::SwapCancel { quote_id } => {
378 if quote_id.trim().is_empty() {
379 bail!("swap cancel quote_id cannot be empty");
380 }
381 }
382 TransactionKind::SwapSettle { quote_id } => {
383 if quote_id.trim().is_empty() {
384 bail!("swap settle quote_id cannot be empty");
385 }
386 if tx.signer != self.treasury {
387 bail!("only the treasury validator may settle swap locks");
388 }
389 }
390 TransactionKind::MonitorCreate {
391 spec,
392 initial_budget,
393 } => {
394 validate_monitor_spec(spec)?;
395 if self.monitors.contains_key(&spec.monitor_id) {
396 bail!("monitor_id already exists");
397 }
398 if *initial_budget == 0 {
399 bail!("initial monitor budget must be greater than zero");
400 }
401 }
402 TransactionKind::MonitorUpdate { monitor_id, spec } => {
403 if monitor_id.trim().is_empty() {
404 bail!("monitor_id cannot be empty");
405 }
406 validate_monitor_spec(spec)?;
407 if spec.monitor_id != *monitor_id {
408 bail!("monitor update monitor_id mismatch");
409 }
410 let monitor = self
411 .monitors
412 .get(monitor_id)
413 .ok_or_else(|| anyhow::anyhow!("unknown monitor {monitor_id}"))?;
414 if monitor.owner != tx.signer {
415 bail!("only the monitor owner may update a monitor");
416 }
417 }
418 TransactionKind::MonitorPause { monitor_id }
419 | TransactionKind::MonitorResume { monitor_id }
420 | TransactionKind::MonitorDelete { monitor_id } => {
421 if monitor_id.trim().is_empty() {
422 bail!("monitor_id cannot be empty");
423 }
424 let monitor = self
425 .monitors
426 .get(monitor_id)
427 .ok_or_else(|| anyhow::anyhow!("unknown monitor {monitor_id}"))?;
428 if monitor.owner != tx.signer {
429 bail!("only the monitor owner may modify a monitor");
430 }
431 }
432 TransactionKind::MonitorTopUp { monitor_id, amount } => {
433 if monitor_id.trim().is_empty() {
434 bail!("monitor_id cannot be empty");
435 }
436 if *amount == 0 {
437 bail!("monitor top up amount must be greater than zero");
438 }
439 let monitor = self
440 .monitors
441 .get(monitor_id)
442 .ok_or_else(|| anyhow::anyhow!("unknown monitor {monitor_id}"))?;
443 if monitor.owner != tx.signer {
444 bail!("only the monitor owner may top up a monitor");
445 }
446 }
447 TransactionKind::StorageCreate {
448 spec,
449 prepaid_balance,
450 } => {
451 validate_storage_contract_spec(spec)?;
452 if self.storage_contracts.contains_key(&spec.contract_id) {
453 bail!("storage contract_id already exists");
454 }
455 if spec.host == tx.signer {
456 bail!("storage host must be a different address from the owner");
457 }
458 if *prepaid_balance == 0 {
459 bail!("storage prepaid_balance must be greater than zero");
460 }
461 }
462 TransactionKind::StorageTopUp {
463 contract_id,
464 amount,
465 } => {
466 if contract_id.trim().is_empty() {
467 bail!("storage contract_id cannot be empty");
468 }
469 if *amount == 0 {
470 bail!("storage top up amount must be greater than zero");
471 }
472 let contract = self
473 .storage_contracts
474 .get(contract_id)
475 .ok_or_else(|| anyhow::anyhow!("unknown storage contract {contract_id}"))?;
476 if contract.owner != tx.signer {
477 bail!("only the storage contract owner may top up storage");
478 }
479 if !matches!(
480 contract.status,
481 StorageContractStatus::Active | StorageContractStatus::InsufficientFunds
482 ) {
483 bail!("storage top up is only valid for active contracts");
484 }
485 }
486 TransactionKind::StorageCancel { contract_id } => {
487 if contract_id.trim().is_empty() {
488 bail!("storage contract_id cannot be empty");
489 }
490 let contract = self
491 .storage_contracts
492 .get(contract_id)
493 .ok_or_else(|| anyhow::anyhow!("unknown storage contract {contract_id}"))?;
494 if contract.owner != tx.signer {
495 bail!("only the storage contract owner may cancel storage");
496 }
497 if !matches!(
498 contract.status,
499 StorageContractStatus::Active | StorageContractStatus::InsufficientFunds
500 ) {
501 bail!("storage contract is already terminal");
502 }
503 }
504 TransactionKind::DomainOfferingCreate {
505 offering_id,
506 suffix,
507 gateway_url,
508 } => {
509 if !self.validators.contains(&tx.signer) {
510 bail!("only validators may create domain offerings");
511 }
512 validate_domain_offering_input(offering_id, suffix, gateway_url)?;
513 if self.domain_offerings.contains_key(offering_id) {
514 bail!("domain offering_id already exists");
515 }
516 if self
517 .domain_offerings
518 .values()
519 .any(|offering| offering.suffix == *suffix)
520 {
521 bail!("domain suffix already has an offering");
522 }
523 }
524 TransactionKind::DomainOfferingPause { offering_id }
525 | TransactionKind::DomainOfferingResume { offering_id }
526 | TransactionKind::DomainOfferingRetire { offering_id } => {
527 if offering_id.trim().is_empty() {
528 bail!("domain offering_id cannot be empty");
529 }
530 let offering = self
531 .domain_offerings
532 .get(offering_id)
533 .ok_or_else(|| anyhow::anyhow!("unknown domain offering {offering_id}"))?;
534 if offering.validator != tx.signer {
535 bail!("only the offering validator may modify a domain offering");
536 }
537 }
538 TransactionKind::DomainLeaseCreate {
539 offering_id,
540 label,
541 target_contract_id,
542 duration_secs,
543 } => {
544 validate_domain_label(label)?;
545 let _ = dns_lease_cost(*duration_secs)?;
546 let offering = self
547 .domain_offerings
548 .get(offering_id)
549 .ok_or_else(|| anyhow::anyhow!("unknown domain offering {offering_id}"))?;
550 if !matches!(offering.status, DomainOfferingStatus::Active) {
551 bail!("domain offering is not active");
552 }
553 let contract = self
554 .storage_contracts
555 .get(target_contract_id)
556 .ok_or_else(|| {
557 anyhow::anyhow!("unknown storage contract {target_contract_id}")
558 })?;
559 if contract.owner != tx.signer {
560 bail!("domain lease target storage contract must be owned by the signer");
561 }
562 if !matches!(contract.spec.mode, StorageMode::PublicRaw { .. }) {
563 bail!("domain leases can only target public raw storage contracts");
564 }
565 let fqdn = domain_fqdn(label, &offering.suffix)?;
566 if self.domain_leases.values().any(|lease| {
567 lease.fqdn == fqdn
568 && matches!(
569 lease.status,
570 DomainLeaseStatus::Active | DomainLeaseStatus::InsufficientFunds
571 )
572 }) {
573 bail!("domain label is already leased");
574 }
575 }
576 TransactionKind::DomainLeaseRenew {
577 lease_id,
578 duration_secs,
579 } => {
580 let _ = dns_lease_cost(*duration_secs)?;
581 let lease = self
582 .domain_leases
583 .get(lease_id)
584 .ok_or_else(|| anyhow::anyhow!("unknown domain lease {lease_id}"))?;
585 if lease.owner != tx.signer {
586 bail!("only the domain lease owner may renew");
587 }
588 if matches!(
589 lease.status,
590 DomainLeaseStatus::Cancelled | DomainLeaseStatus::Expired
591 ) {
592 bail!("domain lease is terminal");
593 }
594 }
595 TransactionKind::DomainLeaseBind {
596 lease_id,
597 target_contract_id,
598 } => {
599 let lease = self
600 .domain_leases
601 .get(lease_id)
602 .ok_or_else(|| anyhow::anyhow!("unknown domain lease {lease_id}"))?;
603 if lease.owner != tx.signer {
604 bail!("only the domain lease owner may bind");
605 }
606 if !matches!(lease.status, DomainLeaseStatus::Active) {
607 bail!("domain lease is not active");
608 }
609 let contract = self
610 .storage_contracts
611 .get(target_contract_id)
612 .ok_or_else(|| {
613 anyhow::anyhow!("unknown storage contract {target_contract_id}")
614 })?;
615 if contract.owner != tx.signer {
616 bail!("domain lease target storage contract must be owned by the signer");
617 }
618 if !matches!(contract.spec.mode, StorageMode::PublicRaw { .. }) {
619 bail!("domain leases can only target public raw storage contracts");
620 }
621 }
622 TransactionKind::DomainLeaseCancel { lease_id } => {
623 let lease = self
624 .domain_leases
625 .get(lease_id)
626 .ok_or_else(|| anyhow::anyhow!("unknown domain lease {lease_id}"))?;
627 if lease.owner != tx.signer {
628 bail!("only the domain lease owner may cancel");
629 }
630 if !matches!(
631 lease.status,
632 DomainLeaseStatus::Active | DomainLeaseStatus::InsufficientFunds
633 ) {
634 bail!("domain lease is already terminal");
635 }
636 }
637 }
638
639 Ok(())
640 }
641
642 fn validate_compute_storage_refs(&self, spec: &ComputeJobSpec) -> Result<()> {
643 let Some(module_ref) = compute_wasi_module_ref(&spec.workload) else {
644 return Ok(());
645 };
646 let contract = self
647 .storage_contracts
648 .get(&module_ref.contract_id)
649 .ok_or_else(|| anyhow!("compute module_ref references an unknown storage contract"))?;
650 if contract.status != StorageContractStatus::Active {
651 bail!("compute module_ref references an inactive storage contract");
652 }
653 if !matches!(contract.spec.mode, StorageMode::PublicRaw { .. }) {
654 bail!("compute module_ref storage contract must be public_raw");
655 }
656 if contract.spec.merkle_root != module_ref.merkle_root {
657 bail!("compute module_ref merkle_root does not match storage contract");
658 }
659 if module_ref.size_bytes > contract.spec.size_bytes {
660 bail!("compute module_ref size exceeds storage contract size");
661 }
662 Ok(())
663 }
664
665 pub fn validate_block_proposal(&self, block: &SignedBlock) -> Result<()> {
666 verify_block(block)?;
667 if block.body.chain_id != self.chain_id {
668 bail!("block is for a different chain");
669 }
670 if block.body.height != self.height + 1 {
671 bail!("unexpected block height");
672 }
673 if block.body.previous_hash != self.last_block_hash {
674 bail!("block previous hash does not match local head");
675 }
676 if &block.body.proposer
677 != self.scheduled_proposer_for_view(block.body.height, block.body.view)
678 {
679 bail!("block proposer is not scheduled for this height and view");
680 }
681 validate_block_body_limits(&block.body)?;
682 self.simulate_apply(&block.body)?;
683 Ok(())
684 }
685
686 pub fn validate_block(&self, block: &SignedBlock) -> Result<()> {
687 self.validate_block_proposal(block)?;
688 let approvals = self.validate_block_approvals(block)?;
689 if approvals.len() < self.required_block_approvals() {
690 bail!(
691 "block requires at least {} validator approvals",
692 self.required_block_approvals()
693 );
694 }
695 Ok(())
696 }
697
698 pub fn apply_block(&mut self, block: &SignedBlock) -> Result<()> {
699 self.validate_block(block)?;
700 self.apply_block_body(&block.body)?;
701 self.height = block.body.height;
702 self.last_block_hash = block.hash.clone();
703 self.block_history.push(block.hash.clone());
704 Ok(())
705 }
706
707 pub fn simulate_apply(&self, body: &BlockBody) -> Result<Self> {
708 let mut cloned = self.clone();
709 cloned.apply_block_body(body)?;
710 Ok(cloned)
711 }
712
713 fn apply_block_body(&mut self, body: &BlockBody) -> Result<()> {
714 let mut tx_to_receipts = BTreeMap::new();
715 for batch in &body.health_batches {
716 tx_to_receipts.insert(batch.tx_hash.clone(), batch.receipts.clone());
717 }
718 let mut tx_to_browser_receipts = BTreeMap::new();
719 for batch in &body.browser_batches {
720 tx_to_browser_receipts.insert(batch.tx_hash.clone(), batch.receipts.clone());
721 }
722 let mut tx_to_compute_receipts = BTreeMap::new();
723 for batch in &body.compute_batches {
724 tx_to_compute_receipts.insert(batch.tx_hash.clone(), batch.receipts.clone());
725 }
726 let mut monitor_browser_batches = BTreeMap::new();
727 for batch in &body.monitor_browser_batches {
728 monitor_browser_batches.insert(
729 (batch.monitor_id.clone(), batch.slot_key.clone()),
730 batch.clone(),
731 );
732 }
733 let mut confirmation_batches = BTreeMap::new();
734 for batch in &body.confirmation_batches {
735 confirmation_batches.insert(
736 (batch.monitor_id.clone(), batch.slot_key.clone()),
737 batch.clone(),
738 );
739 }
740 self.settle_domain_leases(body.proposed_at)?;
741
742 for tx in &body.transactions {
743 self.validate_transaction_basic(tx)?;
744 let current_account = self.account(&tx.signer);
745 if tx.body.nonce != current_account.nonce + 1 {
746 bail!("block contains non-sequential nonce for {}", tx.signer);
747 }
748
749 match &tx.body.kind {
750 TransactionKind::Transfer { to, amount } => {
751 if self.spendable_balance(&tx.signer) < *amount {
752 bail!("insufficient balance for transfer");
753 }
754 {
755 let account = self.accounts.entry(tx.signer.clone()).or_default();
756 account.balance -= amount;
757 account.nonce += 1;
758 }
759 self.accounts.entry(to.clone()).or_default().balance += amount;
760 }
761 TransactionKind::StorageTransfer { to, amount } => {
762 if self.account(&tx.signer).storage_balance < *amount {
763 bail!("insufficient storage token balance for transfer");
764 }
765 {
766 let account = self.accounts.entry(tx.signer.clone()).or_default();
767 account.storage_balance -= amount;
768 account.nonce += 1;
769 }
770 self.accounts.entry(to.clone()).or_default().storage_balance += amount;
771 }
772 TransactionKind::ComputeTransfer { to, amount } => {
773 if self.account(&tx.signer).compute_balance < *amount {
774 bail!("insufficient compute token balance for transfer");
775 }
776 {
777 let account = self.accounts.entry(tx.signer.clone()).or_default();
778 account.compute_balance -= amount;
779 account.nonce += 1;
780 }
781 self.accounts.entry(to.clone()).or_default().compute_balance += amount;
782 }
783 TransactionKind::DnsTransfer { to, amount } => {
784 if self.account(&tx.signer).dns_balance < *amount {
785 bail!("insufficient dns token balance for transfer");
786 }
787 {
788 let account = self.accounts.entry(tx.signer.clone()).or_default();
789 account.dns_balance -= amount;
790 account.nonce += 1;
791 }
792 self.accounts.entry(to.clone()).or_default().dns_balance += amount;
793 }
794 TransactionKind::HealthCheck { .. } => {
795 let request_cost = match &tx.body.kind {
796 TransactionKind::HealthCheck { spec } => health_check_cost(spec)?,
797 _ => unreachable!(),
798 };
799 if self.spendable_balance(&tx.signer) < request_cost {
800 bail!("insufficient balance for health check");
801 }
802
803 let receipts = tx_to_receipts.get(&tx.hash).cloned().ok_or_else(|| {
804 anyhow::anyhow!("missing receipts for health check {}", tx.hash)
805 })?;
806 let unique_valid_receipts =
807 self.validate_health_receipts_for_tx(tx, &receipts)?;
808 if unique_valid_receipts.len() < self.min_health_receipts {
809 bail!(
810 "health check {} requires at least {} validator receipts",
811 tx.hash,
812 self.min_health_receipts
813 );
814 }
815 let rewarded_receipts =
816 self.select_consensus_health_receipts(&unique_valid_receipts)?;
817
818 {
819 let account = self.accounts.entry(tx.signer.clone()).or_default();
820 account.balance -= request_cost;
821 account.nonce += 1;
822 }
823
824 let reward_per_validator = request_cost / rewarded_receipts.len() as u64;
825 let distributed = reward_per_validator * rewarded_receipts.len() as u64;
826 let remainder = request_cost - distributed;
827
828 for receipt in &rewarded_receipts {
829 self.accounts
830 .entry(receipt.body.executor.clone())
831 .or_default()
832 .balance += reward_per_validator;
833 }
834 self.accounts
835 .entry(self.treasury.clone())
836 .or_default()
837 .balance += remainder;
838
839 let success_count = rewarded_receipts
840 .iter()
841 .filter(|receipt| receipt.body.success)
842 .count();
843 let failure_count = rewarded_receipts.len() - success_count;
844 let divergent_count = unique_valid_receipts
845 .len()
846 .saturating_sub(rewarded_receipts.len());
847 self.finalized_health_checks.insert(
848 tx.hash.clone(),
849 FinalizedHealthCheck {
850 tx_hash: tx.hash.clone(),
851 requester: tx.signer.clone(),
852 finalized_at: body.proposed_at,
853 receipts: unique_valid_receipts,
854 rewarded_receipts: rewarded_receipts.clone(),
855 consensus_success: rewarded_receipts
856 .first()
857 .map(|receipt| receipt.body.success)
858 .unwrap_or(false),
859 success_count,
860 failure_count,
861 divergent_count,
862 requester_cost: request_cost,
863 },
864 );
865 self.finalized_health_check_ids.insert(tx.hash.clone());
866 }
867 TransactionKind::BrowserCheck { spec } => {
868 let request_cost = browser_check_cost(spec)?;
869 if self.spendable_balance(&tx.signer) < request_cost {
870 bail!("insufficient balance for browser check");
871 }
872
873 let receipts =
874 tx_to_browser_receipts
875 .get(&tx.hash)
876 .cloned()
877 .ok_or_else(|| {
878 anyhow::anyhow!("missing receipts for browser check {}", tx.hash)
879 })?;
880 let unique_valid_receipts =
881 self.validate_browser_receipts_for_tx(tx, &receipts)?;
882 if unique_valid_receipts.len() < self.min_health_receipts {
883 bail!(
884 "browser check {} requires at least {} validator receipts",
885 tx.hash,
886 self.min_health_receipts
887 );
888 }
889 let rewarded_receipts =
890 self.select_consensus_browser_receipts(&unique_valid_receipts)?;
891
892 {
893 let account = self.accounts.entry(tx.signer.clone()).or_default();
894 account.balance -= request_cost;
895 account.nonce += 1;
896 }
897
898 let reward_per_validator = request_cost / rewarded_receipts.len() as u64;
899 let distributed = reward_per_validator * rewarded_receipts.len() as u64;
900 let remainder = request_cost - distributed;
901 for receipt in &rewarded_receipts {
902 self.accounts
903 .entry(receipt.body.executor.clone())
904 .or_default()
905 .balance += reward_per_validator;
906 }
907 self.accounts
908 .entry(self.treasury.clone())
909 .or_default()
910 .balance += remainder;
911
912 let success_count = rewarded_receipts
913 .iter()
914 .filter(|receipt| receipt.body.success)
915 .count();
916 let failure_count = rewarded_receipts.len() - success_count;
917 let divergent_count = unique_valid_receipts
918 .len()
919 .saturating_sub(rewarded_receipts.len());
920 self.finalized_browser_checks.insert(
921 tx.hash.clone(),
922 FinalizedBrowserCheck {
923 tx_hash: tx.hash.clone(),
924 requester: tx.signer.clone(),
925 finalized_at: body.proposed_at,
926 receipts: unique_valid_receipts,
927 rewarded_receipts: rewarded_receipts.clone(),
928 consensus_success: rewarded_receipts
929 .first()
930 .map(|receipt| receipt.body.success)
931 .unwrap_or(false),
932 success_count,
933 failure_count,
934 divergent_count,
935 requester_cost: request_cost,
936 package_hash: rewarded_receipts
937 .first()
938 .map(|receipt| receipt.body.package_hash.clone())
939 .unwrap_or_default(),
940 runtime_hash: rewarded_receipts
941 .first()
942 .map(|receipt| receipt.body.runtime_hash.clone())
943 .unwrap_or_default(),
944 },
945 );
946 self.finalized_browser_check_ids.insert(tx.hash.clone());
947 }
948 TransactionKind::ComputeJob { spec } => {
949 let request_cost = self.compute_request_cost(spec)?;
950 if self.account(&tx.signer).compute_balance < request_cost {
951 bail!("insufficient compute token balance for compute job");
952 }
953
954 let receipts =
955 tx_to_compute_receipts
956 .get(&tx.hash)
957 .cloned()
958 .ok_or_else(|| {
959 anyhow::anyhow!("missing receipts for compute job {}", tx.hash)
960 })?;
961 let unique_valid_receipts =
962 self.validate_compute_receipts_for_tx(tx, &receipts)?;
963 let required = usize::from(spec.replication)
964 .max(self.min_health_receipts)
965 .min(self.validators.len());
966 if unique_valid_receipts.len() < required {
967 bail!(
968 "compute job {} requires at least {} validator receipts",
969 tx.hash,
970 required
971 );
972 }
973 let rewarded_receipts =
974 self.select_consensus_compute_receipts(&unique_valid_receipts)?;
975
976 {
977 let account = self.accounts.entry(tx.signer.clone()).or_default();
978 account.compute_balance -= request_cost;
979 account.nonce += 1;
980 }
981
982 let reward_per_validator = request_cost / rewarded_receipts.len() as u64;
983 let distributed = reward_per_validator * rewarded_receipts.len() as u64;
984 let remainder = request_cost - distributed;
985 for receipt in &rewarded_receipts {
986 self.accounts
987 .entry(receipt.body.executor.clone())
988 .or_default()
989 .compute_balance += reward_per_validator;
990 }
991 self.accounts
992 .entry(self.treasury.clone())
993 .or_default()
994 .compute_balance += remainder;
995
996 let success_count = rewarded_receipts
997 .iter()
998 .filter(|receipt| receipt.body.success)
999 .count();
1000 let failure_count = rewarded_receipts.len() - success_count;
1001 let divergent_count = unique_valid_receipts
1002 .len()
1003 .saturating_sub(rewarded_receipts.len());
1004 let representative = rewarded_receipts.first();
1005 self.finalized_compute_jobs.insert(
1006 tx.hash.clone(),
1007 FinalizedComputeJob {
1008 tx_hash: tx.hash.clone(),
1009 requester: tx.signer.clone(),
1010 finalized_at: body.proposed_at,
1011 receipts: unique_valid_receipts,
1012 rewarded_receipts: rewarded_receipts.clone(),
1013 consensus_success: representative
1014 .map(|receipt| receipt.body.success)
1015 .unwrap_or(false),
1016 success_count,
1017 failure_count,
1018 divergent_count,
1019 requester_cost: request_cost,
1020 job_hash: compute_job_hash(spec)?,
1021 reduced_output: representative
1022 .and_then(|receipt| receipt.body.reduced_output.clone()),
1023 },
1024 );
1025 self.finalized_compute_job_ids.insert(tx.hash.clone());
1026 }
1027 TransactionKind::SwapLock { quote } => {
1028 if body.proposed_at >= quote.quote.expires_at {
1029 bail!("swap quote expired before it was finalized");
1030 }
1031 if self.pending_swap_locks.contains_key(&quote.quote.quote_id) {
1032 bail!("swap quote is already locked");
1033 }
1034 if self.spendable_balance(&tx.signer) < quote.quote.token_amount {
1035 bail!("insufficient spendable balance for swap lock");
1036 }
1037
1038 {
1039 let account = self.accounts.entry(tx.signer.clone()).or_default();
1040 account.locked_balance += quote.quote.token_amount;
1041 account.nonce += 1;
1042 }
1043 self.pending_swap_locks.insert(
1044 quote.quote.quote_id.clone(),
1045 PendingSwapLock {
1046 quote: quote.clone(),
1047 owner: tx.signer.clone(),
1048 locked_at: body.proposed_at,
1049 },
1050 );
1051 }
1052 TransactionKind::SwapCancel { quote_id } => {
1053 let pending = self
1054 .pending_swap_locks
1055 .get(quote_id)
1056 .cloned()
1057 .ok_or_else(|| anyhow::anyhow!("unknown swap lock {quote_id}"))?;
1058 if pending.owner != tx.signer {
1059 bail!("only the original wallet may cancel a swap lock");
1060 }
1061 if body.proposed_at < pending.quote.quote.expires_at {
1062 bail!("swap lock cannot be cancelled before its quote expires");
1063 }
1064
1065 {
1066 let account = self.accounts.entry(tx.signer.clone()).or_default();
1067 if account.locked_balance < pending.quote.quote.token_amount {
1068 bail!("swap lock exceeds the wallet locked balance");
1069 }
1070 account.locked_balance -= pending.quote.quote.token_amount;
1071 account.nonce += 1;
1072 }
1073 self.pending_swap_locks.remove(quote_id);
1074 }
1075 TransactionKind::SwapSettle { quote_id } => {
1076 let pending = self
1077 .pending_swap_locks
1078 .get(quote_id)
1079 .cloned()
1080 .ok_or_else(|| anyhow::anyhow!("unknown swap lock {quote_id}"))?;
1081 if body.proposed_at > pending.quote.quote.expires_at {
1082 bail!("swap lock may not be settled after its quote expires");
1083 }
1084
1085 {
1086 let owner = self.accounts.entry(pending.owner.clone()).or_default();
1087 if owner.locked_balance < pending.quote.quote.token_amount {
1088 bail!("swap lock exceeds the wallet locked balance");
1089 }
1090 if owner.balance < pending.quote.quote.token_amount {
1091 bail!("swap lock exceeds the wallet balance");
1092 }
1093 owner.balance -= pending.quote.quote.token_amount;
1094 owner.locked_balance -= pending.quote.quote.token_amount;
1095 }
1096 {
1097 let treasury = self.accounts.entry(self.treasury.clone()).or_default();
1098 treasury.balance += pending.quote.quote.token_amount;
1099 treasury.nonce += 1;
1100 }
1101 self.pending_swap_locks.remove(quote_id);
1102 }
1103 TransactionKind::MonitorCreate {
1104 spec,
1105 initial_budget,
1106 } => {
1107 if self.spendable_balance(&tx.signer) < *initial_budget {
1108 bail!("insufficient balance for monitor create");
1109 }
1110 {
1111 let account = self.accounts.entry(tx.signer.clone()).or_default();
1112 account.balance -= initial_budget;
1113 account.nonce += 1;
1114 }
1115 let now = body.proposed_at;
1116 let status = monitor_ready_status(false, spec, *initial_budget);
1117 self.monitors.insert(
1118 spec.monitor_id.clone(),
1119 MonitorRecord {
1120 monitor_id: spec.monitor_id.clone(),
1121 owner: tx.signer.clone(),
1122 spec: spec.clone(),
1123 budget_balance: *initial_budget,
1124 status,
1125 paused: false,
1126 created_at: now,
1127 updated_at: now,
1128 next_slot_hint: schedule_next_slot_start(&spec.schedule, now)
1129 .ok()
1130 .map(|value| value.to_rfc3339()),
1131 last_observation_at: None,
1132 },
1133 );
1134 }
1135 TransactionKind::MonitorUpdate { monitor_id, spec } => {
1136 let monitor = self
1137 .monitors
1138 .get_mut(monitor_id)
1139 .ok_or_else(|| anyhow!("unknown monitor {monitor_id}"))?;
1140 monitor.spec = spec.clone();
1141 monitor.updated_at = body.proposed_at;
1142 monitor.next_slot_hint =
1143 schedule_next_slot_start(&monitor.spec.schedule, body.proposed_at)
1144 .ok()
1145 .map(|value| value.to_rfc3339());
1146 }
1147 TransactionKind::MonitorPause { monitor_id } => {
1148 let monitor = self
1149 .monitors
1150 .get_mut(monitor_id)
1151 .ok_or_else(|| anyhow!("unknown monitor {monitor_id}"))?;
1152 monitor.paused = true;
1153 monitor.status = MonitorStatus::Paused;
1154 monitor.updated_at = body.proposed_at;
1155 }
1156 TransactionKind::MonitorResume { monitor_id } => {
1157 let monitor = self
1158 .monitors
1159 .get_mut(monitor_id)
1160 .ok_or_else(|| anyhow!("unknown monitor {monitor_id}"))?;
1161 monitor.paused = false;
1162 monitor.status =
1163 monitor_ready_status(false, &monitor.spec, monitor.budget_balance);
1164 monitor.updated_at = body.proposed_at;
1165 monitor.next_slot_hint =
1166 schedule_next_slot_start(&monitor.spec.schedule, body.proposed_at)
1167 .ok()
1168 .map(|value| value.to_rfc3339());
1169 }
1170 TransactionKind::MonitorTopUp { monitor_id, amount } => {
1171 if self.spendable_balance(&tx.signer) < *amount {
1172 bail!("insufficient balance for monitor top up");
1173 }
1174 {
1175 let account = self.accounts.entry(tx.signer.clone()).or_default();
1176 account.balance -= amount;
1177 account.nonce += 1;
1178 }
1179 let monitor = self
1180 .monitors
1181 .get_mut(monitor_id)
1182 .ok_or_else(|| anyhow!("unknown monitor {monitor_id}"))?;
1183 monitor.budget_balance += amount;
1184 monitor.status =
1185 monitor_ready_status(monitor.paused, &monitor.spec, monitor.budget_balance);
1186 monitor.updated_at = body.proposed_at;
1187 }
1188 TransactionKind::MonitorDelete { monitor_id } => {
1189 let monitor = self
1190 .monitors
1191 .remove(monitor_id)
1192 .ok_or_else(|| anyhow!("unknown monitor {monitor_id}"))?;
1193 self.accounts
1194 .entry(monitor.owner.clone())
1195 .or_default()
1196 .balance += monitor.budget_balance;
1197 self.monitor_slot_history.remove(monitor_id);
1198 }
1199 TransactionKind::StorageCreate {
1200 spec,
1201 prepaid_balance,
1202 } => {
1203 if self.account(&tx.signer).storage_balance < *prepaid_balance {
1204 bail!("insufficient storage token balance for storage create");
1205 }
1206 {
1207 let account = self.accounts.entry(tx.signer.clone()).or_default();
1208 account.storage_balance -= prepaid_balance;
1209 account.nonce += 1;
1210 }
1211 let created_at = body.proposed_at;
1212 self.storage_contracts.insert(
1213 spec.contract_id.clone(),
1214 StorageContractRecord {
1215 contract_id: spec.contract_id.clone(),
1216 owner: tx.signer.clone(),
1217 host: spec.host.clone(),
1218 spec: spec.clone(),
1219 prepaid_balance: *prepaid_balance,
1220 status: StorageContractStatus::Active,
1221 created_at,
1222 expires_at: created_at
1223 + chrono::Duration::seconds(spec.duration_secs as i64),
1224 last_proven_at: created_at,
1225 total_paid: 0,
1226 proof_count: 0,
1227 },
1228 );
1229 }
1230 TransactionKind::StorageTopUp {
1231 contract_id,
1232 amount,
1233 } => {
1234 if self.account(&tx.signer).storage_balance < *amount {
1235 bail!("insufficient storage token balance for storage top up");
1236 }
1237 {
1238 let account = self.accounts.entry(tx.signer.clone()).or_default();
1239 account.storage_balance -= amount;
1240 account.nonce += 1;
1241 }
1242 let contract = self
1243 .storage_contracts
1244 .get_mut(contract_id)
1245 .ok_or_else(|| anyhow!("unknown storage contract {contract_id}"))?;
1246 contract.prepaid_balance += amount;
1247 if matches!(contract.status, StorageContractStatus::InsufficientFunds) {
1248 contract.status = StorageContractStatus::Active;
1249 }
1250 }
1251 TransactionKind::StorageCancel { contract_id } => {
1252 let contract = self
1253 .storage_contracts
1254 .get_mut(contract_id)
1255 .ok_or_else(|| anyhow!("unknown storage contract {contract_id}"))?;
1256 {
1257 let account = self.accounts.entry(tx.signer.clone()).or_default();
1258 account.nonce += 1;
1259 account.storage_balance += contract.prepaid_balance;
1260 }
1261 contract.prepaid_balance = 0;
1262 contract.status = StorageContractStatus::Cancelled;
1263 }
1264 TransactionKind::DomainOfferingCreate {
1265 offering_id,
1266 suffix,
1267 gateway_url,
1268 } => {
1269 let account = self.accounts.entry(tx.signer.clone()).or_default();
1270 account.nonce += 1;
1271 self.domain_offerings.insert(
1272 offering_id.clone(),
1273 DomainOfferingRecord {
1274 offering_id: offering_id.clone(),
1275 validator: tx.signer.clone(),
1276 suffix: suffix.clone(),
1277 gateway_url: gateway_url.clone(),
1278 isolation_mode: DomainIsolationMode::OpaqueSandbox,
1279 status: DomainOfferingStatus::Active,
1280 created_at: body.proposed_at,
1281 verified_at: Some(body.proposed_at),
1282 },
1283 );
1284 }
1285 TransactionKind::DomainOfferingPause { offering_id } => {
1286 let account = self.accounts.entry(tx.signer.clone()).or_default();
1287 account.nonce += 1;
1288 let offering = self
1289 .domain_offerings
1290 .get_mut(offering_id)
1291 .ok_or_else(|| anyhow!("unknown domain offering {offering_id}"))?;
1292 if matches!(offering.status, DomainOfferingStatus::Retired) {
1293 bail!("retired domain offerings cannot be paused");
1294 }
1295 offering.status = DomainOfferingStatus::Paused;
1296 }
1297 TransactionKind::DomainOfferingResume { offering_id } => {
1298 let account = self.accounts.entry(tx.signer.clone()).or_default();
1299 account.nonce += 1;
1300 let offering = self
1301 .domain_offerings
1302 .get_mut(offering_id)
1303 .ok_or_else(|| anyhow!("unknown domain offering {offering_id}"))?;
1304 if !matches!(
1305 offering.status,
1306 DomainOfferingStatus::Paused | DomainOfferingStatus::PendingSetup
1307 ) {
1308 bail!("domain offering cannot be resumed");
1309 }
1310 offering.status = DomainOfferingStatus::Active;
1311 offering.verified_at.get_or_insert(body.proposed_at);
1312 }
1313 TransactionKind::DomainOfferingRetire { offering_id } => {
1314 let account = self.accounts.entry(tx.signer.clone()).or_default();
1315 account.nonce += 1;
1316 let offering = self
1317 .domain_offerings
1318 .get_mut(offering_id)
1319 .ok_or_else(|| anyhow!("unknown domain offering {offering_id}"))?;
1320 offering.status = DomainOfferingStatus::Retired;
1321 }
1322 TransactionKind::DomainLeaseCreate {
1323 offering_id,
1324 label,
1325 target_contract_id,
1326 duration_secs,
1327 } => {
1328 let cost = dns_lease_cost(*duration_secs)?;
1329 if self.account(&tx.signer).dns_balance < cost {
1330 bail!("insufficient dns token balance for domain lease");
1331 }
1332 let offering = self
1333 .domain_offerings
1334 .get(offering_id)
1335 .ok_or_else(|| anyhow!("unknown domain offering {offering_id}"))?;
1336 let fqdn = domain_fqdn(label, &offering.suffix)?;
1337 {
1338 let account = self.accounts.entry(tx.signer.clone()).or_default();
1339 account.dns_balance -= cost;
1340 account.nonce += 1;
1341 }
1342 let starts_at = body.proposed_at;
1343 let expires_at = starts_at + chrono::Duration::seconds(*duration_secs as i64);
1344 let lease_id = compute_hash(&(
1345 "domain-lease-v1",
1346 &self.chain_id,
1347 offering_id,
1348 label,
1349 &tx.signer,
1350 starts_at,
1351 ))?;
1352 self.domain_leases.insert(
1353 lease_id.clone(),
1354 DomainLeaseRecord {
1355 lease_id,
1356 offering_id: offering_id.clone(),
1357 owner: tx.signer.clone(),
1358 label: label.clone(),
1359 fqdn,
1360 target_contract_id: target_contract_id.clone(),
1361 prepaid_balance: cost,
1362 starts_at,
1363 expires_at,
1364 last_paid_at: starts_at,
1365 status: DomainLeaseStatus::Active,
1366 created_at: starts_at,
1367 updated_at: starts_at,
1368 },
1369 );
1370 }
1371 TransactionKind::DomainLeaseRenew {
1372 lease_id,
1373 duration_secs,
1374 } => {
1375 let cost = dns_lease_cost(*duration_secs)?;
1376 if self.account(&tx.signer).dns_balance < cost {
1377 bail!("insufficient dns token balance for domain lease renew");
1378 }
1379 {
1380 let account = self.accounts.entry(tx.signer.clone()).or_default();
1381 account.dns_balance -= cost;
1382 account.nonce += 1;
1383 }
1384 let lease = self
1385 .domain_leases
1386 .get_mut(lease_id)
1387 .ok_or_else(|| anyhow!("unknown domain lease {lease_id}"))?;
1388 lease.prepaid_balance = lease
1389 .prepaid_balance
1390 .checked_add(cost)
1391 .ok_or_else(|| anyhow!("domain lease prepaid balance overflow"))?;
1392 let base = if lease.expires_at > body.proposed_at {
1393 lease.expires_at
1394 } else {
1395 body.proposed_at
1396 };
1397 lease.expires_at = base + chrono::Duration::seconds(*duration_secs as i64);
1398 lease.updated_at = body.proposed_at;
1399 if matches!(lease.status, DomainLeaseStatus::InsufficientFunds) {
1400 lease.status = DomainLeaseStatus::Active;
1401 lease.last_paid_at = body.proposed_at;
1402 }
1403 }
1404 TransactionKind::DomainLeaseBind {
1405 lease_id,
1406 target_contract_id,
1407 } => {
1408 let account = self.accounts.entry(tx.signer.clone()).or_default();
1409 account.nonce += 1;
1410 let lease = self
1411 .domain_leases
1412 .get_mut(lease_id)
1413 .ok_or_else(|| anyhow!("unknown domain lease {lease_id}"))?;
1414 lease.target_contract_id = target_contract_id.clone();
1415 lease.updated_at = body.proposed_at;
1416 }
1417 TransactionKind::DomainLeaseCancel { lease_id } => {
1418 let lease = self
1419 .domain_leases
1420 .get_mut(lease_id)
1421 .ok_or_else(|| anyhow!("unknown domain lease {lease_id}"))?;
1422 let refund = lease.prepaid_balance;
1423 lease.prepaid_balance = 0;
1424 lease.status = DomainLeaseStatus::Cancelled;
1425 lease.updated_at = body.proposed_at;
1426 let account = self.accounts.entry(tx.signer.clone()).or_default();
1427 account.nonce += 1;
1428 account.dns_balance += refund;
1429 }
1430 }
1431 }
1432
1433 self.apply_storage_proof_batches(
1434 &body.storage_proof_batches,
1435 &body.previous_hash,
1436 body.proposed_at,
1437 )?;
1438 let observations_by_slot =
1439 self.apply_heartbeat_observations(&body.heartbeat_observations, body.proposed_at)?;
1440 self.apply_monitor_browser_batches(&body.monitor_browser_batches, body.proposed_at)?;
1441 self.apply_monitor_evaluations(
1442 &body.monitor_evaluations,
1443 &observations_by_slot,
1444 &monitor_browser_batches,
1445 &confirmation_batches,
1446 body.proposed_at,
1447 )?;
1448
1449 Ok(())
1450 }
1451
1452 fn settle_domain_leases(&mut self, proposed_at: DateTime<Utc>) -> Result<()> {
1453 let lease_ids = self.domain_leases.keys().cloned().collect::<Vec<_>>();
1454 for lease_id in lease_ids {
1455 let Some(snapshot) = self.domain_leases.get(&lease_id).cloned() else {
1456 continue;
1457 };
1458 if !matches!(
1459 snapshot.status,
1460 DomainLeaseStatus::Active | DomainLeaseStatus::InsufficientFunds
1461 ) {
1462 continue;
1463 }
1464 let window_end = proposed_at.min(snapshot.expires_at);
1465 if window_end <= snapshot.last_paid_at {
1466 continue;
1467 }
1468 let elapsed_secs = window_end
1469 .signed_duration_since(snapshot.last_paid_at)
1470 .num_seconds();
1471 if elapsed_secs <= 0 {
1472 continue;
1473 }
1474 let amount_due = (elapsed_secs as u64)
1475 .checked_mul(DNS_LEASE_COST_PER_SUBDOMAIN_SECOND)
1476 .ok_or_else(|| anyhow!("domain lease settlement overflow"))?;
1477 let paid = amount_due.min(snapshot.prepaid_balance);
1478 let offering = self
1479 .domain_offerings
1480 .get(&snapshot.offering_id)
1481 .ok_or_else(|| anyhow!("unknown domain offering {}", snapshot.offering_id))?;
1482 if paid > 0 {
1483 self.accounts
1484 .entry(offering.validator.clone())
1485 .or_default()
1486 .dns_balance += paid;
1487 }
1488 let lease = self
1489 .domain_leases
1490 .get_mut(&lease_id)
1491 .ok_or_else(|| anyhow!("unknown domain lease {lease_id}"))?;
1492 lease.prepaid_balance -= paid;
1493 lease.last_paid_at = window_end;
1494 lease.updated_at = proposed_at;
1495 if paid < amount_due {
1496 lease.status = DomainLeaseStatus::InsufficientFunds;
1497 } else if window_end >= lease.expires_at {
1498 lease.status = DomainLeaseStatus::Expired;
1499 } else if lease.prepaid_balance > 0 {
1500 lease.status = DomainLeaseStatus::Active;
1501 }
1502 }
1503 Ok(())
1504 }
1505
1506 fn validate_health_receipts_for_tx(
1507 &self,
1508 tx: &SignedTransaction,
1509 receipts: &[SignedHealthReceipt],
1510 ) -> Result<Vec<SignedHealthReceipt>> {
1511 let TransactionKind::HealthCheck { spec } = &tx.body.kind else {
1512 bail!("receipt batches are only valid for health check transactions");
1513 };
1514 let mut seen = BTreeSet::new();
1515 let mut validated = Vec::new();
1516 for receipt in receipts {
1517 verify_receipt(receipt)?;
1518 if receipt.body.chain_id != self.chain_id {
1519 bail!("receipt is for a different chain");
1520 }
1521 if receipt.body.tx_hash != tx.hash {
1522 bail!("receipt tx hash mismatch");
1523 }
1524 if receipt.body.request_id != spec.request_id {
1525 bail!("receipt request_id mismatch");
1526 }
1527 if !self.validators.contains(&receipt.body.executor) {
1528 bail!("receipt signer is not a validator");
1529 }
1530 if seen.insert(receipt.body.executor.clone()) {
1531 validated.push(receipt.clone());
1532 }
1533 }
1534
1535 Ok(validated)
1536 }
1537
1538 fn validate_browser_receipts_for_tx(
1539 &self,
1540 tx: &SignedTransaction,
1541 receipts: &[SignedBrowserReceipt],
1542 ) -> Result<Vec<SignedBrowserReceipt>> {
1543 let TransactionKind::BrowserCheck { spec } = &tx.body.kind else {
1544 bail!("browser receipt batches are only valid for browser check transactions");
1545 };
1546 let package_hash = crate::browser::browser_package_hash(&spec.package)?;
1547 let runtime_hash = crate::browser::browser_runtime_hash(&spec.package.runtime)?;
1548 let mut seen = BTreeSet::new();
1549 let mut validated = Vec::new();
1550 for receipt in receipts {
1551 verify_browser_receipt(receipt)?;
1552 if receipt.body.chain_id != self.chain_id {
1553 bail!("browser receipt is for a different chain");
1554 }
1555 if receipt.body.tx_hash != tx.hash {
1556 bail!("browser receipt tx hash mismatch");
1557 }
1558 if receipt.body.request_id != spec.request_id {
1559 bail!("browser receipt request_id mismatch");
1560 }
1561 if receipt.body.package_hash != package_hash {
1562 bail!("browser receipt package_hash mismatch");
1563 }
1564 if receipt.body.runtime_hash != runtime_hash {
1565 bail!("browser receipt runtime_hash mismatch");
1566 }
1567 if !self.validators.contains(&receipt.body.executor) {
1568 bail!("browser receipt signer is not a validator");
1569 }
1570 if seen.insert(receipt.body.executor.clone()) {
1571 validated.push(receipt.clone());
1572 }
1573 }
1574 Ok(validated)
1575 }
1576
1577 fn validate_compute_receipts_for_tx(
1578 &self,
1579 tx: &SignedTransaction,
1580 receipts: &[SignedComputeReceipt],
1581 ) -> Result<Vec<SignedComputeReceipt>> {
1582 let TransactionKind::ComputeJob { spec } = &tx.body.kind else {
1583 bail!("compute receipt batches are only valid for compute job transactions");
1584 };
1585 let job_hash = compute_job_hash(spec)?;
1586 let mut seen = BTreeSet::new();
1587 let mut validated = Vec::new();
1588 for receipt in receipts {
1589 verify_compute_receipt(receipt)?;
1590 if receipt.body.chain_id != self.chain_id {
1591 bail!("compute receipt is for a different chain");
1592 }
1593 if receipt.body.tx_hash != tx.hash {
1594 bail!("compute receipt tx hash mismatch");
1595 }
1596 if receipt.body.request_id != spec.request_id {
1597 bail!("compute receipt request_id mismatch");
1598 }
1599 if receipt.body.job_hash != job_hash {
1600 bail!("compute receipt job_hash mismatch");
1601 }
1602 if !self.validators.contains(&receipt.body.executor) {
1603 bail!("compute receipt signer is not a validator");
1604 }
1605 for output in &receipt.body.shard_outputs {
1606 validate_compute_output(output)?;
1607 validate_compute_output_artifacts(&spec.artifact_policy, output)?;
1608 }
1609 let reduced = if receipt.body.success {
1610 Some(reduce_compute_outputs(spec, &receipt.body.shard_outputs)?)
1611 } else {
1612 None
1613 };
1614 if receipt.body.success && receipt.body.reduced_output != reduced {
1615 bail!("compute receipt reduced output mismatch");
1616 }
1617 if seen.insert(receipt.body.executor.clone()) {
1618 validated.push(receipt.clone());
1619 }
1620 }
1621 Ok(validated)
1622 }
1623
1624 fn validate_block_approvals(&self, block: &SignedBlock) -> Result<Vec<SignedBlockApproval>> {
1625 let mut seen = BTreeSet::new();
1626 let mut approvals = Vec::new();
1627 for approval in &block.approvals {
1628 verify_block_approval(approval)?;
1629 if approval.body.chain_id != self.chain_id {
1630 bail!("block approval is for a different chain");
1631 }
1632 if approval.body.height != block.body.height {
1633 bail!("block approval height mismatch");
1634 }
1635 if approval.body.view != block.body.view {
1636 bail!("block approval view mismatch");
1637 }
1638 if approval.body.previous_hash != block.body.previous_hash {
1639 bail!("block approval previous hash mismatch");
1640 }
1641 if approval.body.block_hash != block.hash {
1642 bail!("block approval block hash mismatch");
1643 }
1644 if !self.validators.contains(&approval.body.approver) {
1645 bail!("block approval signer is not a validator");
1646 }
1647 if seen.insert(approval.body.approver.clone()) {
1648 approvals.push(approval.clone());
1649 }
1650 }
1651 Ok(approvals)
1652 }
1653
1654 fn select_consensus_health_receipts(
1655 &self,
1656 receipts: &[SignedHealthReceipt],
1657 ) -> Result<Vec<SignedHealthReceipt>> {
1658 let mut clusters: BTreeMap<String, Vec<SignedHealthReceipt>> = BTreeMap::new();
1659 for receipt in receipts {
1660 let outcome_key = health_outcome_key(receipt)?;
1661 clusters
1662 .entry(outcome_key)
1663 .or_default()
1664 .push(receipt.clone());
1665 }
1666
1667 let mut best_key = None;
1668 let mut best_len = 0usize;
1669 let mut tied = false;
1670 for (key, cluster) in &clusters {
1671 if cluster.len() > best_len {
1672 best_key = Some(key.clone());
1673 best_len = cluster.len();
1674 tied = false;
1675 } else if cluster.len() == best_len {
1676 tied = true;
1677 }
1678 }
1679
1680 let Some(best_key) = best_key else {
1681 bail!("health check is missing validated receipts");
1682 };
1683 if tied {
1684 bail!("health receipts do not reach a unique consensus outcome");
1685 }
1686
1687 let winning_cluster = clusters.remove(&best_key).unwrap_or_default();
1688 if winning_cluster.len() * 2 <= receipts.len() {
1689 bail!("health receipts do not reach majority consensus");
1690 }
1691 Ok(winning_cluster)
1692 }
1693
1694 fn select_consensus_browser_receipts(
1695 &self,
1696 receipts: &[SignedBrowserReceipt],
1697 ) -> Result<Vec<SignedBrowserReceipt>> {
1698 let mut clusters: BTreeMap<String, Vec<SignedBrowserReceipt>> = BTreeMap::new();
1699 for receipt in receipts {
1700 let outcome_key = browser_outcome_key(receipt)?;
1701 clusters
1702 .entry(outcome_key)
1703 .or_default()
1704 .push(receipt.clone());
1705 }
1706
1707 let mut best_key = None;
1708 let mut best_len = 0usize;
1709 let mut tied = false;
1710 for (key, cluster) in &clusters {
1711 if cluster.len() > best_len {
1712 best_key = Some(key.clone());
1713 best_len = cluster.len();
1714 tied = false;
1715 } else if cluster.len() == best_len {
1716 tied = true;
1717 }
1718 }
1719 let Some(best_key) = best_key else {
1720 bail!("browser check is missing validated receipts");
1721 };
1722 if tied {
1723 bail!("browser receipts do not reach a unique consensus outcome");
1724 }
1725 let winning_cluster = clusters.remove(&best_key).unwrap_or_default();
1726 if winning_cluster.len() * 2 <= receipts.len() {
1727 bail!("browser receipts do not reach majority consensus");
1728 }
1729 Ok(winning_cluster)
1730 }
1731
1732 fn select_consensus_compute_receipts(
1733 &self,
1734 receipts: &[SignedComputeReceipt],
1735 ) -> Result<Vec<SignedComputeReceipt>> {
1736 let mut clusters: BTreeMap<String, Vec<SignedComputeReceipt>> = BTreeMap::new();
1737 for receipt in receipts {
1738 let outcome_key = compute_outcome_key(receipt)?;
1739 clusters
1740 .entry(outcome_key)
1741 .or_default()
1742 .push(receipt.clone());
1743 }
1744
1745 let mut best_key = None;
1746 let mut best_len = 0usize;
1747 let mut tied = false;
1748 for (key, cluster) in &clusters {
1749 if cluster.len() > best_len {
1750 best_key = Some(key.clone());
1751 best_len = cluster.len();
1752 tied = false;
1753 } else if cluster.len() == best_len {
1754 tied = true;
1755 }
1756 }
1757 let Some(best_key) = best_key else {
1758 bail!("compute job is missing validated receipts");
1759 };
1760 if tied {
1761 bail!("compute receipts do not reach a unique consensus outcome");
1762 }
1763 let winning_cluster = clusters.remove(&best_key).unwrap_or_default();
1764 if winning_cluster.len() * 2 <= receipts.len() {
1765 bail!("compute receipts do not reach majority consensus");
1766 }
1767 Ok(winning_cluster)
1768 }
1769
1770 pub fn summarize_receipts_for_tx(
1771 &self,
1772 tx: &SignedTransaction,
1773 receipts: &[SignedHealthReceipt],
1774 ) -> Result<BlockHealthBatch> {
1775 let receipts = self.validate_health_receipts_for_tx(tx, receipts)?;
1776 Ok(BlockHealthBatch {
1777 tx_hash: tx.hash.clone(),
1778 receipts,
1779 })
1780 }
1781
1782 pub fn summarize_browser_receipts_for_tx(
1783 &self,
1784 tx: &SignedTransaction,
1785 receipts: &[SignedBrowserReceipt],
1786 ) -> Result<BlockBrowserBatch> {
1787 let receipts = self.validate_browser_receipts_for_tx(tx, receipts)?;
1788 Ok(BlockBrowserBatch {
1789 tx_hash: tx.hash.clone(),
1790 receipts,
1791 })
1792 }
1793
1794 pub fn summarize_compute_receipts_for_tx(
1795 &self,
1796 tx: &SignedTransaction,
1797 receipts: &[SignedComputeReceipt],
1798 ) -> Result<BlockComputeBatch> {
1799 let receipts = self.validate_compute_receipts_for_tx(tx, receipts)?;
1800 Ok(BlockComputeBatch {
1801 tx_hash: tx.hash.clone(),
1802 receipts,
1803 })
1804 }
1805
1806 pub fn summarize_storage_proof_batch(
1807 &self,
1808 contract_id: &str,
1809 receipts: &[SignedStorageProofReceipt],
1810 previous_block_hash: &str,
1811 proposed_at: DateTime<Utc>,
1812 ) -> Result<StorageProofBatch> {
1813 let contract = self
1814 .storage_contracts
1815 .get(contract_id)
1816 .ok_or_else(|| anyhow!("unknown storage contract {contract_id}"))?;
1817 let receipts = self.validate_storage_proof_receipts(
1818 contract,
1819 receipts,
1820 previous_block_hash,
1821 proposed_at,
1822 )?;
1823 Ok(StorageProofBatch {
1824 contract_id: contract_id.to_string(),
1825 receipts,
1826 })
1827 }
1828
1829 pub fn summarize_monitor_browser_batch(
1830 &self,
1831 monitor: &MonitorRecord,
1832 slot_key: &str,
1833 receipts: &[SignedBrowserReceipt],
1834 ) -> Result<MonitorBrowserBatch> {
1835 let receipts = self.validate_monitor_browser_receipts(monitor, slot_key, receipts)?;
1836 Ok(MonitorBrowserBatch {
1837 monitor_id: monitor.monitor_id.clone(),
1838 slot_key: slot_key.to_string(),
1839 receipts,
1840 })
1841 }
1842
1843 fn apply_storage_proof_batches(
1844 &mut self,
1845 batches: &[StorageProofBatch],
1846 previous_block_hash: &str,
1847 proposed_at: DateTime<Utc>,
1848 ) -> Result<()> {
1849 let mut seen_contracts = BTreeSet::new();
1850 for batch in batches {
1851 if !seen_contracts.insert(batch.contract_id.clone()) {
1852 bail!("block contains duplicate storage proof batch");
1853 }
1854 let contract = self
1855 .storage_contracts
1856 .get(&batch.contract_id)
1857 .cloned()
1858 .ok_or_else(|| anyhow!("unknown storage contract {}", batch.contract_id))?;
1859 let valid_receipts = self.validate_storage_proof_receipts(
1860 &contract,
1861 &batch.receipts,
1862 previous_block_hash,
1863 proposed_at,
1864 )?;
1865 if valid_receipts.len() < self.min_health_receipts {
1866 bail!(
1867 "storage contract {} requires at least {} validator proof receipts",
1868 batch.contract_id,
1869 self.min_health_receipts
1870 );
1871 }
1872 let rewarded_receipts = self.select_consensus_storage_receipts(&valid_receipts)?;
1873 let winning = rewarded_receipts
1874 .first()
1875 .ok_or_else(|| anyhow!("storage proof batch is missing receipts"))?;
1876 if !winning.body.success {
1877 bail!("storage proof consensus is not successful");
1878 }
1879
1880 let elapsed_secs = winning
1881 .body
1882 .window_end
1883 .signed_duration_since(contract.last_proven_at)
1884 .num_seconds();
1885 if elapsed_secs <= 0 {
1886 bail!("storage proof window does not advance the contract");
1887 }
1888 let reward_due = storage_reward_for_elapsed(
1889 contract.spec.size_bytes,
1890 elapsed_secs as u64,
1891 contract.spec.reward_rate_per_64mib_second,
1892 )?;
1893
1894 let contract = self
1895 .storage_contracts
1896 .get_mut(&batch.contract_id)
1897 .ok_or_else(|| anyhow!("unknown storage contract {}", batch.contract_id))?;
1898 let paid = reward_due.min(contract.prepaid_balance);
1899 contract.prepaid_balance -= paid;
1900 contract.total_paid += paid;
1901 contract.last_proven_at = winning.body.window_end;
1902 contract.proof_count += 1;
1903 if paid > 0 {
1904 self.accounts
1905 .entry(contract.host.clone())
1906 .or_default()
1907 .storage_balance += paid;
1908 }
1909 if paid < reward_due {
1910 contract.status = StorageContractStatus::InsufficientFunds;
1911 }
1912 if contract.last_proven_at >= contract.expires_at {
1913 let refund = contract.prepaid_balance;
1914 contract.prepaid_balance = 0;
1915 contract.status = StorageContractStatus::Expired;
1916 if refund > 0 {
1917 self.accounts
1918 .entry(contract.owner.clone())
1919 .or_default()
1920 .storage_balance += refund;
1921 }
1922 }
1923 }
1924 Ok(())
1925 }
1926
1927 fn validate_storage_proof_receipts(
1928 &self,
1929 contract: &StorageContractRecord,
1930 receipts: &[SignedStorageProofReceipt],
1931 previous_block_hash: &str,
1932 proposed_at: DateTime<Utc>,
1933 ) -> Result<Vec<SignedStorageProofReceipt>> {
1934 if !matches!(contract.status, StorageContractStatus::Active) {
1935 bail!("storage contract is not active");
1936 }
1937 let mut seen_validators = BTreeSet::new();
1938 let mut validated = Vec::new();
1939 for receipt in receipts {
1940 verify_storage_proof_receipt(receipt)?;
1941 if receipt.body.chain_id != self.chain_id {
1942 bail!("storage proof receipt is for a different chain");
1943 }
1944 if receipt.body.contract_id != contract.contract_id {
1945 bail!("storage proof receipt contract_id mismatch");
1946 }
1947 if receipt.body.host != contract.host {
1948 bail!("storage proof receipt host mismatch");
1949 }
1950 if !self.validators.contains(&receipt.body.validator) {
1951 bail!("storage proof receipt signer is not a validator");
1952 }
1953 if receipt.body.window_start != contract.last_proven_at {
1954 bail!("storage proof receipt window_start mismatch");
1955 }
1956 if receipt.body.window_end <= receipt.body.window_start {
1957 bail!("storage proof receipt window is invalid");
1958 }
1959 if receipt.body.window_end > proposed_at {
1960 bail!("storage proof receipt is from the future");
1961 }
1962 if receipt.body.window_end > contract.expires_at {
1963 bail!("storage proof receipt extends beyond contract expiry");
1964 }
1965 let elapsed = receipt
1966 .body
1967 .window_end
1968 .signed_duration_since(receipt.body.window_start)
1969 .num_seconds();
1970 if elapsed <= 0 || elapsed as u64 > contract.spec.proof_interval_secs {
1971 bail!("storage proof receipt window exceeds the contract proof interval");
1972 }
1973 if receipt.body.observed_at < receipt.body.window_start
1974 || receipt.body.observed_at > proposed_at
1975 {
1976 bail!("storage proof receipt observed_at is outside the proof window");
1977 }
1978 if receipt.body.bytes_stored < contract.spec.size_bytes {
1979 bail!("storage proof receipt does not cover the contract size");
1980 }
1981 if receipt.body.merkle_root != contract.spec.merkle_root {
1982 bail!("storage proof receipt merkle_root mismatch");
1983 }
1984 let expected_seed = storage_challenge_seed(
1985 &self.chain_id,
1986 &contract.contract_id,
1987 previous_block_hash,
1988 contract.last_proven_at,
1989 receipt.body.window_end,
1990 &contract.spec.merkle_root,
1991 )?;
1992 if receipt.body.challenge_seed != expected_seed {
1993 bail!("storage proof receipt challenge_seed mismatch");
1994 }
1995 let expected_chunk_indices = storage_challenge_indices(
1996 &expected_seed,
1997 storage_chunk_count(&contract.spec),
1998 contract.spec.proof_sample_count,
1999 )?;
2000 if receipt.body.samples.len() != contract.spec.proof_sample_count as usize {
2001 bail!("storage proof receipt sample count mismatch");
2002 }
2003 let actual_indices = receipt
2004 .body
2005 .samples
2006 .iter()
2007 .map(|sample| sample.chunk_index)
2008 .collect::<Vec<_>>();
2009 if actual_indices != expected_chunk_indices {
2010 bail!("storage proof receipt challenge indices mismatch");
2011 }
2012 for sample in &receipt.body.samples {
2013 validate_storage_proof_sample(sample, &contract.spec.merkle_root)?;
2014 }
2015 if seen_validators.insert(receipt.body.validator.clone()) {
2016 validated.push(receipt.clone());
2017 }
2018 }
2019 Ok(validated)
2020 }
2021
2022 fn select_consensus_storage_receipts(
2023 &self,
2024 receipts: &[SignedStorageProofReceipt],
2025 ) -> Result<Vec<SignedStorageProofReceipt>> {
2026 let mut clusters: BTreeMap<String, Vec<SignedStorageProofReceipt>> = BTreeMap::new();
2027 for receipt in receipts {
2028 let outcome_key = storage_proof_outcome_key(receipt)?;
2029 clusters
2030 .entry(outcome_key)
2031 .or_default()
2032 .push(receipt.clone());
2033 }
2034
2035 let mut best_key = None;
2036 let mut best_len = 0usize;
2037 let mut tied = false;
2038 for (key, cluster) in &clusters {
2039 if cluster.len() > best_len {
2040 best_key = Some(key.clone());
2041 best_len = cluster.len();
2042 tied = false;
2043 } else if cluster.len() == best_len {
2044 tied = true;
2045 }
2046 }
2047 let Some(best_key) = best_key else {
2048 bail!("storage proof batch is missing validated receipts");
2049 };
2050 if tied {
2051 bail!("storage proof receipts do not reach a unique consensus outcome");
2052 }
2053 let winning_cluster = clusters.remove(&best_key).unwrap_or_default();
2054 if winning_cluster.len() * 2 <= receipts.len() {
2055 bail!("storage proof receipts do not reach majority consensus");
2056 }
2057 Ok(winning_cluster)
2058 }
2059
2060 fn apply_heartbeat_observations(
2061 &mut self,
2062 observations: &[SignedHeartbeatObservation],
2063 proposed_at: DateTime<Utc>,
2064 ) -> Result<BTreeMap<(String, String), Vec<SignedHeartbeatObservation>>> {
2065 let mut grouped = BTreeMap::new();
2066 let mut seen = BTreeSet::new();
2067 for observation in observations {
2068 verify_heartbeat_observation(observation)?;
2069 if observation.body.chain_id != self.chain_id {
2070 bail!("heartbeat observation is for a different chain");
2071 }
2072 let monitor = self
2073 .monitors
2074 .get(&observation.body.monitor_id)
2075 .cloned()
2076 .ok_or_else(|| anyhow!("unknown monitor {}", observation.body.monitor_id))?;
2077 let heartbeat = monitor.spec.heartbeat_config().ok_or_else(|| {
2078 anyhow!("monitor {} is not a heartbeat monitor", monitor.monitor_id)
2079 })?;
2080 let expected_slot_key =
2081 schedule_current_slot_start(&monitor.spec.schedule, observation.body.observed_at)?
2082 .to_rfc3339();
2083 if observation.body.slot_key != expected_slot_key {
2084 bail!("heartbeat observation slot_key mismatch");
2085 }
2086 validate_monitor_heartbeat_observation(&monitor, observation)?;
2087 if monitor.paused {
2088 bail!("paused monitors do not accept heartbeat observations");
2089 }
2090 if !seen.insert(observation.id.clone()) {
2091 continue;
2092 }
2093
2094 self.ensure_slot_budget_reserved(
2095 &monitor.monitor_id,
2096 &observation.body.slot_key,
2097 proposed_at,
2098 )?;
2099 self.charge_monitor_budget(&monitor.monitor_id, MONITOR_PING_INGRESS_FEE);
2100 self.accounts
2101 .entry(observation.body.observed_by.clone())
2102 .or_default()
2103 .balance += MONITOR_PING_INGRESS_FEE;
2104
2105 let slot_started_at =
2106 schedule_current_slot_start(&monitor.spec.schedule, observation.body.observed_at)?;
2107 let deadline_at = slot_deadline(slot_started_at, monitor.spec.grace_secs);
2108 let slot_record = self
2109 .monitor_slot_history
2110 .entry(monitor.monitor_id.clone())
2111 .or_default()
2112 .entry(observation.body.slot_key.clone())
2113 .or_insert_with(|| MonitorSlotRecord {
2114 monitor_id: monitor.monitor_id.clone(),
2115 slot_key: observation.body.slot_key.clone(),
2116 slot_started_at,
2117 deadline_at,
2118 status: if monitor.paused {
2119 MonitorSlotStatus::Paused
2120 } else {
2121 MonitorSlotStatus::Pending
2122 },
2123 finalized_at: proposed_at,
2124 observation_ids: Vec::new(),
2125 confirmation_success: None,
2126 });
2127 if !slot_record.observation_ids.contains(&observation.id) {
2128 slot_record.observation_ids.push(observation.id.clone());
2129 }
2130 slot_record.finalized_at = proposed_at;
2131
2132 match observation.body.signal {
2133 HeartbeatSignal::Start => {
2134 if let Some(run_timeout_secs) = signal_run_timeout_secs(heartbeat.signal_policy)
2135 {
2136 let extended = observation.body.observed_at
2137 + chrono::Duration::seconds(run_timeout_secs as i64);
2138 if extended > slot_record.deadline_at {
2139 slot_record.deadline_at = extended;
2140 }
2141 }
2142 slot_record.status = MonitorSlotStatus::Running;
2143 if let Some(current) = self.monitors.get_mut(&monitor.monitor_id) {
2144 current.status = MonitorStatus::Running;
2145 current.updated_at = proposed_at;
2146 current.last_observation_at = Some(observation.body.observed_at);
2147 current.next_slot_hint = schedule_next_slot_start(
2148 &current.spec.schedule,
2149 slot_record.slot_started_at,
2150 )
2151 .ok()
2152 .map(|value| value.to_rfc3339());
2153 }
2154 }
2155 HeartbeatSignal::Success => {
2156 let was_late = matches!(
2157 slot_record.status,
2158 MonitorSlotStatus::MissedUnconfirmed
2159 | MonitorSlotStatus::MissedServiceReachable
2160 | MonitorSlotStatus::DownConfirmed
2161 | MonitorSlotStatus::FailedExplicit
2162 ) || observation.body.observed_at > slot_record.deadline_at;
2163 slot_record.status = if was_late {
2164 MonitorSlotStatus::RecoveredLate
2165 } else {
2166 MonitorSlotStatus::Ok
2167 };
2168 if let Some(current) = self.monitors.get_mut(&monitor.monitor_id) {
2169 current.status = monitor_ready_status(
2170 current.paused,
2171 &current.spec,
2172 current.budget_balance,
2173 );
2174 current.updated_at = proposed_at;
2175 current.last_observation_at = Some(observation.body.observed_at);
2176 current.next_slot_hint = schedule_next_slot_start(
2177 &current.spec.schedule,
2178 slot_record.slot_started_at,
2179 )
2180 .ok()
2181 .map(|value| value.to_rfc3339());
2182 }
2183 if was_late {
2184 self.add_alert_fact(
2185 &monitor.monitor_id,
2186 &observation.body.slot_key,
2187 MonitorSlotStatus::RecoveredLate,
2188 proposed_at,
2189 monitor.spec.notification_policy_id.clone(),
2190 )?;
2191 }
2192 }
2193 HeartbeatSignal::Fail => {
2194 slot_record.status = MonitorSlotStatus::FailedExplicit;
2195 if let Some(current) = self.monitors.get_mut(&monitor.monitor_id) {
2196 current.status = MonitorStatus::Down;
2197 current.updated_at = proposed_at;
2198 current.last_observation_at = Some(observation.body.observed_at);
2199 current.next_slot_hint = schedule_next_slot_start(
2200 &current.spec.schedule,
2201 slot_record.slot_started_at,
2202 )
2203 .ok()
2204 .map(|value| value.to_rfc3339());
2205 }
2206 self.add_alert_fact(
2207 &monitor.monitor_id,
2208 &observation.body.slot_key,
2209 MonitorSlotStatus::FailedExplicit,
2210 proposed_at,
2211 monitor.spec.notification_policy_id.clone(),
2212 )?;
2213 }
2214 }
2215
2216 grouped
2217 .entry((
2218 monitor.monitor_id.clone(),
2219 observation.body.slot_key.clone(),
2220 ))
2221 .or_insert_with(Vec::new)
2222 .push(observation.clone());
2223 }
2224 Ok(grouped)
2225 }
2226
2227 fn apply_monitor_evaluations(
2228 &mut self,
2229 evaluations: &[MonitorEvaluation],
2230 observations_by_slot: &BTreeMap<(String, String), Vec<SignedHeartbeatObservation>>,
2231 monitor_browser_batches: &BTreeMap<(String, String), MonitorBrowserBatch>,
2232 confirmation_batches: &BTreeMap<(String, String), MonitorConfirmationBatch>,
2233 proposed_at: DateTime<Utc>,
2234 ) -> Result<()> {
2235 let mut seen = BTreeSet::new();
2236 for evaluation in evaluations {
2237 if !seen.insert((
2238 evaluation.monitor_id.clone(),
2239 evaluation.slot_key.clone(),
2240 evaluation.kind.clone(),
2241 )) {
2242 continue;
2243 }
2244 let monitor = self
2245 .monitors
2246 .get(&evaluation.monitor_id)
2247 .cloned()
2248 .ok_or_else(|| anyhow!("unknown monitor {}", evaluation.monitor_id))?;
2249 let slot_started_at = DateTime::parse_from_rfc3339(&evaluation.slot_key)
2250 .map_err(|error| anyhow!("invalid slot_key: {error}"))?
2251 .with_timezone(&Utc);
2252 let deadline_at = self
2253 .monitor_slot_history
2254 .get(&monitor.monitor_id)
2255 .and_then(|slots| slots.get(&evaluation.slot_key))
2256 .map(|slot| slot.deadline_at)
2257 .unwrap_or_else(|| slot_deadline(slot_started_at, monitor.spec.grace_secs));
2258 let heartbeat = monitor.spec.heartbeat_config();
2259
2260 match evaluation.kind {
2261 MonitorEvaluationKind::SlotSatisfied => {
2262 if heartbeat.is_none() {
2263 bail!("slot satisfied evaluations are only valid for heartbeat monitors");
2264 }
2265 let has_success = observations_by_slot
2266 .get(&(evaluation.monitor_id.clone(), evaluation.slot_key.clone()))
2267 .map(|items| {
2268 items
2269 .iter()
2270 .any(|item| item.body.signal == HeartbeatSignal::Success)
2271 })
2272 .unwrap_or(false);
2273 if !has_success {
2274 bail!("slot satisfied evaluation requires a success observation");
2275 }
2276 {
2277 let slot_record = self
2278 .monitor_slot_history
2279 .entry(monitor.monitor_id.clone())
2280 .or_default()
2281 .entry(evaluation.slot_key.clone())
2282 .or_insert_with(|| MonitorSlotRecord {
2283 monitor_id: monitor.monitor_id.clone(),
2284 slot_key: evaluation.slot_key.clone(),
2285 slot_started_at,
2286 deadline_at,
2287 status: MonitorSlotStatus::Pending,
2288 finalized_at: proposed_at,
2289 observation_ids: Vec::new(),
2290 confirmation_success: None,
2291 });
2292 slot_record.finalized_at = proposed_at;
2293 slot_record.status = MonitorSlotStatus::Ok;
2294 }
2295 if let Some(current) = self.monitors.get_mut(&evaluation.monitor_id) {
2296 current.status = monitor_ready_status(
2297 current.paused,
2298 &current.spec,
2299 current.budget_balance,
2300 );
2301 current.updated_at = proposed_at;
2302 current.next_slot_hint =
2303 schedule_next_slot_start(&current.spec.schedule, slot_started_at)
2304 .ok()
2305 .map(|value| value.to_rfc3339());
2306 }
2307 }
2308 MonitorEvaluationKind::SlotMissed => {
2309 if proposed_at <= deadline_at {
2310 bail!("slot missed evaluation is before the slot deadline");
2311 }
2312 let mut status = MonitorSlotStatus::MissedUnconfirmed;
2313 let mut confirmation_success = None;
2314 match heartbeat {
2315 Some(heartbeat) => {
2316 let has_success = observations_by_slot
2317 .get(&(evaluation.monitor_id.clone(), evaluation.slot_key.clone()))
2318 .map(|items| {
2319 items
2320 .iter()
2321 .any(|item| item.body.signal == HeartbeatSignal::Success)
2322 })
2323 .unwrap_or(false);
2324 if has_success {
2325 bail!(
2326 "slot missed evaluation cannot coexist with a success observation"
2327 );
2328 }
2329 if let Some(batch) = confirmation_batches
2330 .get(&(evaluation.monitor_id.clone(), evaluation.slot_key.clone()))
2331 {
2332 let (consensus_success, rewarded) =
2333 self.apply_confirmation_batch(&monitor, batch)?;
2334 confirmation_success = Some(consensus_success);
2335 status = if consensus_success {
2336 MonitorSlotStatus::MissedServiceReachable
2337 } else {
2338 MonitorSlotStatus::DownConfirmed
2339 };
2340 let charge = confirmation_probe_cost(batch)?;
2341 self.distribute_monitor_confirmation_rewards(
2342 &evaluation.monitor_id,
2343 charge,
2344 &rewarded,
2345 );
2346 } else if matches!(
2347 heartbeat.miss_policy,
2348 crate::protocol::MissPolicy::ConfirmWithValidators { .. }
2349 | crate::protocol::MissPolicy::ConfirmWithDelegatedAgents { .. }
2350 ) && heartbeat.confirmation_probe.is_some()
2351 {
2352 status = MonitorSlotStatus::MissedUnconfirmed;
2353 }
2354 }
2355 None => {
2356 if monitor_browser_batches.contains_key(&(
2357 evaluation.monitor_id.clone(),
2358 evaluation.slot_key.clone(),
2359 )) {
2360 bail!("browser monitor slot cannot be both missed and executed");
2361 }
2362 }
2363 }
2364 {
2365 let slot_record = self
2366 .monitor_slot_history
2367 .entry(monitor.monitor_id.clone())
2368 .or_default()
2369 .entry(evaluation.slot_key.clone())
2370 .or_insert_with(|| MonitorSlotRecord {
2371 monitor_id: monitor.monitor_id.clone(),
2372 slot_key: evaluation.slot_key.clone(),
2373 slot_started_at,
2374 deadline_at,
2375 status: MonitorSlotStatus::Pending,
2376 finalized_at: proposed_at,
2377 observation_ids: Vec::new(),
2378 confirmation_success: None,
2379 });
2380 slot_record.finalized_at = proposed_at;
2381 slot_record.confirmation_success = confirmation_success;
2382 slot_record.status = status.clone();
2383 }
2384 if let Some(current) = self.monitors.get_mut(&evaluation.monitor_id) {
2385 current.status = if current.paused {
2386 MonitorStatus::Paused
2387 } else if current.budget_balance
2388 < monitor_minimum_slot_balance(&current.spec).unwrap_or(u64::MAX)
2389 {
2390 MonitorStatus::InsufficientFunds
2391 } else {
2392 MonitorStatus::Late
2393 };
2394 if matches!(status, MonitorSlotStatus::DownConfirmed) {
2395 current.status = MonitorStatus::Down;
2396 }
2397 current.updated_at = proposed_at;
2398 current.next_slot_hint =
2399 schedule_next_slot_start(&current.spec.schedule, slot_started_at)
2400 .ok()
2401 .map(|value| value.to_rfc3339());
2402 }
2403 self.add_alert_fact(
2404 &evaluation.monitor_id,
2405 &evaluation.slot_key,
2406 status,
2407 proposed_at,
2408 monitor.spec.notification_policy_id.clone(),
2409 )?;
2410 }
2411 MonitorEvaluationKind::InsufficientFunds => {
2412 if let Some(current) = self.monitors.get_mut(&evaluation.monitor_id) {
2413 current.status = MonitorStatus::InsufficientFunds;
2414 current.updated_at = proposed_at;
2415 current.next_slot_hint =
2416 schedule_next_slot_start(&current.spec.schedule, slot_started_at)
2417 .ok()
2418 .map(|value| value.to_rfc3339());
2419 }
2420 {
2421 let slot_record = self
2422 .monitor_slot_history
2423 .entry(monitor.monitor_id.clone())
2424 .or_default()
2425 .entry(evaluation.slot_key.clone())
2426 .or_insert_with(|| MonitorSlotRecord {
2427 monitor_id: monitor.monitor_id.clone(),
2428 slot_key: evaluation.slot_key.clone(),
2429 slot_started_at,
2430 deadline_at,
2431 status: MonitorSlotStatus::Pending,
2432 finalized_at: proposed_at,
2433 observation_ids: Vec::new(),
2434 confirmation_success: None,
2435 });
2436 slot_record.finalized_at = proposed_at;
2437 slot_record.status = MonitorSlotStatus::InsufficientFunds;
2438 }
2439 self.add_alert_fact(
2440 &evaluation.monitor_id,
2441 &evaluation.slot_key,
2442 MonitorSlotStatus::InsufficientFunds,
2443 proposed_at,
2444 monitor.spec.notification_policy_id.clone(),
2445 )?;
2446 }
2447 MonitorEvaluationKind::Recovered => {
2448 if heartbeat.is_none() {
2449 bail!("recovered evaluations are only valid for heartbeat monitors");
2450 }
2451 let has_success = observations_by_slot
2452 .get(&(evaluation.monitor_id.clone(), evaluation.slot_key.clone()))
2453 .map(|items| {
2454 items
