2455 .iter()
2456 .any(|item| item.body.signal == HeartbeatSignal::Success)
2457 })
2458 .unwrap_or(false);
2459 if !has_success {
2460 bail!("recovered evaluation requires a success observation");
2461 }
2462 {
2463 let slot_record = self
2464 .monitor_slot_history
2465 .entry(monitor.monitor_id.clone())
2466 .or_default()
2467 .entry(evaluation.slot_key.clone())
2468 .or_insert_with(|| MonitorSlotRecord {
2469 monitor_id: monitor.monitor_id.clone(),
2470 slot_key: evaluation.slot_key.clone(),
2471 slot_started_at,
2472 deadline_at,
2473 status: MonitorSlotStatus::Pending,
2474 finalized_at: proposed_at,
2475 observation_ids: Vec::new(),
2476 confirmation_success: None,
2477 });
2478 slot_record.finalized_at = proposed_at;
2479 slot_record.status = MonitorSlotStatus::RecoveredLate;
2480 }
2481 if let Some(current) = self.monitors.get_mut(&evaluation.monitor_id) {
2482 current.status = monitor_ready_status(
2483 current.paused,
2484 &current.spec,
2485 current.budget_balance,
2486 );
2487 current.updated_at = proposed_at;
2488 current.next_slot_hint =
2489 schedule_next_slot_start(&current.spec.schedule, slot_started_at)
2490 .ok()
2491 .map(|value| value.to_rfc3339());
2492 }
2493 self.add_alert_fact(
2494 &evaluation.monitor_id,
2495 &evaluation.slot_key,
2496 MonitorSlotStatus::RecoveredLate,
2497 proposed_at,
2498 monitor.spec.notification_policy_id.clone(),
2499 )?;
2500 }
2501 }
2502 }
2503 Ok(())
2504 }
2505
2506 fn apply_monitor_browser_batches(
2507 &mut self,
2508 batches: &[MonitorBrowserBatch],
2509 proposed_at: DateTime<Utc>,
2510 ) -> Result<()> {
2511 let mut seen = BTreeSet::new();
2512 for batch in batches {
2513 if !seen.insert((batch.monitor_id.clone(), batch.slot_key.clone())) {
2514 continue;
2515 }
2516 let monitor = self
2517 .monitors
2518 .get(&batch.monitor_id)
2519 .cloned()
2520 .ok_or_else(|| anyhow!("unknown monitor {}", batch.monitor_id))?;
2521 let package = monitor.spec.browser_package().ok_or_else(|| {
2522 anyhow!("monitor {} is not a browser monitor", monitor.monitor_id)
2523 })?;
2524 let cost = monitor_browser_slot_cost(package)?;
2525 if monitor.budget_balance < cost {
2526 bail!(
2527 "browser monitor {} requires at least {} budget for slot {}",
2528 monitor.monitor_id,
2529 cost,
2530 batch.slot_key
2531 );
2532 }
2533
2534 let slot_started_at = DateTime::parse_from_rfc3339(&batch.slot_key)
2535 .map_err(|error| anyhow!("invalid slot_key: {error}"))?
2536 .with_timezone(&Utc);
2537 let deadline_at = slot_deadline(slot_started_at, monitor.spec.grace_secs);
2538 let unique_valid_receipts =
2539 self.validate_monitor_browser_receipts(&monitor, &batch.slot_key, &batch.receipts)?;
2540 let rewarded_receipts =
2541 self.select_consensus_browser_receipts(&unique_valid_receipts)?;
2542
2543 let reward_per_validator = cost / rewarded_receipts.len() as u64;
2544 let distributed = reward_per_validator * rewarded_receipts.len() as u64;
2545 let remainder = cost - distributed;
2546 self.charge_monitor_budget(&monitor.monitor_id, cost);
2547 for receipt in &rewarded_receipts {
2548 self.accounts
2549 .entry(receipt.body.executor.clone())
2550 .or_default()
2551 .balance += reward_per_validator;
2552 }
2553 self.accounts
2554 .entry(self.treasury.clone())
2555 .or_default()
2556 .balance += remainder;
2557
2558 let consensus_success = rewarded_receipts
2559 .first()
2560 .map(|receipt| receipt.body.success)
2561 .unwrap_or(false);
2562 let status = if consensus_success {
2563 MonitorSlotStatus::Ok
2564 } else {
2565 MonitorSlotStatus::DownConfirmed
2566 };
2567
2568 {
2569 let slot_record = self
2570 .monitor_slot_history
2571 .entry(monitor.monitor_id.clone())
2572 .or_default()
2573 .entry(batch.slot_key.clone())
2574 .or_insert_with(|| MonitorSlotRecord {
2575 monitor_id: monitor.monitor_id.clone(),
2576 slot_key: batch.slot_key.clone(),
2577 slot_started_at,
2578 deadline_at,
2579 status: MonitorSlotStatus::Pending,
2580 finalized_at: proposed_at,
2581 observation_ids: Vec::new(),
2582 confirmation_success: None,
2583 });
2584 slot_record.finalized_at = proposed_at;
2585 slot_record.status = status.clone();
2586 slot_record.confirmation_success = Some(consensus_success);
2587 }
2588 if let Some(current) = self.monitors.get_mut(&monitor.monitor_id) {
2589 current.status = if current.paused {
2590 MonitorStatus::Paused
2591 } else if consensus_success {
2592 monitor_ready_status(current.paused, &current.spec, current.budget_balance)
2593 } else {
2594 MonitorStatus::Down
2595 };
2596 current.updated_at = proposed_at;
2597 current.next_slot_hint =
2598 schedule_next_slot_start(&current.spec.schedule, slot_started_at)
2599 .ok()
2600 .map(|value| value.to_rfc3339());
2601 }
2602 if !consensus_success {
2603 self.add_alert_fact(
2604 &monitor.monitor_id,
2605 &batch.slot_key,
2606 MonitorSlotStatus::DownConfirmed,
2607 proposed_at,
2608 monitor.spec.notification_policy_id.clone(),
2609 )?;
2610 }
2611 }
2612 Ok(())
2613 }
2614
2615 fn validate_monitor_browser_receipts(
2616 &self,
2617 monitor: &MonitorRecord,
2618 slot_key: &str,
2619 receipts: &[SignedBrowserReceipt],
2620 ) -> Result<Vec<SignedBrowserReceipt>> {
2621 let package = monitor
2622 .spec
2623 .browser_package()
2624 .ok_or_else(|| anyhow!("monitor {} is not a browser monitor", monitor.monitor_id))?;
2625 let synthetic_tx_hash = monitor_browser_tx_hash(&monitor.monitor_id, slot_key)?;
2626 let synthetic_request_id = monitor_browser_request_id(&monitor.monitor_id, slot_key);
2627 let package_hash = crate::browser::browser_package_hash(package)?;
2628 let runtime_hash = crate::browser::browser_runtime_hash(&package.runtime)?;
2629 let mut seen = BTreeSet::new();
2630 let mut validated = Vec::new();
2631 for receipt in receipts {
2632 verify_browser_receipt(receipt)?;
2633 if receipt.body.chain_id != self.chain_id {
2634 bail!("browser monitor receipt is for a different chain");
2635 }
2636 if receipt.body.tx_hash != synthetic_tx_hash {
2637 bail!("browser monitor receipt tx_hash mismatch");
2638 }
2639 if receipt.body.request_id != synthetic_request_id {
2640 bail!("browser monitor receipt request_id mismatch");
2641 }
2642 if receipt.body.monitor_id.as_deref() != Some(monitor.monitor_id.as_str()) {
2643 bail!("browser monitor receipt monitor_id mismatch");
2644 }
2645 if receipt.body.slot_key.as_deref() != Some(slot_key) {
2646 bail!("browser monitor receipt slot_key mismatch");
2647 }
2648 if receipt.body.package_hash != package_hash {
2649 bail!("browser monitor receipt package_hash mismatch");
2650 }
2651 if receipt.body.runtime_hash != runtime_hash {
2652 bail!("browser monitor receipt runtime_hash mismatch");
2653 }
2654 if !self.validators.contains(&receipt.body.executor) {
2655 bail!("browser monitor receipt signer is not a validator");
2656 }
2657 if seen.insert(receipt.body.executor.clone()) {
2658 validated.push(receipt.clone());
2659 }
2660 }
2661 if validated.len() < self.min_health_receipts {
2662 bail!(
2663 "browser monitor {}:{} requires at least {} validator receipts",
2664 monitor.monitor_id,
2665 slot_key,
2666 self.min_health_receipts
2667 );
2668 }
2669 Ok(validated)
2670 }
2671
2672 fn apply_confirmation_batch(
2673 &self,
2674 monitor: &MonitorRecord,
2675 batch: &MonitorConfirmationBatch,
2676 ) -> Result<(bool, Vec<SignedHealthReceipt>)> {
2677 if batch.monitor_id != monitor.monitor_id {
2678 bail!("confirmation batch monitor_id mismatch");
2679 }
2680 let heartbeat = monitor
2681 .spec
2682 .heartbeat_config()
2683 .ok_or_else(|| anyhow!("monitor {} is not a heartbeat monitor", monitor.monitor_id))?;
2684 let spec = heartbeat
2685 .confirmation_probe
2686 .cloned()
2687 .ok_or_else(|| anyhow!("monitor is missing confirmation_probe"))?;
2688 let synthetic_tx_hash = monitor_confirmation_tx_hash(&monitor.monitor_id, &batch.slot_key)?;
2689 let synthetic_request_id =
2690 monitor_confirmation_request_id(&monitor.monitor_id, &batch.slot_key);
2691 let mut seen = BTreeSet::new();
2692 let mut validated = Vec::new();
2693 for receipt in &batch.validator_receipts {
2694 verify_receipt(receipt)?;
2695 if receipt.body.chain_id != self.chain_id {
2696 bail!("confirmation receipt is for a different chain");
2697 }
2698 if receipt.body.tx_hash != synthetic_tx_hash {
2699 bail!("confirmation receipt tx_hash mismatch");
2700 }
2701 if receipt.body.request_id != synthetic_request_id {
2702 bail!("confirmation receipt request_id mismatch");
2703 }
2704 if !self.validators.contains(&receipt.body.executor) {
2705 bail!("confirmation receipt signer is not a validator");
2706 }
2707 if seen.insert(receipt.body.executor.clone()) {
2708 validated.push(receipt.clone());
2709 }
2710 }
2711 let required_receipts =
2712 required_monitor_confirmation_receipts(heartbeat.miss_policy, self.validators.len());
2713 if validated.len() < required_receipts {
2714 bail!(
2715 "confirmation batch for {}:{} requires at least {} validator receipts",
2716 monitor.monitor_id,
2717 batch.slot_key,
2718 required_receipts
2719 );
2720 }
2721 let validator_executors = validated
2722 .iter()
2723 .map(|receipt| receipt.body.executor.clone())
2724 .collect::<BTreeSet<_>>();
2725 let mut delegated_agents = BTreeSet::new();
2726 let mut delegated_leases = BTreeSet::new();
2727 let mut delegated_regions = BTreeSet::new();
2728 let mut delegated_count = 0usize;
2729 for receipt in &batch.delegated_receipts {
2730 verify_delegated_probe_receipt(receipt)?;
2731 if receipt.body.chain_id != self.chain_id {
2732 bail!("delegated confirmation receipt is for a different chain");
2733 }
2734 if receipt.body.monitor_id != monitor.monitor_id
2735 || receipt.body.slot_key != batch.slot_key
2736 {
2737 bail!("delegated confirmation receipt slot mismatch");
2738 }
2739 if !self.validators.contains(&receipt.body.parent_validator) {
2740 bail!("delegated confirmation parent validator is not in the validator set");
2741 }
2742 if !validator_executors.contains(&receipt.body.parent_validator) {
2743 bail!("delegated confirmation parent validator is missing validator attestation");
2744 }
2745 if receipt.body.request_id.as_deref() != Some(synthetic_request_id.as_str()) {
2746 bail!("delegated confirmation receipt request_id mismatch");
2747 }
2748 let lease_id = receipt
2749 .body
2750 .lease_id
2751 .as_deref()
2752 .map(str::trim)
2753 .filter(|lease_id| !lease_id.is_empty())
2754 .ok_or_else(|| {
2755 anyhow!("delegated confirmation receipt lease_id cannot be empty")
2756 })?;
2757 if !delegated_agents.insert(receipt.body.agent_public_key.clone()) {
2758 bail!("delegated confirmation receipt agent_public_key is duplicated");
2759 }
2760 if !delegated_leases.insert(lease_id.to_string()) {
2761 bail!("delegated confirmation receipt lease_id is duplicated");
2762 }
2763 if let Some(region) = receipt.body.region.as_deref().map(str::trim)
2764 && !region.is_empty()
2765 {
2766 delegated_regions.insert(region.to_string());
2767 }
2768 delegated_count += 1;
2769 }
2770 if let crate::protocol::MissPolicy::ConfirmWithDelegatedAgents {
2771 require_region_diversity,
2772 ..
2773 } = heartbeat.miss_policy
2774 {
2775 let required_delegated =
2776 required_delegated_probe_receipts(heartbeat.miss_policy, required_receipts);
2777 if delegated_count < required_delegated {
2778 bail!(
2779 "confirmation batch for {}:{} requires at least {} delegated receipts",
2780 monitor.monitor_id,
2781 batch.slot_key,
2782 required_delegated
2783 );
2784 }
2785 if delegated_regions.len() < *require_region_diversity {
2786 bail!(
2787 "confirmation batch for {}:{} requires at least {} delegated regions",
2788 monitor.monitor_id,
2789 batch.slot_key,
2790 require_region_diversity
2791 );
2792 }
2793 }
2794 let _ = health_check_cost(&spec)?;
2795 let rewarded = self.select_consensus_health_receipts(&validated)?;
2796 let consensus_success = rewarded
2797 .first()
2798 .map(|receipt| receipt.body.success)
2799 .unwrap_or(false);
2800 Ok((consensus_success, rewarded))
2801 }
2802
2803 fn ensure_slot_budget_reserved(
2804 &mut self,
2805 monitor_id: &str,
2806 slot_key: &str,
2807 proposed_at: DateTime<Utc>,
2808 ) -> Result<()> {
2809 let slot_exists = self
2810 .monitor_slot_history
2811 .get(monitor_id)
2812 .and_then(|slots| slots.get(slot_key))
2813 .is_some();
2814 if slot_exists {
2815 return Ok(());
2816 }
2817 let spec = self
2818 .monitors
2819 .get(monitor_id)
2820 .ok_or_else(|| anyhow!("unknown monitor {monitor_id}"))?
2821 .spec
2822 .clone();
2823 if !spec.is_heartbeat() {
2824 bail!("slot reservation is only supported for heartbeat monitors");
2825 }
2826 self.charge_monitor_budget(monitor_id, MONITOR_SLOT_RESERVATION_FEE);
2827 let current = self
2828 .monitors
2829 .get_mut(monitor_id)
2830 .ok_or_else(|| anyhow!("unknown monitor {monitor_id}"))?;
2831 if current.budget_balance < monitor_minimum_slot_balance(&spec).unwrap_or(u64::MAX) {
2832 current.status = MonitorStatus::InsufficientFunds;
2833 current.updated_at = proposed_at;
2834 }
2835 Ok(())
2836 }
2837
2838 fn charge_monitor_budget(&mut self, monitor_id: &str, amount: u64) -> u64 {
2839 let Some(monitor) = self.monitors.get_mut(monitor_id) else {
2840 return 0;
2841 };
2842 let charged = monitor.budget_balance.min(amount);
2843 monitor.budget_balance -= charged;
2844 charged
2845 }
2846
2847 fn distribute_monitor_confirmation_rewards(
2848 &mut self,
2849 monitor_id: &str,
2850 amount: u64,
2851 rewarded: &[SignedHealthReceipt],
2852 ) {
2853 let charged = self.charge_monitor_budget(monitor_id, amount);
2854 if charged == 0 || rewarded.is_empty() {
2855 return;
2856 }
2857 let reward_per_validator = charged / rewarded.len() as u64;
2858 let distributed = reward_per_validator * rewarded.len() as u64;
2859 let remainder = charged.saturating_sub(distributed);
2860 for receipt in rewarded {
2861 self.accounts
2862 .entry(receipt.body.executor.clone())
2863 .or_default()
2864 .balance += reward_per_validator;
2865 }
2866 self.accounts
2867 .entry(self.treasury.clone())
2868 .or_default()
2869 .balance += remainder;
2870 }
2871
2872 fn add_alert_fact(
2873 &mut self,
2874 monitor_id: &str,
2875 slot_key: &str,
2876 status: MonitorSlotStatus,
2877 created_at: DateTime<Utc>,
2878 notification_policy_id: Option<String>,
2879 ) -> Result<()> {
2880 let id = compute_hash(&(
2881 monitor_id.to_string(),
2882 slot_key.to_string(),
2883 status.clone(),
2884 created_at,
2885 ))?;
2886 self.alert_facts.entry(id.clone()).or_insert(AlertFact {
2887 id,
2888 monitor_id: monitor_id.to_string(),
2889 slot_key: slot_key.to_string(),
2890 status,
2891 created_at,
2892 notification_policy_id,
2893 });
2894 self.charge_monitor_budget(monitor_id, MONITOR_ALERT_DELIVERY_FEE);
2895 Ok(())
2896 }
2897 }
2898
2899 fn monitor_ready_status(
2900 paused: bool,
2901 spec: &crate::protocol::MonitorSpec,
2902 budget_balance: u64,
2903 ) -> MonitorStatus {
2904 if paused {
2905 MonitorStatus::Paused
2906 } else if budget_balance < monitor_minimum_slot_balance(spec).unwrap_or(u64::MAX) {
2907 MonitorStatus::InsufficientFunds
2908 } else {
2909 MonitorStatus::Up
2910 }
2911 }
2912
2913 fn validate_monitor_heartbeat_observation(
2914 monitor: &MonitorRecord,
2915 observation: &SignedHeartbeatObservation,
2916 ) -> Result<()> {
2917 let heartbeat = monitor
2918 .spec
2919 .heartbeat_config()
2920 .ok_or_else(|| anyhow!("monitor {} is not a heartbeat monitor", monitor.monitor_id))?;
2921 if !signal_allowed(heartbeat.signal_policy, observation.body.signal) {
2922 bail!("heartbeat observation uses a disabled signal type");
2923 }
2924 match (heartbeat.ping_auth, observation.body.auth_mode) {
2925 (HeartbeatAuth::SecretUrl { .. }, HeartbeatAuthMode::SecretUrl) => {}
2926 (HeartbeatAuth::Dual { .. }, HeartbeatAuthMode::SecretUrl) => {}
2927 (HeartbeatAuth::DelegatedKey { key_id, public_key }, HeartbeatAuthMode::DelegatedKey)
2928 | (
2929 HeartbeatAuth::Dual {
2930 key_id, public_key, ..
2931 },
2932 HeartbeatAuthMode::DelegatedKey,
2933 ) => {
2934 let client_signature = observation
2935 .body
2936 .client_signature
2937 .as_deref()
2938 .ok_or_else(|| anyhow!("delegated heartbeat is missing client_signature"))?;
2939 let client_timestamp = observation
2940 .body
2941 .client_timestamp
2942 .ok_or_else(|| anyhow!("delegated heartbeat is missing client_timestamp"))?;
2943 let client_nonce = observation
2944 .body
2945 .client_nonce
2946 .as_deref()
2947 .ok_or_else(|| anyhow!("delegated heartbeat is missing client_nonce"))?;
2948 let client_key_id = observation
2949 .body
2950 .client_key_id
2951 .as_deref()
2952 .ok_or_else(|| anyhow!("delegated heartbeat is missing client_key_id"))?;
2953 if client_key_id != key_id {
2954 bail!("delegated heartbeat key_id mismatch");
2955 }
2956 let payload = canonical_heartbeat_client_message(
2957 &observation.body.monitor_id,
2958 observation.body.signal,
2959 client_timestamp,
2960 client_nonce,
2961 observation.body.body_sha256.as_deref(),
2962 )?;
2963 verify_signed_message(public_key, &payload, client_signature)?;
2964 }
2965 _ => bail!("heartbeat auth mode does not match the monitor"),
2966 }
2967 Ok(())
2968 }
2969
2970 fn signal_allowed(policy: &SignalPolicy, signal: HeartbeatSignal) -> bool {
2971 match policy {
2972 SignalPolicy::SuccessOnly => signal == HeartbeatSignal::Success,
2973 SignalPolicy::StartAndSuccess { .. } => {
2974 matches!(signal, HeartbeatSignal::Start | HeartbeatSignal::Success)
2975 }
2976 SignalPolicy::StartSuccessFail { .. } => true,
2977 }
2978 }
2979
2980 fn signal_run_timeout_secs(policy: &SignalPolicy) -> Option<u64> {
2981 match policy {
2982 SignalPolicy::SuccessOnly => None,
2983 SignalPolicy::StartAndSuccess { run_timeout_secs }
2984 | SignalPolicy::StartSuccessFail { run_timeout_secs } => Some(*run_timeout_secs),
2985 }
2986 }
2987
2988 #[derive(Serialize)]
2989 struct ConsensusAssertionView<'a> {
2990 assertion: &'a crate::protocol::ResponseAssertion,
2991 passed: bool,
2992 }
2993
2994 #[derive(Serialize)]
2995 struct ConsensusReceiptView<'a> {
2996 success: bool,
2997 response_status: Option<u16>,
2998 error: Option<String>,
2999 assertion_results: Vec<ConsensusAssertionView<'a>>,
3000 }
3001
3002 #[derive(Serialize)]
3003 struct BrowserConsensusReceiptView<'a> {
3004 success: bool,
3005 failed_step_index: Option<usize>,
3006 outcome_class: &'a BrowserOutcomeClass,
3007 final_url: Option<&'a str>,
3008 error: Option<String>,
3009 }
3010
3011 #[derive(Serialize)]
3012 struct ComputeConsensusReceiptView<'a> {
3013 success: bool,
3014 job_hash: &'a str,
3015 reduced_output: Option<&'a serde_json::Value>,
3016 shard_outputs: Vec<ComputeConsensusShardOutputView<'a>>,
3017 error: Option<String>,
3018 }
3019
3020 #[derive(Serialize)]
3021 struct ComputeConsensusShardOutputView<'a> {
3022 shard_id: &'a str,
3023 success: bool,
3024 output: Option<&'a serde_json::Value>,
3025 error: Option<String>,
3026 artifacts: Vec<ComputeConsensusArtifactView<'a>>,
3027 }
3028
3029 #[derive(Serialize)]
3030 struct ComputeConsensusArtifactView<'a> {
3031 path: &'a str,
3032 size_bytes: u64,
3033 sha256: &'a str,
3034 content_type: Option<&'a str>,
3035 }
3036
3037 #[derive(Serialize)]
3038 struct StorageConsensusReceiptView<'a> {
3039 contract_id: &'a str,
3040 window_start: DateTime<Utc>,
3041 window_end: DateTime<Utc>,
3042 bytes_stored: u64,
3043 merkle_root: &'a str,
3044 challenge_seed: &'a str,
3045 success: bool,
3046 error: Option<String>,
3047 samples: &'a [crate::protocol::StorageProofSample],
3048 }
3049
3050 fn health_outcome_key(receipt: &SignedHealthReceipt) -> Result<String> {
3051 let assertion_results = receipt
3052 .body
3053 .assertion_results
3054 .iter()
3055 .map(|result| ConsensusAssertionView {
3056 assertion: &result.assertion,
3057 passed: result.passed,
3058 })
3059 .collect();
3060 compute_hash(&ConsensusReceiptView {
3061 success: receipt.body.success,
3062 response_status: receipt.body.response_status,
3063 error: normalize_receipt_error(receipt.body.error.as_deref()),
3064 assertion_results,
3065 })
3066 }
3067
3068 fn browser_outcome_key(receipt: &SignedBrowserReceipt) -> Result<String> {
3069 compute_hash(&BrowserConsensusReceiptView {
3070 success: receipt.body.success,
3071 failed_step_index: receipt.body.failed_step_index,
3072 outcome_class: &receipt.body.outcome_class,
3073 final_url: receipt.body.final_url.as_deref(),
3074 error: normalize_receipt_error(receipt.body.error.as_deref()),
3075 })
3076 }
3077
3078 fn compute_outcome_key(receipt: &SignedComputeReceipt) -> Result<String> {
3079 let shard_outputs = receipt
3080 .body
3081 .shard_outputs
3082 .iter()
3083 .map(|output| ComputeConsensusShardOutputView {
3084 shard_id: &output.shard_id,
3085 success: output.success,
3086 output: output.output.as_ref(),
3087 error: normalize_receipt_error(output.error.as_deref()),
3088 artifacts: output
3089 .artifacts
3090 .iter()
3091 .map(|artifact| ComputeConsensusArtifactView {
3092 path: &artifact.path,
3093 size_bytes: artifact.size_bytes,
3094 sha256: &artifact.sha256,
3095 content_type: artifact.content_type.as_deref(),
3096 })
3097 .collect(),
3098 })
3099 .collect();
3100 compute_hash(&ComputeConsensusReceiptView {
3101 success: receipt.body.success,
3102 job_hash: &receipt.body.job_hash,
3103 reduced_output: receipt.body.reduced_output.as_ref(),
3104 shard_outputs,
3105 error: normalize_receipt_error(receipt.body.error.as_deref()),
3106 })
3107 }
3108
3109 fn storage_proof_outcome_key(receipt: &SignedStorageProofReceipt) -> Result<String> {
3110 compute_hash(&StorageConsensusReceiptView {
3111 contract_id: &receipt.body.contract_id,
3112 window_start: receipt.body.window_start,
3113 window_end: receipt.body.window_end,
3114 bytes_stored: receipt.body.bytes_stored,
3115 merkle_root: &receipt.body.merkle_root,
3116 challenge_seed: &receipt.body.challenge_seed,
3117 success: receipt.body.success,
3118 error: normalize_receipt_error(receipt.body.error.as_deref()),
3119 samples: &receipt.body.samples,
3120 })
3121 }
3122
3123 fn normalize_receipt_error(error: Option<&str>) -> Option<String> {
3124 let text = error?.trim().to_ascii_lowercase();
3125 if text.contains("timed out") || text.contains("timeout") {
3126 Some("timeout".into())
3127 } else if text.contains("dns") || text.contains("resolve") {
3128 Some("dns".into())
3129 } else if text.contains("connection") || text.contains("connect") {
3130 Some("connection".into())
3131 } else {
3132 Some(text)
3133 }
3134 }
3135
3136 fn monitor_confirmation_tx_hash(monitor_id: &str, slot_key: &str) -> Result<String> {
3137 compute_hash(&(monitor_id.to_string(), slot_key.to_string(), "confirmation"))
3138 }
3139
3140 fn monitor_confirmation_request_id(monitor_id: &str, slot_key: &str) -> String {
3141 format!("monitor-confirmation:{monitor_id}:{slot_key}")
3142 }
3143
3144 #[cfg(test)]
3145 mod tests {
3146 use super::*;
3147 use crate::{
3148 browser::{
3149 BrowserArtifactPolicy, BrowserEngine, BrowserJourneyPackage, BrowserJourneySpec,
3150 BrowserOutcomeClass, BrowserReceiptBody, BrowserRuntimeProfile, SessionCachePolicy,
3151 SignedBrowserReceipt,
3152 },
3153 compute::{
3154 ComputeIntegerOperation, ComputeReceiptBody, ComputeReducer, ComputeShardInput,
3155 ComputeShardOutput, ComputeShardSpec, ComputeWorkload,
3156 },
3157 protocol::{
3158 BlockApprovalBody, GenesisConfig, HEALTH_CHECK_BASE_COST, HealthCheckSpec,
3159 HealthHttpMethod, HeartbeatAuth, HeartbeatAuthMode, HeartbeatObservationBody,
3160 HeartbeatSignal, MICRO_CT, MICRO_DNS, MICRO_ST, MissPolicy, MonitorEvaluation,
3161 MonitorEvaluationKind, MonitorPathway, MonitorSpec, ProbeFanoutPolicy,
3162 STORAGE_BILLING_QUANTUM_BYTES, ScheduleSpec, SettlementAsset, SignalPolicy,
3163 SignedBlock, SignedBlockApproval, SignedDelegatedProbeReceipt, SignedHealthReceipt,
3164 SignedHeartbeatObservation, SignedStorageProofReceipt, SignedSwapQuote,
3165 SignedTransaction, StorageContractSpec, StorageMode, StorageProofBatch,
3166 StorageProofReceiptBody, StorageProofSample, SwapQuote, SwapSide, TransactionBody,
3167 TransactionKind, new_request_id, storage_challenge_indices, storage_challenge_seed,
3168 storage_chunk_count,
3169 },
3170 wallet::Wallet,
3171 };
3172
3173 fn test_genesis(
3174 validators: &[Address],
3175 treasury: Address,
3176 requester: Address,
3177 ) -> GenesisConfig {
3178 let mut airdrops = BTreeMap::new();
3179 airdrops.insert(requester, HEALTH_CHECK_BASE_COST * 4);
3180 GenesisConfig {
3181 chain_id: "testnet".into(),
3182 treasury,
3183 validators: validators.to_vec(),
3184 chain_started_at: Utc::now(),
3185 block_time_secs: 3,
3186 min_health_receipts: 2,
3187 airdrops,
3188 storage_airdrops: BTreeMap::new(),
3189 compute_airdrops: BTreeMap::new(),
3190 dns_airdrops: BTreeMap::new(),
3191 }
3192 }
3193
3194 fn sample_compute_job_spec() -> ComputeJobSpec {
3195 ComputeJobSpec {
3196 request_id: "compute-job-1".into(),
3197 workload: ComputeWorkload::IntegerMap {
3198 operation: ComputeIntegerOperation::Sum,
3199 },
3200 shards: vec![
3201 ComputeShardSpec {
3202 shard_id: "s1".into(),
3203 input: ComputeShardInput::Integers { values: vec![1, 2] },
3204 },
3205 ComputeShardSpec {
3206 shard_id: "s2".into(),
3207 input: ComputeShardInput::Integers { values: vec![3, 4] },
3208 },
3209 ],
3210 reducer: ComputeReducer::Sum,
3211 max_runtime_secs: crate::compute::default_compute_runtime_secs(),
3212 replication: 1,
3213 sandbox: crate::compute::default_compute_sandbox_policy(),
3214 artifact_policy: crate::compute::default_compute_artifact_policy(),
3215 }
3216 }
3217
3218 fn approval_for(wallet: &Wallet, block: &SignedBlock) -> SignedBlockApproval {
3219 wallet
3220 .sign_block_approval(SignedBlockApproval {
3221 id: String::new(),
3222 body: BlockApprovalBody {
3223 chain_id: block.body.chain_id.clone(),
3224 height: block.body.height,
3225 view: block.body.view,
3226 previous_hash: block.body.previous_hash.clone(),
3227 block_hash: block.hash.clone(),
3228 approver: String::new(),
3229 approved_at: Utc::now(),
3230 },
3231 signature: String::new(),
3232 })
3233 .unwrap()
3234 }
3235
3236 fn signed_sell_quote(
3237 quoting_validator: &Wallet,
3238 wallet: Address,
3239 token_amount: u64,
3240 expires_at: DateTime<Utc>,
3241 ) -> SignedSwapQuote {
3242 quoting_validator
3243 .sign_swap_quote(SignedSwapQuote {
3244 quote: SwapQuote {
3245 chain_id: "testnet".into(),
3246 quote_id: format!("quote-{}", new_request_id()),
3247 wallet,
3248 adapter: "fixed-usdc-demo".into(),
3249 side: SwapSide::Sell,
3250 settlement_asset: SettlementAsset::Usdc,
3251 token_amount,
3252 settlement_amount: token_amount,
3253 settlement_decimals: 6,
3254 expires_at,
3255 notes: vec!["demo".into()],
3256 },
3257 quoted_by: String::new(),
3258 quoted_at: Utc::now(),
3259 signature: String::new(),
3260 })
3261 .unwrap()
3262 }
3263
3264 fn sample_monitor_spec(monitor_id: &str, anchor_at: DateTime<Utc>) -> MonitorSpec {
3265 MonitorSpec {
3266 monitor_id: monitor_id.into(),
3267 slug: Some(monitor_id.into()),
3268 schedule: ScheduleSpec::Interval {
3269 every_secs: 60,
3270 anchor_at,
3271 },
3272 grace_secs: 10,
3273 pathway: MonitorPathway::Heartbeat {
3274 ping_auth: HeartbeatAuth::SecretUrl {
3275 token_hash: crate::protocol::hash_secret_token("secret").unwrap(),
3276 },
3277 signal_policy: SignalPolicy::SuccessOnly,
3278 miss_policy: MissPolicy::ConfirmWithValidators {
3279 fanout: ProbeFanoutPolicy::OnePerValidator,
3280 },
3281 confirmation_probe: Some(HealthCheckSpec {
3282 request_id: format!("probe-{monitor_id}"),
3283 url: "https://example.com/health".into(),
3284 method: HealthHttpMethod::Get,
3285 headers: BTreeMap::new(),
3286 query: BTreeMap::new(),
3287 timeout_ms: 1_000,
3288 expected_status: Some(200),
3289 assertions: Vec::new(),
3290 body_json: None,
3291 allow_insecure_http: false,
3292 allow_private_targets: false,
3293 }),
3294 },
3295 notification_policy_id: Some("ops-webhook".into()),
3296 log_capture: crate::protocol::LogCapturePolicy::None,
3297 tags: BTreeMap::new(),
3298 }
3299 }
3300
3301 fn sample_browser_package(owner: &str, approved_by: &str) -> BrowserJourneyPackage {
3302 BrowserJourneyPackage {
3303 package_id: "browser-package-1".into(),
3304 owner: owner.into(),
3305 manifest_version: 1,
3306 runtime: BrowserRuntimeProfile {
3307 engine: BrowserEngine::Chromium,
3308 engine_version: "playwright@1.54.0".into(),
3309 locale: "en-US".into(),
3310 timezone: "UTC".into(),
3311 viewport_width: 1440,
3312 viewport_height: 900,
3313 color_scheme: "light".into(),
3314 block_service_workers: true,
3315 cache_mode: Default::default(),
3316 },
3317 journey: BrowserJourneySpec {
3318 journey_id: "smoke-login".into(),
3319 entry_url: "https://example.com/login".into(),
3320 steps: vec![
3321 crate::browser::BrowserStep::Navigate {
3322 url: "https://example.com/login".into(),
3323 },
3324 crate::browser::BrowserStep::AssertUrlContains {
3325 text: "/login".into(),
3326 },
3327 ],
3328 max_runtime_secs: 30,
3329 per_step_timeout_ms: 5_000,
3330 },
3331 artifact_policy: BrowserArtifactPolicy {
3332 capture_video: false,
3333 capture_trace: false,
3334 capture_screenshot_on_failure: true,
3335 },
3336 session_cache: SessionCachePolicy {
3337 enabled: false,
3338 namespace: None,
3339 max_age_secs: 0,
3340 },
3341 approved_at: Utc::now(),
3342 approved_by: approved_by.into(),
3343 tags: BTreeMap::new(),
3344 }
3345 }
3346
3347 fn sample_browser_monitor_spec(
3348 monitor_id: &str,
3349 anchor_at: DateTime<Utc>,
3350 owner: &str,
3351 approved_by: &str,
3352 ) -> MonitorSpec {
3353 MonitorSpec {
3354 monitor_id: monitor_id.into(),
3355 slug: Some(format!("{monitor_id}-browser")),
3356 schedule: ScheduleSpec::Interval {
3357 every_secs: 60,
3358 anchor_at,
3359 },
3360 grace_secs: 15,
3361 pathway: MonitorPathway::Browser {
3362 package: sample_browser_package(owner, approved_by),
3363 },
3364 notification_policy_id: Some("browser-webhook".into()),
3365 log_capture: crate::protocol::LogCapturePolicy::None,
3366 tags: BTreeMap::new(),
3367 }
3368 }
3369
3370 #[test]
3371 fn health_check_cost_is_distributed_to_validators() {
3372 let requester = Wallet::generate();
3373 let validator_a = Wallet::generate();
3374 let validator_b = Wallet::generate();
3375 let treasury = validator_a.address();
3376
3377 let genesis = test_genesis(
3378 &[validator_a.address(), validator_b.address()],
3379 treasury.clone(),
3380 requester.address(),
3381 );
3382 let mut state = ChainState::from_genesis(&genesis).unwrap();
3383
3384 let tx = requester
3385 .sign_transaction(SignedTransaction {
3386 hash: String::new(),
3387 signer: String::new(),
3388 body: TransactionBody {
3389 chain_id: "testnet".into(),
3390 nonce: 1,
3391 created_at: Utc::now(),
3392 kind: TransactionKind::HealthCheck {
3393 spec: HealthCheckSpec {
3394 request_id: "job-1".into(),
3395 url: "https://example.com/health".into(),
3396 method: HealthHttpMethod::Get,
3397 headers: BTreeMap::new(),
3398 query: BTreeMap::new(),
3399 timeout_ms: 1_000,
3400 expected_status: Some(200),
3401 assertions: Vec::new(),
3402 body_json: None,
3403 allow_insecure_http: false,
3404 allow_private_targets: false,
3405 },
3406 },
3407 },
3408 signature: String::new(),
3409 })
3410 .unwrap();
3411
3412 let receipt_a = validator_a
3413 .sign_receipt(SignedHealthReceipt {
3414 id: String::new(),
3415 body: crate::protocol::HealthReceiptBody {
3416 chain_id: "testnet".into(),
3417 tx_hash: tx.hash.clone(),
3418 request_id: "job-1".into(),
3419 executor: String::new(),
3420 observed_at: Utc::now(),
3421 response_status: Some(200),
3422 latency_ms: 10,
3423 success: true,
3424 assertion_results: Vec::new(),
3425 response_headers: BTreeMap::new(),
3426 response_body_sample: None,
3427 error: None,
3428 },
3429 signature: String::new(),
3430 })
3431 .unwrap();
3432 let receipt_b = validator_b
3433 .sign_receipt(SignedHealthReceipt {
3434 id: String::new(),
3435 body: crate::protocol::HealthReceiptBody {
3436 chain_id: "testnet".into(),
3437 tx_hash: tx.hash.clone(),
3438 request_id: "job-1".into(),
3439 executor: String::new(),
3440 observed_at: Utc::now(),
3441 response_status: Some(200),
3442 latency_ms: 12,
3443 success: true,
3444 assertion_results: Vec::new(),
3445 response_headers: BTreeMap::new(),
3446 response_body_sample: None,
3447 error: None,
3448 },
3449 signature: String::new(),
3450 })
3451 .unwrap();
3452
3453 let block = validator_a
3454 .sign_block(SignedBlock {
3455 hash: String::new(),
3456 body: BlockBody {
3457 chain_id: "testnet".into(),
3458 height: 1,
3459 view: 0,
3460 previous_hash: "genesis".into(),
3461 proposer: String::new(),
3462 proposed_at: Utc::now(),
3463 transactions: vec![tx],
3464 health_batches: vec![BlockHealthBatch {
3465 tx_hash: receipt_a.body.tx_hash.clone(),
3466 receipts: vec![receipt_a.clone(), receipt_b.clone()],
3467 }],
3468 browser_batches: Vec::new(),
3469 compute_batches: Vec::new(),
3470 monitor_browser_batches: Vec::new(),
3471 heartbeat_observations: Vec::new(),
3472 monitor_evaluations: Vec::new(),
3473 confirmation_batches: Vec::new(),
3474 storage_proof_batches: Vec::new(),
3475 },
3476 signature: String::new(),
3477 approvals: Vec::new(),
3478 })
3479 .unwrap();
3480 let mut block = block;
3481 block.approvals = vec![
3482 approval_for(&validator_a, &block),
3483 approval_for(&validator_b, &block),
3484 ];
3485
3486 state.apply_block(&block).unwrap();
3487
3488 let requester_balance = state.account(&requester.address()).balance;
3489 assert_eq!(requester_balance, HEALTH_CHECK_BASE_COST * 3);
3490
3491 let reward = HEALTH_CHECK_BASE_COST / 2;
3492 assert_eq!(state.account(&validator_b.address()).balance, reward);
3493 assert!(
3494 state
3495 .finalized_health_checks
3496 .contains_key(&receipt_a.body.tx_hash)
3497 );
3498 assert_eq!(state.height, 1);
3499 }
3500
3501 #[test]
3502 fn compute_transfer_moves_compute_tokens_only() {
3503 let sender = Wallet::generate();
3504 let recipient = Wallet::generate();
3505 let validator_a = Wallet::generate();
3506 let validator_b = Wallet::generate();
3507 let treasury = validator_a.address();
3508
3509 let mut genesis = test_genesis(
3510 &[validator_a.address(), validator_b.address()],
3511 treasury,
3512 sender.address(),
3513 );
3514 genesis
3515 .compute_airdrops
3516 .insert(sender.address(), MICRO_CT * 5);
3517 let mut state = ChainState::from_genesis(&genesis).unwrap();
3518
3519 let tx = sender
3520 .sign_transaction(SignedTransaction {
3521 hash: String::new(),
3522 signer: String::new(),
3523 body: TransactionBody {
3524 chain_id: "testnet".into(),
3525 nonce: 1,
3526 created_at: Utc::now(),
3527 kind: TransactionKind::ComputeTransfer {
3528 to: recipient.address(),
3529 amount: MICRO_CT * 2,
3530 },
3531 },
3532 signature: String::new(),
3533 })
3534 .unwrap();
3535
3536 let block = validator_a
3537 .sign_block(SignedBlock {
3538 hash: String::new(),
3539 body: BlockBody {
3540 chain_id: "testnet".into(),
3541 height: 1,
3542 view: 0,
3543 previous_hash: "genesis".into(),
3544 proposer: String::new(),
3545 proposed_at: Utc::now(),
3546 transactions: vec![tx],
3547 health_batches: Vec::new(),
3548 browser_batches: Vec::new(),
3549 compute_batches: Vec::new(),
3550 monitor_browser_batches: Vec::new(),
3551 heartbeat_observations: Vec::new(),
3552 monitor_evaluations: Vec::new(),
3553 confirmation_batches: Vec::new(),
3554 storage_proof_batches: Vec::new(),
3555 },
3556 signature: String::new(),
3557 approvals: Vec::new(),
3558 })
3559 .unwrap();
3560 let mut block = block;
3561 block.approvals = vec![
3562 approval_for(&validator_a, &block),
3563 approval_for(&validator_b, &block),
3564 ];
3565
3566 state.apply_block(&block).unwrap();
3567
3568 assert_eq!(
3569 state.account(&sender.address()).compute_balance,
3570 MICRO_CT * 3
3571 );
3572 assert_eq!(
3573 state.account(&recipient.address()).compute_balance,
3574 MICRO_CT * 2
3575 );
3576 assert_eq!(
3577 state.account(&sender.address()).balance,
3578 HEALTH_CHECK_BASE_COST * 4
3579 );
3580 assert_eq!(state.account(&sender.address()).nonce, 1);
3581 }
3582
3583 #[test]
3584 fn compute_job_spends_compute_tokens_and_rewards_validators() {
3585 let requester = Wallet::generate();
3586 let validator_a = Wallet::generate();
3587 let validator_b = Wallet::generate();
3588 let treasury = validator_a.address();
3589
3590 let mut genesis = test_genesis(
3591 &[validator_a.address(), validator_b.address()],
3592 treasury,
3593 requester.address(),
3594 );
3595 genesis
3596 .compute_airdrops
3597 .insert(requester.address(), MICRO_CT * 10);
3598 let mut state = ChainState::from_genesis(&genesis).unwrap();
3599 let spec = sample_compute_job_spec();
3600 let request_cost = state.compute_request_cost(&spec).unwrap();
3601
3602 let tx = requester
3603 .sign_transaction(SignedTransaction {
3604 hash: String::new(),
3605 signer: String::new(),
3606 body: TransactionBody {
3607 chain_id: "testnet".into(),
3608 nonce: 1,
3609 created_at: Utc::now(),
3610 kind: TransactionKind::ComputeJob { spec: spec.clone() },
3611 },
3612 signature: String::new(),
3613 })
3614 .unwrap();
3615
3616 let shard_outputs = vec![
3617 ComputeShardOutput {
3618 shard_id: "s1".into(),
3619 success: true,
3620 latency_ms: 5,
3621 output: Some(serde_json::json!({ "sum": 3, "count": 2 })),
3622 error: None,
3623 artifacts: Vec::new(),
3624 stdout_sample: None,
3625 stderr_sample: None,
3626 },
3627 ComputeShardOutput {
3628 shard_id: "s2".into(),
3629 success: true,
3630 latency_ms: 6,
3631 output: Some(serde_json::json!({ "sum": 7, "count": 2 })),
3632 error: None,
3633 artifacts: Vec::new(),
3634 stdout_sample: None,
3635 stderr_sample: None,
3636 },
3637 ];
3638 let reduced_output = serde_json::json!({ "sum": 10 });
3639 let job_hash = compute_job_hash(&spec).unwrap();
3640 let receipt_a = validator_a
3641 .sign_compute_receipt(SignedComputeReceipt {
3642 id: String::new(),
3643 body: ComputeReceiptBody {
3644 chain_id: "testnet".into(),
3645 tx_hash: tx.hash.clone(),
3646 request_id: spec.request_id.clone(),
3647 executor: String::new(),
3648 observed_at: Utc::now(),
3649 job_hash: job_hash.clone(),
3650 assigned_agents: BTreeMap::new(),
3651 shard_outputs: shard_outputs.clone(),
3652 reduced_output: Some(reduced_output.clone()),
3653 latency_ms: 11,
3654 success: true,
3655 error: None,
3656 },
3657 signature: String::new(),
3658 })
3659 .unwrap();
3660 let receipt_b = validator_b
3661 .sign_compute_receipt(SignedComputeReceipt {
3662 id: String::new(),
3663 body: ComputeReceiptBody {
3664 chain_id: "testnet".into(),
3665 tx_hash: tx.hash.clone(),
3666 request_id: spec.request_id.clone(),
3667 executor: String::new(),
3668 observed_at: Utc::now(),
3669 job_hash,
3670 assigned_agents: BTreeMap::new(),
3671 shard_outputs,
3672 reduced_output: Some(reduced_output.clone()),
3673 latency_ms: 12,
3674 success: true,
3675 error: None,
3676 },
3677 signature: String::new(),
3678 })
3679 .unwrap();
3680
3681 let block = validator_a
3682 .sign_block(SignedBlock {
3683 hash: String::new(),
3684 body: BlockBody {
3685 chain_id: "testnet".into(),
3686 height: 1,
3687 view: 0,
3688 previous_hash: "genesis".into(),
3689 proposer: String::new(),
3690 proposed_at: Utc::now(),
3691 transactions: vec![tx.clone()],
3692 health_batches: Vec::new(),
3693 browser_batches: Vec::new(),
3694 compute_batches: vec![BlockComputeBatch {
3695 tx_hash: tx.hash.clone(),
3696 receipts: vec![receipt_a.clone(), receipt_b.clone()],
3697 }],
3698 monitor_browser_batches: Vec::new(),
3699 heartbeat_observations: Vec::new(),
3700 monitor_evaluations: Vec::new(),
3701 confirmation_batches: Vec::new(),
3702 storage_proof_batches: Vec::new(),
3703 },
3704 signature: String::new(),
3705 approvals: Vec::new(),
3706 })
3707 .unwrap();
3708 let mut block = block;
3709 block.approvals = vec![
3710 approval_for(&validator_a, &block),
3711 approval_for(&validator_b, &block),
3712 ];
3713
3714 state.apply_block(&block).unwrap();
3715
3716 let reward = request_cost / 2;
3717 assert_eq!(
3718 state.account(&requester.address()).compute_balance,
3719 MICRO_CT * 10 - request_cost
3720 );
3721 assert_eq!(
3722 state.account(&validator_a.address()).compute_balance,
3723 reward
3724 );
3725 assert_eq!(
3726 state.account(&validator_b.address()).compute_balance,
3727 reward
3728 );
3729 let record = state.finalized_compute_jobs.get(&tx.hash).unwrap();
3730 assert_eq!(record.requester_cost, request_cost);
3731 assert_eq!(record.reduced_output, Some(reduced_output));
3732 assert!(state.finalized_compute_job_ids.contains(&tx.hash));
3733 }
3734
3735 #[test]
3736 fn genesis_rejects_receipt_threshold_above_validator_count() {
3737 let validator_a = Wallet::generate();
3738 let validator_b = Wallet::generate();
3739 let requester = Wallet::generate();
3740
3741 let genesis = GenesisConfig {
3742 chain_id: "testnet".into(),
3743 treasury: validator_a.address(),
3744 validators: vec![validator_a.address(), validator_b.address()],
3745 chain_started_at: Utc::now(),
3746 block_time_secs: 3,
3747 min_health_receipts: 3,
3748 airdrops: BTreeMap::from([(requester.address(), HEALTH_CHECK_BASE_COST)]),
3749 storage_airdrops: BTreeMap::new(),
3750 compute_airdrops: BTreeMap::new(),
3751 dns_airdrops: BTreeMap::new(),
3752 };
3753
3754 assert!(ChainState::from_genesis(&genesis).is_err());
3755 }
3756
3757 #[test]
3758 fn receipt_request_id_must_match_health_check_request() {
3759 let requester = Wallet::generate();
3760 let validator_a = Wallet::generate();
3761 let validator_b = Wallet::generate();
3762 let treasury = validator_a.address();
3763
3764 let genesis = test_genesis(
3765 &[validator_a.address(), validator_b.address()],
3766 treasury.clone(),
3767 requester.address(),
3768 );
3769 let mut state = ChainState::from_genesis(&genesis).unwrap();
3770
3771 let tx = requester
3772 .sign_transaction(SignedTransaction {
3773 hash: String::new(),
3774 signer: String::new(),
3775 body: TransactionBody {
3776 chain_id: "testnet".into(),
3777 nonce: 1,
3778 created_at: Utc::now(),
3779 kind: TransactionKind::HealthCheck {
3780 spec: HealthCheckSpec {
3781 request_id: "expected-request".into(),
3782 url: "https://example.com/health".into(),
3783 method: HealthHttpMethod::Get,
3784 headers: BTreeMap::new(),
3785 query: BTreeMap::new(),
3786 timeout_ms: 1_000,
3787 expected_status: Some(200),
3788 assertions: Vec::new(),
3789 body_json: None,
3790 allow_insecure_http: false,
3791 allow_private_targets: false,
3792 },
3793 },
3794 },
3795 signature: String::new(),
3796 })
3797 .unwrap();
3798
3799 let bad_receipt = validator_a
3800 .sign_receipt(SignedHealthReceipt {
3801 id: String::new(),
3802 body: crate::protocol::HealthReceiptBody {
3803 chain_id: "testnet".into(),
3804 tx_hash: tx.hash.clone(),
3805 request_id: "different-request".into(),
3806 executor: String::new(),
3807 observed_at: Utc::now(),
3808 response_status: Some(200),
3809 latency_ms: 5,
3810 success: true,
3811 assertion_results: Vec::new(),
3812 response_headers: BTreeMap::new(),
3813 response_body_sample: None,
3814 error: None,
3815 },
3816 signature: String::new(),
3817 })
3818 .unwrap();
3819 let good_receipt = validator_b
3820 .sign_receipt(SignedHealthReceipt {
3821 id: String::new(),
3822 body: crate::protocol::HealthReceiptBody {
3823 chain_id: "testnet".into(),
3824 tx_hash: tx.hash.clone(),
3825 request_id: "expected-request".into(),
3826 executor: String::new(),
3827 observed_at: Utc::now(),
3828 response_status: Some(200),
3829 latency_ms: 6,
3830 success: true,
3831 assertion_results: Vec::new(),
3832 response_headers: BTreeMap::new(),
3833 response_body_sample: None,
3834 error: None,
3835 },
3836 signature: String::new(),
3837 })
3838 .unwrap();
3839
3840 let block = validator_a
3841 .sign_block(SignedBlock {
3842 hash: String::new(),
3843 body: BlockBody {
3844 chain_id: "testnet".into(),
3845 height: 1,
3846 view: 0,
3847 previous_hash: "genesis".into(),
3848 proposer: String::new(),
3849 proposed_at: Utc::now(),
3850 transactions: vec![tx],
3851 health_batches: vec![BlockHealthBatch {
3852 tx_hash: bad_receipt.body.tx_hash.clone(),
3853 receipts: vec![bad_receipt, good_receipt],
3854 }],
3855 browser_batches: Vec::new(),
3856 compute_batches: Vec::new(),
3857 monitor_browser_batches: Vec::new(),
3858 heartbeat_observations: Vec::new(),
3859 monitor_evaluations: Vec::new(),
3860 confirmation_batches: Vec::new(),
3861 storage_proof_batches: Vec::new(),
3862 },
3863 signature: String::new(),
3864 approvals: Vec::new(),
3865 })
3866 .unwrap();
3867 let mut block = block;
3868 block.approvals = vec![
3869 approval_for(&validator_a, &block),
3870 approval_for(&validator_b, &block),
3871 ];
3872
3873 assert!(state.apply_block(&block).is_err());
3874 }
3875
3876 #[test]
3877 fn health_check_rewards_only_majority_consensus_validators() {
3878 let requester = Wallet::generate();
3879 let validator_a = Wallet::generate();
3880 let validator_b = Wallet::generate();
3881 let validator_c = Wallet::generate();
3882 let treasury = validator_a.address();
3883
3884 let mut genesis = test_genesis(
3885 &[
3886 validator_a.address(),
3887 validator_b.address(),
3888 validator_c.address(),
3889 ],
3890 treasury,
3891 requester.address(),
3892 );
3893 genesis.min_health_receipts = 3;
3894 let mut state = ChainState::from_genesis(&genesis).unwrap();
3895
3896 let tx = requester
3897 .sign_transaction(SignedTransaction {
3898 hash: String::new(),
3899 signer: String::new(),
3900 body: TransactionBody {
3901 chain_id: "testnet".into(),
3902 nonce: 1,
3903 created_at: Utc::now(),
3904 kind: TransactionKind::HealthCheck {
3905 spec: HealthCheckSpec {
3906 request_id: "job-majority".into(),
3907 url: "https://example.com/health".into(),
3908 method: HealthHttpMethod::Get,
3909 headers: BTreeMap::new(),
3910 query: BTreeMap::new(),
3911 timeout_ms: 1_000,
3912 expected_status: Some(200),
3913 assertions: Vec::new(),
3914 body_json: None,
3915 allow_insecure_http: false,
3916 allow_private_targets: false,
3917 },
3918 },
3919 },
3920 signature: String::new(),
3921 })
3922 .unwrap();
3923
3924 let success_receipt_a = validator_a
3925 .sign_receipt(SignedHealthReceipt {
3926 id: String::new(),
3927 body: crate::protocol::HealthReceiptBody {
3928 chain_id: "testnet".into(),
3929 tx_hash: tx.hash.clone(),
3930 request_id: "job-majority".into(),
3931 executor: String::new(),
3932 observed_at: Utc::now(),
3933 response_status: Some(200),
3934 latency_ms: 10,
3935 success: true,
3936 assertion_results: Vec::new(),
3937 response_headers: BTreeMap::new(),
3938 response_body_sample: None,
3939 error: None,
3940 },
3941 signature: String::new(),
3942 })
3943 .unwrap();
3944 let success_receipt_b = validator_b
3945 .sign_receipt(SignedHealthReceipt {
3946 id: String::new(),
3947 body: crate::protocol::HealthReceiptBody {
3948 chain_id: "testnet".into(),
3949 tx_hash: tx.hash.clone(),
3950 request_id: "job-majority".into(),
3951 executor: String::new(),
3952 observed_at: Utc::now(),
3953 response_status: Some(200),
3954 latency_ms: 11,
3955 success: true,
3956 assertion_results: Vec::new(),
3957 response_headers: BTreeMap::new(),
3958 response_body_sample: None,
3959 error: None,
3960 },
3961 signature: String::new(),
3962 })
3963 .unwrap();
3964 let failure_receipt_c = validator_c
3965 .sign_receipt(SignedHealthReceipt {
3966 id: String::new(),
3967 body: crate::protocol::HealthReceiptBody {
3968 chain_id: "testnet".into(),
3969 tx_hash: tx.hash.clone(),
3970 request_id: "job-majority".into(),
3971 executor: String::new(),
3972 observed_at: Utc::now(),
3973 response_status: Some(503),
3974 latency_ms: 12,
3975 success: false,
3976 assertion_results: Vec::new(),
3977 response_headers: BTreeMap::new(),
3978 response_body_sample: None,
3979 error: None,
3980 },
3981 signature: String::new(),
3982 })
3983 .unwrap();
3984
3985 let block = validator_a
3986 .sign_block(SignedBlock {
3987 hash: String::new(),
3988 body: BlockBody {
3989 chain_id: "testnet".into(),
3990 height: 1,
3991 view: 0,
3992 previous_hash: "genesis".into(),
3993 proposer: String::new(),
3994 proposed_at: Utc::now(),
3995 transactions: vec![tx.clone()],
3996 health_batches: vec![BlockHealthBatch {
3997 tx_hash: tx.hash.clone(),
3998 receipts: vec![
3999 success_receipt_a.clone(),
4000 success_receipt_b.clone(),
4001 failure_receipt_c.clone(),
4002 ],
4003 }],
4004 browser_batches: Vec::new(),
4005 compute_batches: Vec::new(),
4006 monitor_browser_batches: Vec::new(),
4007 heartbeat_observations: Vec::new(),
4008 monitor_evaluations: Vec::new(),
4009 confirmation_batches: Vec::new(),
4010 storage_proof_batches: Vec::new(),
4011 },
4012 signature: String::new(),
4013 approvals: Vec::new(),
4014 })
4015 .unwrap();
4016 let mut block = block;
4017 block.approvals = vec![
4018 approval_for(&validator_a, &block),
4019 approval_for(&validator_b, &block),
4020 ];
4021
4022 state.apply_block(&block).unwrap();
4023
4024 assert_eq!(
4025 state.account(&requester.address()).balance,
4026 HEALTH_CHECK_BASE_COST * 3
4027 );
4028 assert_eq!(
4029 state.account(&validator_a.address()).balance,
4030 HEALTH_CHECK_BASE_COST / 2
4031 );
4032 assert_eq!(
4033 state.account(&validator_b.address()).balance,
4034 HEALTH_CHECK_BASE_COST / 2
4035 );
4036 assert_eq!(state.account(&validator_c.address()).balance, 0);
4037
4038 let finalized = state.finalized_health_checks.get(&tx.hash).unwrap();
4039 assert_eq!(finalized.receipts.len(), 3);
4040 assert_eq!(finalized.rewarded_receipts.len(), 2);
4041 assert!(finalized.consensus_success);
4042 assert_eq!(finalized.success_count, 2);
4043 assert_eq!(finalized.failure_count, 0);
4044 assert_eq!(finalized.divergent_count, 1);
4045 }
4046
4047 #[test]
4048 fn split_receipts_fail_without_majority_consensus() {
4049 let requester = Wallet::generate();
4050 let validator_a = Wallet::generate();
4051 let validator_b = Wallet::generate();
4052 let treasury = validator_a.address();
4053
4054 let genesis = test_genesis(
4055 &[validator_a.address(), validator_b.address()],
4056 treasury,
4057 requester.address(),
4058 );
4059 let mut state = ChainState::from_genesis(&genesis).unwrap();
4060
4061 let tx = requester
4062 .sign_transaction(SignedTransaction {
4063 hash: String::new(),
4064 signer: String::new(),
4065 body: TransactionBody {
4066 chain_id: "testnet".into(),
4067 nonce: 1,
4068 created_at: Utc::now(),
4069 kind: TransactionKind::HealthCheck {
4070 spec: HealthCheckSpec {
4071 request_id: "job-split".into(),
4072 url: "https://example.com/health".into(),
4073 method: HealthHttpMethod::Get,
4074 headers: BTreeMap::new(),
4075 query: BTreeMap::new(),
4076 timeout_ms: 1_000,
4077 expected_status: Some(200),
4078 assertions: Vec::new(),
4079 body_json: None,
4080 allow_insecure_http: false,
4081 allow_private_targets: false,
4082 },
4083 },
4084 },
4085 signature: String::new(),
4086 })
4087 .unwrap();
4088
4089 let success_receipt = validator_a
4090 .sign_receipt(SignedHealthReceipt {
4091 id: String::new(),
4092 body: crate::protocol::HealthReceiptBody {
4093 chain_id: "testnet".into(),
4094 tx_hash: tx.hash.clone(),
4095 request_id: "job-split".into(),
4096 executor: String::new(),
4097 observed_at: Utc::now(),
4098 response_status: Some(200),
4099 latency_ms: 10,
4100 success: true,
4101 assertion_results: Vec::new(),
4102 response_headers: BTreeMap::new(),
4103 response_body_sample: None,
4104 error: None,
4105 },
4106 signature: String::new(),
4107 })
4108 .unwrap();
4109 let failure_receipt = validator_b
4110 .sign_receipt(SignedHealthReceipt {
4111 id: String::new(),
4112 body: crate::protocol::HealthReceiptBody {
4113 chain_id: "testnet".into(),
4114 tx_hash: tx.hash.clone(),
4115 request_id: "job-split".into(),
4116 executor: String::new(),
4117 observed_at: Utc::now(),
4118 response_status: Some(503),
4119 latency_ms: 11,
4120 success: false,
4121 assertion_results: Vec::new(),
4122 response_headers: BTreeMap::new(),
4123 response_body_sample: None,
4124 error: None,
4125 },
4126 signature: String::new(),
4127 })
4128 .unwrap();
4129
4130 let block = validator_a
4131 .sign_block(SignedBlock {
4132 hash: String::new(),
4133 body: BlockBody {
4134 chain_id: "testnet".into(),
4135 height: 1,
4136 view: 0,
4137 previous_hash: "genesis".into(),
4138 proposer: String::new(),
4139 proposed_at: Utc::now(),
4140 transactions: vec![tx.clone()],
4141 health_batches: vec![BlockHealthBatch {
4142 tx_hash: tx.hash.clone(),
4143 receipts: vec![success_receipt, failure_receipt],
4144 }],
4145 browser_batches: Vec::new(),
4146 compute_batches: Vec::new(),
4147 monitor_browser_batches: Vec::new(),
4148 heartbeat_observations: Vec::new(),
4149 monitor_evaluations: Vec::new(),
4150 confirmation_batches: Vec::new(),
4151 storage_proof_batches: Vec::new(),
4152 },
4153 signature: String::new(),
4154 approvals: Vec::new(),
4155 })
4156 .unwrap();
4157 let mut block = block;
4158 block.approvals = vec![
4159 approval_for(&validator_a, &block),
4160 approval_for(&validator_b, &block),
4161 ];
4162
4163 assert!(state.apply_block(&block).is_err());
4164 }
4165
4166 #[test]
4167 fn swap_lock_and_settlement_move_ht_via_locked_balance() {
4168 let requester = Wallet::generate();
4169 let validator_a = Wallet::generate();
4170 let validator_b = Wallet::generate();
4171 let treasury = validator_a.address();
4172
4173 let genesis = test_genesis(
4174 &[validator_a.address(), validator_b.address()],
4175 treasury.clone(),
4176 requester.address(),
4177 );
4178 let mut state = ChainState::from_genesis(&genesis).unwrap();
4179 let quote = signed_sell_quote(
4180 &validator_a,
4181 requester.address(),
4182 2 * HEALTH_CHECK_BASE_COST,
4183 Utc::now() + chrono::Duration::seconds(30),
4184 );
4185
4186 let lock_tx = requester
4187 .sign_transaction(SignedTransaction {
4188 hash: String::new(),
4189 signer: String::new(),
4190 body: TransactionBody {
4191 chain_id: "testnet".into(),
4192 nonce: 1,
4193 created_at: Utc::now(),
4194 kind: TransactionKind::SwapLock {
4195 quote: quote.clone(),
4196 },
4197 },
4198 signature: String::new(),
4199 })
4200 .unwrap();
4201 let lock_block = validator_a
4202 .sign_block(SignedBlock {
4203 hash: String::new(),
4204 body: BlockBody {
4205 chain_id: "testnet".into(),
4206 height: 1,
4207 view: 0,
4208 previous_hash: "genesis".into(),
4209 proposer: String::new(),
4210 proposed_at: Utc::now(),
4211 transactions: vec![lock_tx],
4212 health_batches: Vec::new(),
4213 browser_batches: Vec::new(),
4214 compute_batches: Vec::new(),
4215 monitor_browser_batches: Vec::new(),
4216 heartbeat_observations: Vec::new(),
4217 monitor_evaluations: Vec::new(),
4218 confirmation_batches: Vec::new(),
4219 storage_proof_batches: Vec::new(),
4220 },
4221 signature: String::new(),
4222 approvals: Vec::new(),
4223 })
4224 .unwrap();
4225 let mut lock_block = lock_block;
4226 lock_block.approvals = vec![
4227 approval_for(&validator_a, &lock_block),
4228 approval_for(&validator_b, &lock_block),
4229 ];
4230 state.apply_block(&lock_block).unwrap();
4231
4232 assert_eq!(
4233 state.account(&requester.address()).balance,
4234 HEALTH_CHECK_BASE_COST * 4
4235 );
4236 assert_eq!(
4237 state.account(&requester.address()).locked_balance,
4238 2 * HEALTH_CHECK_BASE_COST
4239 );
4240 assert_eq!(
4241 state.spendable_balance(&requester.address()),
4242 2 * HEALTH_CHECK_BASE_COST
4243 );
4244
4245 let settle_tx = validator_a
4246 .sign_transaction(SignedTransaction {
4247 hash: String::new(),
4248 signer: String::new(),
4249 body: TransactionBody {
4250 chain_id: "testnet".into(),
4251 nonce: 1,
4252 created_at: Utc::now(),
4253 kind: TransactionKind::SwapSettle {
4254 quote_id: quote.quote.quote_id.clone(),
4255 },
4256 },
4257 signature: String::new(),
4258 })
4259 .unwrap();
4260 let settle_block = validator_b
4261 .sign_block(SignedBlock {
4262 hash: String::new(),
4263 body: BlockBody {
4264 chain_id: "testnet".into(),
4265 height: 2,
4266 view: 0,
4267 previous_hash: lock_block.hash.clone(),
4268 proposer: String::new(),
4269 proposed_at: Utc::now(),
4270 transactions: vec![settle_tx],
4271 health_batches: Vec::new(),
4272 browser_batches: Vec::new(),
4273 compute_batches: Vec::new(),
4274 monitor_browser_batches: Vec::new(),
4275 heartbeat_observations: Vec::new(),
4276 monitor_evaluations: Vec::new(),
4277 confirmation_batches: Vec::new(),
4278 storage_proof_batches: Vec::new(),
4279 },
4280 signature: String::new(),
4281 approvals: Vec::new(),
4282 })
4283 .unwrap();
4284 let mut settle_block = settle_block;
4285 settle_block.approvals = vec![
4286 approval_for(&validator_a, &settle_block),
4287 approval_for(&validator_b, &settle_block),
4288 ];
4289 state.apply_block(&settle_block).unwrap();
4290
4291 assert_eq!(
4292 state.account(&requester.address()).balance,
4293 2 * HEALTH_CHECK_BASE_COST
4294 );
4295 assert_eq!(state.account(&requester.address()).locked_balance, 0);
4296 assert_eq!(state.account(&treasury).balance, 2 * HEALTH_CHECK_BASE_COST);
4297 assert!(!state.pending_swap_locks.contains_key(&quote.quote.quote_id));
4298 }
4299
4300 #[test]
4301 fn swap_lock_can_be_cancelled_after_expiry() {
4302 let requester = Wallet::generate();
4303 let validator_a = Wallet::generate();
4304 let validator_b = Wallet::generate();
4305 let treasury = validator_a.address();
4306
4307 let genesis = test_genesis(
4308 &[validator_a.address(), validator_b.address()],
4309 treasury,
4310 requester.address(),
4311 );
4312 let mut state = ChainState::from_genesis(&genesis).unwrap();
4313 let quote = signed_sell_quote(
4314 &validator_a,
4315 requester.address(),
4316 HEALTH_CHECK_BASE_COST,
4317 Utc::now() + chrono::Duration::seconds(1),
4318 );
4319
4320 let lock_tx = requester
4321 .sign_transaction(SignedTransaction {
4322 hash: String::new(),
4323 signer: String::new(),
4324 body: TransactionBody {
4325 chain_id: "testnet".into(),
4326 nonce: 1,
4327 created_at: Utc::now(),
4328 kind: TransactionKind::SwapLock {
4329 quote: quote.clone(),
4330 },
4331 },
4332 signature: String::new(),
4333 })
4334 .unwrap();
4335 let lock_block = validator_a
4336 .sign_block(SignedBlock {
4337 hash: String::new(),
4338 body: BlockBody {
4339 chain_id: "testnet".into(),
4340 height: 1,
4341 view: 0,
4342 previous_hash: "genesis".into(),
4343 proposer: String::new(),
4344 proposed_at: Utc::now(),
4345 transactions: vec![lock_tx],
4346 health_batches: Vec::new(),
4347 browser_batches: Vec::new(),
4348 compute_batches: Vec::new(),
4349 monitor_browser_batches: Vec::new(),
4350 heartbeat_observations: Vec::new(),
4351 monitor_evaluations: Vec::new(),
4352 confirmation_batches: Vec::new(),
4353 storage_proof_batches: Vec::new(),
4354 },
4355 signature: String::new(),
4356 approvals: Vec::new(),
4357 })
4358 .unwrap();
4359 let mut lock_block = lock_block;
4360 lock_block.approvals = vec![
4361 approval_for(&validator_a, &lock_block),
4362 approval_for(&validator_b, &lock_block),
4363 ];
4364 state.apply_block(&lock_block).unwrap();
4365
4366 let cancel_tx = requester
4367 .sign_transaction(SignedTransaction {
4368 hash: String::new(),
4369 signer: String::new(),
4370 body: TransactionBody {
4371 chain_id: "testnet".into(),
4372 nonce: 2,
4373 created_at: Utc::now(),
4374 kind: TransactionKind::SwapCancel {
4375 quote_id: quote.quote.quote_id.clone(),
4376 },
4377 },
4378 signature: String::new(),
4379 })
4380 .unwrap();
4381 let cancel_block = validator_b
4382 .sign_block(SignedBlock {
4383 hash: String::new(),
4384 body: BlockBody {
4385 chain_id: "testnet".into(),
4386 height: 2,
4387 view: 0,
4388 previous_hash: lock_block.hash.clone(),
4389 proposer: String::new(),
4390 proposed_at: quote.quote.expires_at + chrono::Duration::seconds(1),
4391 transactions: vec![cancel_tx],
4392 health_batches: Vec::new(),
4393 browser_batches: Vec::new(),
4394 compute_batches: Vec::new(),
4395 monitor_browser_batches: Vec::new(),
4396 heartbeat_observations: Vec::new(),
4397 monitor_evaluations: Vec::new(),
4398 confirmation_batches: Vec::new(),
4399 storage_proof_batches: Vec::new(),
4400 },
4401 signature: String::new(),
4402 approvals: Vec::new(),
4403 })
4404 .unwrap();
4405 let mut cancel_block = cancel_block;
4406 cancel_block.approvals = vec![
4407 approval_for(&validator_a, &cancel_block),
4408 approval_for(&validator_b, &cancel_block),
4409 ];
4410 state.apply_block(&cancel_block).unwrap();
4411
4412 assert_eq!(
4413 state.account(&requester.address()).balance,
4414 HEALTH_CHECK_BASE_COST * 4
4415 );
4416 assert_eq!(state.account(&requester.address()).locked_balance, 0);
4417 assert!(!state.pending_swap_locks.contains_key(&quote.quote.quote_id));
4418 }
4419
4420 #[test]
4421 fn storage_proof_pays_host_one_token_per_64mib_second() {
4422 let owner = Wallet::generate();
4423 let host = Wallet::generate();
4424 let validator_a = Wallet::generate();
4425 let validator_b = Wallet::generate();
4426 let treasury = validator_a.address();
4427 let mut genesis = test_genesis(
4428 &[validator_a.address(), validator_b.address()],
4429 treasury,
4430 owner.address(),
4431 );
4432 genesis
4433 .storage_airdrops
4434 .insert(owner.address(), MICRO_ST * 2);
4435 let mut state = ChainState::from_genesis(&genesis).unwrap();
4436 let created_at = Utc::now();
4437 let chunk_hash = "11".repeat(32);
4438 let spec = StorageContractSpec {
4439 contract_id: "storage-1".into(),
4440 host: host.address(),
4441 mode: StorageMode::Encrypted,
4442 size_bytes: STORAGE_BILLING_QUANTUM_BYTES,
4443 chunk_size_bytes: STORAGE_BILLING_QUANTUM_BYTES,
4444 merkle_root: chunk_hash.clone(),
4445 duration_secs: 10,
4446 proof_interval_secs: 10,
4447 proof_sample_count: 1,
4448 reward_rate_per_64mib_second: MICRO_ST,
4449 };
4450 let create_tx = owner
4451 .sign_transaction(SignedTransaction {
4452 hash: String::new(),
4453 signer: String::new(),
4454 body: TransactionBody {
4455 chain_id: "testnet".into(),
4456 nonce: 1,
4457 created_at,
4458 kind: TransactionKind::StorageCreate {
4459 spec: spec.clone(),
4460 prepaid_balance: MICRO_ST * 2,
4461 },
4462 },
4463 signature: String::new(),
4464 })
4465 .unwrap();
4466 let create_block = validator_a
4467 .sign_block(SignedBlock {
4468 hash: String::new(),
4469 body: BlockBody {
4470 chain_id: "testnet".into(),
4471 height: 1,
4472 view: 0,
4473 previous_hash: "genesis".into(),
4474 proposer: String::new(),
4475 proposed_at: created_at,
4476 transactions: vec![create_tx],
4477 health_batches: Vec::new(),
4478 browser_batches: Vec::new(),
4479 compute_batches: Vec::new(),
4480 monitor_browser_batches: Vec::new(),
4481 heartbeat_observations: Vec::new(),
4482 monitor_evaluations: Vec::new(),
4483 confirmation_batches: Vec::new(),
4484 storage_proof_batches: Vec::new(),
4485 },
4486 signature: String::new(),
4487 approvals: Vec::new(),
4488 })
4489 .unwrap();
4490 let mut create_block = create_block;
4491 create_block.approvals = vec![
4492 approval_for(&validator_a, &create_block),
4493 approval_for(&validator_b, &create_block),
4494 ];
4495 state.apply_block(&create_block).unwrap();
4496
4497 let proof_at = created_at + chrono::Duration::seconds(1);
4498 let challenge_seed = storage_challenge_seed(
4499 "testnet",
4500 &spec.contract_id,
4501 &create_block.hash,
4502 created_at,
4503 proof_at,
4504 &spec.merkle_root,
4505 )
4506 .unwrap();
4507 let challenge_indices =
4508 storage_challenge_indices(&challenge_seed, storage_chunk_count(&spec), 1).unwrap();
4509 let proof_receipt = |validator: &Wallet| {
4510 validator
4511 .sign_storage_proof_receipt(SignedStorageProofReceipt {
4512 id: String::new(),
4513 body: StorageProofReceiptBody {
4514 chain_id: "testnet".into(),
4515 contract_id: spec.contract_id.clone(),
4516 host: host.address(),
4517 validator: String::new(),
4518 window_start: created_at,
4519 window_end: proof_at,
4520 observed_at: proof_at,
4521 bytes_stored: spec.size_bytes,
4522 merkle_root: spec.merkle_root.clone(),
4523 challenge_seed: challenge_seed.clone(),
4524 samples: vec![StorageProofSample {
4525 chunk_index: challenge_indices[0],
4526 chunk_hash: chunk_hash.clone(),
4527 proof: Vec::new(),
4528 }],
4529 success: true,
4530 error: None,
4531 },
4532 signature: String::new(),
4533 })
4534 .unwrap()
4535 };
4536
4537 let proof_block = validator_b
4538 .sign_block(SignedBlock {
4539 hash: String::new(),
4540 body: BlockBody {
4541 chain_id: "testnet".into(),
4542 height: 2,
4543 view: 0,
4544 previous_hash: create_block.hash.clone(),
4545 proposer: String::new(),
4546 proposed_at: proof_at,
4547 transactions: Vec::new(),
4548 health_batches: Vec::new(),
4549 browser_batches: Vec::new(),
4550 compute_batches: Vec::new(),
4551 monitor_browser_batches: Vec::new(),
4552 heartbeat_observations: Vec::new(),
4553 monitor_evaluations: Vec::new(),
4554 confirmation_batches: Vec::new(),
4555 storage_proof_batches: vec![StorageProofBatch {
4556 contract_id: spec.contract_id.clone(),
4557 receipts: vec![proof_receipt(&validator_a), proof_receipt(&validator_b)],
4558 }],
4559 },
4560 signature: String::new(),
4561 approvals: Vec::new(),
4562 })
4563 .unwrap();
4564 let mut proof_block = proof_block;
4565 proof_block.approvals = vec![
4566 approval_for(&validator_a, &proof_block),
4567 approval_for(&validator_b, &proof_block),
4568 ];
4569 state.apply_block(&proof_block).unwrap();
4570
4571 assert_eq!(state.account(&host.address()).storage_balance, MICRO_ST);
4572 let contract = state.storage_contracts.get(&spec.contract_id).unwrap();
4573 assert_eq!(contract.prepaid_balance, MICRO_ST);
4574 assert_eq!(contract.total_paid, MICRO_ST);
4575 assert_eq!(contract.proof_count, 1);
4576 }
4577
4578 #[test]
4579 fn domain_lease_costs_one_dns_per_subdomain_second() {
4580 let owner = Wallet::generate();
4581 let validator_a = Wallet::generate();
4582 let validator_b = Wallet::generate();
4583 let treasury = validator_a.address();
4584 let mut genesis = test_genesis(
4585 &[validator_a.address(), validator_b.address()],
4586 treasury,
4587 owner.address(),
4588 );
4589 genesis
4590 .storage_airdrops
4591 .insert(owner.address(), MICRO_ST * 2);
4592 genesis.dns_airdrops.insert(owner.address(), MICRO_DNS * 2);
4593 let mut state = ChainState::from_genesis(&genesis).unwrap();
4594
4595 let storage_spec = StorageContractSpec {
4596 contract_id: "site-contract".to_string(),
4597 host: validator_b.address(),
4598 mode: StorageMode::PublicRaw { manifest: None },
4599 size_bytes: 1024,
4600 chunk_size_bytes: 1024,
4601 merkle_root: "00".repeat(32),
4602 duration_secs: 60,
4603 proof_interval_secs: 10,
4604 proof_sample_count: 1,
4605 reward_rate_per_64mib_second: MICRO_ST,
4606 };
4607 let offering_tx = validator_a
4608 .sign_transaction(SignedTransaction {
4609 hash: String::new(),
4610 signer: String::new(),
4611 body: TransactionBody {
4612 chain_id: "testnet".into(),
4613 nonce: 1,
4614 created_at: Utc::now(),
4615 kind: TransactionKind::DomainOfferingCreate {
4616 offering_id: "example-pages".to_string(),
4617 suffix: "pages.example.com".to_string(),
4618 gateway_url: "https://gateway.example.com".to_string(),
4619 },
4620 },
4621 signature: String::new(),
4622 })
4623 .unwrap();
4624 let storage_tx = owner
4625 .sign_transaction(SignedTransaction {
4626 hash: String::new(),
4627 signer: String::new(),
4628 body: TransactionBody {
4629 chain_id: "testnet".into(),
4630 nonce: 1,
4631 created_at: Utc::now(),
4632 kind: TransactionKind::StorageCreate {
4633 spec: storage_spec,
4634 prepaid_balance: MICRO_ST,
4635 },
4636 },
4637 signature: String::new(),
4638 })
4639 .unwrap();
4640 let lease_tx = owner
4641 .sign_transaction(SignedTransaction {
4642 hash: String::new(),
4643 signer: String::new(),
4644 body: TransactionBody {
4645 chain_id: "testnet".into(),
4646 nonce: 2,
4647 created_at: Utc::now(),
4648 kind: TransactionKind::DomainLeaseCreate {
4649 offering_id: "example-pages".to_string(),
4650 label: "alice".to_string(),
4651 target_contract_id: "site-contract".to_string(),
4652 duration_secs: 1,
4653 },
4654 },
4655 signature: String::new(),
4656 })
4657 .unwrap();
4658 let start = Utc::now();
4659 let block = validator_a
4660 .sign_block(SignedBlock {
4661 hash: String::new(),
4662 body: BlockBody {
4663 chain_id: "testnet".into(),
4664 height: 1,
4665 view: 0,
4666 previous_hash: "genesis".into(),
4667 proposer: String::new(),
4668 proposed_at: start,
4669 transactions: vec![offering_tx, storage_tx, lease_tx],
4670 health_batches: Vec::new(),
4671 browser_batches: Vec::new(),
4672 compute_batches: Vec::new(),
4673 monitor_browser_batches: Vec::new(),
4674 heartbeat_observations: Vec::new(),
4675 monitor_evaluations: Vec::new(),
4676 confirmation_batches: Vec::new(),
4677 storage_proof_batches: Vec::new(),
4678 },
4679 signature: String::new(),
4680 approvals: Vec::new(),
4681 })
4682 .unwrap();
4683 let mut block = block;
4684 block.approvals = vec![
4685 approval_for(&validator_a, &block),
4686 approval_for(&validator_b, &block),
4687 ];
4688 state.apply_block(&block).unwrap();
4689
4690 let lease = state.domain_leases.values().next().unwrap().clone();
4691 assert_eq!(lease.fqdn, "alice.pages.example.com");
4692 assert_eq!(lease.prepaid_balance, MICRO_DNS);
4693 assert_eq!(state.account(&owner.address()).dns_balance, MICRO_DNS);
4694
4695 let tick_tx = owner
4696 .sign_transaction(SignedTransaction {
4697 hash: String::new(),
4698 signer: String::new(),
4699 body: TransactionBody {
4700 chain_id: "testnet".into(),
4701 nonce: 3,
4702 created_at: Utc::now(),
4703 kind: TransactionKind::DnsTransfer {
4704 to: owner.address(),
4705 amount: MICRO_DNS,
4706 },
4707 },
4708 signature: String::new(),
4709 })
4710 .unwrap();
4711 let block = validator_b
4712 .sign_block(SignedBlock {
4713 hash: String::new(),
4714 body: BlockBody {
4715 chain_id: "testnet".into(),
4716 height: 2,
4717 view: 0,
4718 previous_hash: state.last_block_hash.clone(),
4719 proposer: String::new(),
4720 proposed_at: start + chrono::Duration::seconds(1),
4721 transactions: vec![tick_tx],
4722 health_batches: Vec::new(),
4723 browser_batches: Vec::new(),
4724 compute_batches: Vec::new(),
4725 monitor_browser_batches: Vec::new(),
4726 heartbeat_observations: Vec::new(),
4727 monitor_evaluations: Vec::new(),
4728 confirmation_batches: Vec::new(),
4729 storage_proof_batches: Vec::new(),
4730 },
4731 signature: String::new(),
4732 approvals: Vec::new(),
4733 })
4734 .unwrap();
4735 let mut block = block;
4736 block.approvals = vec![
4737 approval_for(&validator_a, &block),
4738 approval_for(&validator_b, &block),
4739 ];
4740 state.apply_block(&block).unwrap();
4741
4742 let lease = state.domain_leases.values().next().unwrap();
4743 assert!(matches!(lease.status, DomainLeaseStatus::Expired));
4744 assert_eq!(lease.prepaid_balance, 0);
4745 assert_eq!(state.account(&validator_a.address()).dns_balance, MICRO_DNS);
4746 }
4747
4748 #[test]
4749 fn monitor_success_observation_marks_slot_ok() {
4750 let owner = Wallet::generate();
4751 let validator = Wallet::generate();
4752 let treasury = validator.address();
4753 let created_at = Utc::now();
4754 let genesis = GenesisConfig {
4755 chain_id: "testnet".into(),
4756 treasury: treasury.clone(),
4757 validators: vec![validator.address()],
4758 chain_started_at: created_at,
4759 block_time_secs: 3,
4760 min_health_receipts: 1,
4761 airdrops: BTreeMap::from([(owner.address(), HEALTH_CHECK_BASE_COST * 4)]),
4762 storage_airdrops: BTreeMap::new(),
4763 compute_airdrops: BTreeMap::new(),
4764 dns_airdrops: BTreeMap::new(),
4765 };
4766 let mut state = ChainState::from_genesis(&genesis).unwrap();
4767 let spec = sample_monitor_spec("backup-nightly", created_at);
4768
4769 let create_tx = owner
4770 .sign_transaction(SignedTransaction {
4771 hash: String::new(),
4772 signer: String::new(),
4773 body: TransactionBody {
4774 chain_id: "testnet".into(),
4775 nonce: 1,
4776 created_at,
4777 kind: TransactionKind::MonitorCreate {
4778 spec: spec.clone(),
4779 initial_budget: HEALTH_CHECK_BASE_COST,
4780 },
4781 },
4782 signature: String::new(),
4783 })
4784 .unwrap();
4785 let create_block = validator
4786 .sign_block(SignedBlock {
4787 hash: String::new(),
4788 body: BlockBody {
4789 chain_id: "testnet".into(),
4790 height: 1,
4791 view: 0,
4792 previous_hash: "genesis".into(),
4793 proposer: String::new(),
4794 proposed_at: created_at,
4795 transactions: vec![create_tx],
4796 health_batches: Vec::new(),
4797 browser_batches: Vec::new(),
4798 compute_batches: Vec::new(),
4799 monitor_browser_batches: Vec::new(),
4800 heartbeat_observations: Vec::new(),
4801 monitor_evaluations: Vec::new(),
4802 confirmation_batches: Vec::new(),
4803 storage_proof_batches: Vec::new(),
4804 },
4805 signature: String::new(),
4806 approvals: Vec::new(),
4807 })
4808 .unwrap();
4809 let mut create_block = create_block;
4810 create_block.approvals = vec![approval_for(&validator, &create_block)];
4811 state.apply_block(&create_block).unwrap();
4812
4813 let observed_at = created_at + chrono::Duration::seconds(65);
4814 let observation = validator
4815 .sign_heartbeat_observation(SignedHeartbeatObservation {
4816 id: String::new(),
4817 body: HeartbeatObservationBody {
4818 chain_id: "testnet".into(),
4819 monitor_id: spec.monitor_id.clone(),
4820 slot_key: schedule_current_slot_start(&spec.schedule, observed_at)
4821 .unwrap()
4822 .to_rfc3339(),
4823 signal: HeartbeatSignal::Success,
4824 observed_at,
4825 observed_by: String::new(),
4826 body_sha256: None,
4827 body_sample: None,
4828 auth_mode: HeartbeatAuthMode::SecretUrl,
4829 client_signature: None,
4830 client_key_id: None,
4831 client_timestamp: None,
4832 client_nonce: None,
4833 },
4834 signature: String::new(),
4835 })
4836 .unwrap();
4837
4838 let heartbeat_block = validator
4839 .sign_block(SignedBlock {
4840 hash: String::new(),
4841 body: BlockBody {
4842 chain_id: "testnet".into(),
4843 height: 2,
4844 view: 0,
4845 previous_hash: create_block.hash.clone(),
4846 proposer: String::new(),
4847 proposed_at: observed_at,
4848 transactions: Vec::new(),
4849 health_batches: Vec::new(),
4850 browser_batches: Vec::new(),
4851 compute_batches: Vec::new(),
4852 monitor_browser_batches: Vec::new(),
4853 heartbeat_observations: vec![observation],
4854 monitor_evaluations: vec![MonitorEvaluation {
4855 monitor_id: spec.monitor_id.clone(),
4856 slot_key: schedule_current_slot_start(&spec.schedule, observed_at)
4857 .unwrap()
4858 .to_rfc3339(),
4859 kind: MonitorEvaluationKind::SlotSatisfied,
4860 observed_at,
4861 }],
4862 confirmation_batches: Vec::new(),
4863 storage_proof_batches: Vec::new(),
4864 },
4865 signature: String::new(),
4866 approvals: Vec::new(),
4867 })
4868 .unwrap();
4869 let mut heartbeat_block = heartbeat_block;
4870 heartbeat_block.approvals = vec![approval_for(&validator, &heartbeat_block)];
4871 state.apply_block(&heartbeat_block).unwrap();
4872
4873 let slot_key = schedule_current_slot_start(&spec.schedule, observed_at)
4874 .unwrap()
4875 .to_rfc3339();
4876 let slot = state
4877 .monitor_slot_history
4878 .get(&spec.monitor_id)
4879 .and_then(|slots| slots.get(&slot_key))
4880 .cloned()
4881 .unwrap();
4882 assert_eq!(slot.status, MonitorSlotStatus::Ok);
4883 assert_eq!(
4884 state.monitors.get(&spec.monitor_id).unwrap().status,
4885 MonitorStatus::Up
4886 );
4887 }
4888
4889 #[test]
4890 fn monitor_missed_slot_creates_alert_fact() {
4891 let owner = Wallet::generate();
4892 let validator = Wallet::generate();
4893 let treasury = validator.address();
4894 let created_at = Utc::now();
4895 let genesis = GenesisConfig {
4896 chain_id: "testnet".into(),
4897 treasury: treasury.clone(),
4898 validators: vec![validator.address()],
4899 chain_started_at: created_at,
4900 block_time_secs: 3,
4901 min_health_receipts: 1,
4902 airdrops: BTreeMap::from([(owner.address(), HEALTH_CHECK_BASE_COST * 4)]),
4903 storage_airdrops: BTreeMap::new(),
4904 compute_airdrops: BTreeMap::new(),
4905 dns_airdrops: BTreeMap::new(),
4906 };
4907 let mut state = ChainState::from_genesis(&genesis).unwrap();
4908 let spec = sample_monitor_spec("billing-hourly", created_at);
4909
4910 let create_tx = owner
4911 .sign_transaction(SignedTransaction {
4912 hash: String::new(),
4913 signer: String::new(),
4914 body: TransactionBody {
4915 chain_id: "testnet".into(),
4916 nonce: 1,
4917 created_at,
4918 kind: TransactionKind::MonitorCreate {
4919 spec: spec.clone(),
4920 initial_budget: HEALTH_CHECK_BASE_COST * 2,
4921 },
4922 },
4923 signature: String::new(),
4924 })
4925 .unwrap();
4926 let create_block = validator
4927 .sign_block(SignedBlock {
4928 hash: String::new(),
4929 body: BlockBody {
4930 chain_id: "testnet".into(),
4931 height: 1,
4932 view: 0,
4933 previous_hash: "genesis".into(),
4934 proposer: String::new(),
4935 proposed_at: created_at,
4936 transactions: vec![create_tx],
4937 health_batches: Vec::new(),
4938 browser_batches: Vec::new(),
4939 compute_batches: Vec::new(),
4940 monitor_browser_batches: Vec::new(),
4941 heartbeat_observations: Vec::new(),
4942 monitor_evaluations: Vec::new(),
4943 confirmation_batches: Vec::new(),
4944 storage_proof_batches: Vec::new(),
4945 },
4946 signature: String::new(),
4947 approvals: Vec::new(),
4948 })
4949 .unwrap();
4950 let mut create_block = create_block;
4951 create_block.approvals = vec![approval_for(&validator, &create_block)];
4952 state.apply_block(&create_block).unwrap();
4953
4954 let slot_start = created_at + chrono::Duration::seconds(60);
4955 let proposed_at = slot_start + chrono::Duration::seconds(20);
4956 let missed_block = validator
4957 .sign_block(SignedBlock {
4958 hash: String::new(),
4959 body: BlockBody {
4960 chain_id: "testnet".into(),
4961 height: 2,
4962 view: 0,
4963 previous_hash: create_block.hash.clone(),
4964 proposer: String::new(),
4965 proposed_at,
4966 transactions: Vec::new(),
4967 health_batches: Vec::new(),
4968 browser_batches: Vec::new(),
4969 compute_batches: Vec::new(),
4970 monitor_browser_batches: Vec::new(),
4971 heartbeat_observations: Vec::new(),
4972 monitor_evaluations: vec![MonitorEvaluation {
4973 monitor_id: spec.monitor_id.clone(),
4974 slot_key: slot_start.to_rfc3339(),
4975 kind: MonitorEvaluationKind::SlotMissed,
4976 observed_at: proposed_at,
4977 }],
4978 confirmation_batches: Vec::new(),
4979 storage_proof_batches: Vec::new(),
4980 },
4981 signature: String::new(),
4982 approvals: Vec::new(),
4983 })
4984 .unwrap();
4985 let mut missed_block = missed_block;
4986 missed_block.approvals = vec![approval_for(&validator, &missed_block)];
4987 state.apply_block(&missed_block).unwrap();
4988
4989 let slot = state
4990 .monitor_slot_history
4991 .get(&spec.monitor_id)
4992 .and_then(|slots| slots.get(&slot_start.to_rfc3339()))
4993 .cloned()
4994 .unwrap();
4995 assert_eq!(slot.status, MonitorSlotStatus::MissedUnconfirmed);
4996 assert_eq!(
4997 state.monitors.get(&spec.monitor_id).unwrap().status,
4998 MonitorStatus::Late
4999 );
5000 assert!(
5001 state
5002 .alert_facts
5003 .values()
5004 .any(|fact| fact.monitor_id == spec.monitor_id
5005 && fact.slot_key == slot_start.to_rfc3339())
5006 );
5007 }
5008
5009 #[test]
5010 fn delegated_confirmation_batch_marks_monitor_down() {
5011 let owner = Wallet::generate();
5012 let validator_a = Wallet::generate();
5013 let validator_b = Wallet::generate();
5014 let agent_a = Wallet::generate();
5015 let agent_b = Wallet::generate();
5016 let treasury = validator_a.address();
5017 let created_at = Utc::now();
5018 let genesis = GenesisConfig {
5019 chain_id: "testnet".into(),
5020 treasury: treasury.clone(),
5021 validators: vec![validator_a.address(), validator_b.address()],
5022 chain_started_at: created_at,
5023 block_time_secs: 3,
5024 min_health_receipts: 2,
5025 airdrops: BTreeMap::from([(owner.address(), HEALTH_CHECK_BASE_COST * 8)]),
5026 storage_airdrops: BTreeMap::new(),
5027 compute_airdrops: BTreeMap::new(),
5028 dns_airdrops: BTreeMap::new(),
5029 };
5030 let mut state = ChainState::from_genesis(&genesis).unwrap();
5031 let mut spec = sample_monitor_spec("payments-delegated", created_at);
5032 if let MonitorPathway::Heartbeat { miss_policy, .. } = &mut spec.pathway {
5033 *miss_policy = MissPolicy::ConfirmWithDelegatedAgents {
5034 fanout: ProbeFanoutPolicy::OnePerValidator,
5035 require_region_diversity: 2,
5036 };
5037 }
5038
5039 let create_tx = owner
5040 .sign_transaction(SignedTransaction {
5041 hash: String::new(),
5042 signer: String::new(),
5043 body: TransactionBody {
