5044 chain_id: "testnet".into(),
5045 nonce: 1,
5046 created_at,
5047 kind: TransactionKind::MonitorCreate {
5048 spec: spec.clone(),
5049 initial_budget: HEALTH_CHECK_BASE_COST * 4,
5050 },
5051 },
5052 signature: String::new(),
5053 })
5054 .unwrap();
5055 let create_block = validator_a
5056 .sign_block(SignedBlock {
5057 hash: String::new(),
5058 body: BlockBody {
5059 chain_id: "testnet".into(),
5060 height: 1,
5061 view: 0,
5062 previous_hash: "genesis".into(),
5063 proposer: String::new(),
5064 proposed_at: created_at,
5065 transactions: vec![create_tx],
5066 health_batches: Vec::new(),
5067 browser_batches: Vec::new(),
5068 compute_batches: Vec::new(),
5069 monitor_browser_batches: Vec::new(),
5070 heartbeat_observations: Vec::new(),
5071 monitor_evaluations: Vec::new(),
5072 confirmation_batches: Vec::new(),
5073 storage_proof_batches: Vec::new(),
5074 },
5075 signature: String::new(),
5076 approvals: Vec::new(),
5077 })
5078 .unwrap();
5079 let mut create_block = create_block;
5080 create_block.approvals = vec![
5081 approval_for(&validator_a, &create_block),
5082 approval_for(&validator_b, &create_block),
5083 ];
5084 state.apply_block(&create_block).unwrap();
5085
5086 let slot_start = created_at + chrono::Duration::seconds(60);
5087 let slot_key = slot_start.to_rfc3339();
5088 let proposed_at = slot_start + chrono::Duration::seconds(20);
5089 let request_id = monitor_confirmation_request_id(&spec.monitor_id, &slot_key);
5090 let tx_hash = monitor_confirmation_tx_hash(&spec.monitor_id, &slot_key).unwrap();
5091
5092 let validator_receipt = |wallet: &Wallet| {
5093 wallet
5094 .sign_receipt(SignedHealthReceipt {
5095 id: String::new(),
5096 body: crate::protocol::HealthReceiptBody {
5097 chain_id: "testnet".into(),
5098 tx_hash: tx_hash.clone(),
5099 request_id: request_id.clone(),
5100 executor: String::new(),
5101 observed_at: proposed_at,
5102 response_status: Some(503),
5103 latency_ms: 25,
5104 success: false,
5105 assertion_results: Vec::new(),
5106 response_headers: BTreeMap::new(),
5107 response_body_sample: None,
5108 error: Some("connection refused".into()),
5109 },
5110 signature: String::new(),
5111 })
5112 .unwrap()
5113 };
5114 let delegated_receipt =
5115 |agent: &Wallet, parent_validator: &Wallet, lease_id: &str, region: &str| {
5116 agent
5117 .sign_delegated_probe_receipt(SignedDelegatedProbeReceipt {
5118 id: String::new(),
5119 body: crate::protocol::DelegatedProbeReceiptBody {
5120 chain_id: "testnet".into(),
5121 monitor_id: spec.monitor_id.clone(),
5122 slot_key: slot_key.clone(),
5123 agent_public_key: String::new(),
5124 parent_validator: parent_validator.address(),
5125 lease_id: Some(lease_id.into()),
5126 request_id: Some(request_id.clone()),
5127 region: Some(region.into()),
5128 network: Some("public".into()),
5129 observed_at: proposed_at,
5130 response_status: Some(503),
5131 latency_ms: 25,
5132 success: false,
5133 assertion_results: Vec::new(),
5134 response_headers: BTreeMap::new(),
5135 response_body_sample: None,
5136 error: Some("connection refused".into()),
5137 },
5138 signature: String::new(),
5139 })
5140 .unwrap()
5141 };
5142
5143 let batch = MonitorConfirmationBatch {
5144 monitor_id: spec.monitor_id.clone(),
5145 slot_key: slot_key.clone(),
5146 validator_receipts: vec![
5147 validator_receipt(&validator_a),
5148 validator_receipt(&validator_b),
5149 ],
5150 delegated_receipts: vec![
5151 delegated_receipt(&agent_a, &validator_a, "lease-a", "us-west"),
5152 delegated_receipt(&agent_b, &validator_b, "lease-b", "eu-central"),
5153 ],
5154 };
5155
5156 let missed_block = validator_b
5157 .sign_block(SignedBlock {
5158 hash: String::new(),
5159 body: BlockBody {
5160 chain_id: "testnet".into(),
5161 height: 2,
5162 view: 0,
5163 previous_hash: create_block.hash.clone(),
5164 proposer: String::new(),
5165 proposed_at,
5166 transactions: Vec::new(),
5167 health_batches: Vec::new(),
5168 browser_batches: Vec::new(),
5169 compute_batches: Vec::new(),
5170 monitor_browser_batches: Vec::new(),
5171 heartbeat_observations: Vec::new(),
5172 monitor_evaluations: vec![MonitorEvaluation {
5173 monitor_id: spec.monitor_id.clone(),
5174 slot_key: slot_key.clone(),
5175 kind: MonitorEvaluationKind::SlotMissed,
5176 observed_at: proposed_at,
5177 }],
5178 confirmation_batches: vec![batch],
5179 storage_proof_batches: Vec::new(),
5180 },
5181 signature: String::new(),
5182 approvals: Vec::new(),
5183 })
5184 .unwrap();
5185 let mut missed_block = missed_block;
5186 missed_block.approvals = vec![
5187 approval_for(&validator_a, &missed_block),
5188 approval_for(&validator_b, &missed_block),
5189 ];
5190 state.apply_block(&missed_block).unwrap();
5191
5192 let slot = state
5193 .monitor_slot_history
5194 .get(&spec.monitor_id)
5195 .and_then(|slots| slots.get(&slot_key))
5196 .cloned()
5197 .unwrap();
5198 assert_eq!(slot.status, MonitorSlotStatus::DownConfirmed);
5199 assert_eq!(
5200 state.monitors.get(&spec.monitor_id).unwrap().status,
5201 MonitorStatus::Down
5202 );
5203 }
5204
5205 #[test]
5206 fn delegated_confirmation_batch_rejects_insufficient_region_diversity() {
5207 let owner = Wallet::generate();
5208 let validator_a = Wallet::generate();
5209 let validator_b = Wallet::generate();
5210 let agent_a = Wallet::generate();
5211 let agent_b = Wallet::generate();
5212 let treasury = validator_a.address();
5213 let created_at = Utc::now();
5214 let genesis = GenesisConfig {
5215 chain_id: "testnet".into(),
5216 treasury: treasury.clone(),
5217 validators: vec![validator_a.address(), validator_b.address()],
5218 chain_started_at: created_at,
5219 block_time_secs: 3,
5220 min_health_receipts: 2,
5221 airdrops: BTreeMap::from([(owner.address(), HEALTH_CHECK_BASE_COST * 8)]),
5222 storage_airdrops: BTreeMap::new(),
5223 compute_airdrops: BTreeMap::new(),
5224 dns_airdrops: BTreeMap::new(),
5225 };
5226 let mut state = ChainState::from_genesis(&genesis).unwrap();
5227 let mut spec = sample_monitor_spec("payments-regions", created_at);
5228 if let MonitorPathway::Heartbeat { miss_policy, .. } = &mut spec.pathway {
5229 *miss_policy = MissPolicy::ConfirmWithDelegatedAgents {
5230 fanout: ProbeFanoutPolicy::OnePerValidator,
5231 require_region_diversity: 2,
5232 };
5233 }
5234
5235 let create_tx = owner
5236 .sign_transaction(SignedTransaction {
5237 hash: String::new(),
5238 signer: String::new(),
5239 body: TransactionBody {
5240 chain_id: "testnet".into(),
5241 nonce: 1,
5242 created_at,
5243 kind: TransactionKind::MonitorCreate {
5244 spec: spec.clone(),
5245 initial_budget: HEALTH_CHECK_BASE_COST * 4,
5246 },
5247 },
5248 signature: String::new(),
5249 })
5250 .unwrap();
5251 let create_block = validator_a
5252 .sign_block(SignedBlock {
5253 hash: String::new(),
5254 body: BlockBody {
5255 chain_id: "testnet".into(),
5256 height: 1,
5257 view: 0,
5258 previous_hash: "genesis".into(),
5259 proposer: String::new(),
5260 proposed_at: created_at,
5261 transactions: vec![create_tx],
5262 health_batches: Vec::new(),
5263 browser_batches: Vec::new(),
5264 compute_batches: Vec::new(),
5265 monitor_browser_batches: Vec::new(),
5266 heartbeat_observations: Vec::new(),
5267 monitor_evaluations: Vec::new(),
5268 confirmation_batches: Vec::new(),
5269 storage_proof_batches: Vec::new(),
5270 },
5271 signature: String::new(),
5272 approvals: Vec::new(),
5273 })
5274 .unwrap();
5275 let mut create_block = create_block;
5276 create_block.approvals = vec![
5277 approval_for(&validator_a, &create_block),
5278 approval_for(&validator_b, &create_block),
5279 ];
5280 state.apply_block(&create_block).unwrap();
5281
5282 let slot_start = created_at + chrono::Duration::seconds(60);
5283 let slot_key = slot_start.to_rfc3339();
5284 let proposed_at = slot_start + chrono::Duration::seconds(20);
5285 let request_id = monitor_confirmation_request_id(&spec.monitor_id, &slot_key);
5286 let tx_hash = monitor_confirmation_tx_hash(&spec.monitor_id, &slot_key).unwrap();
5287
5288 let validator_receipt = |wallet: &Wallet| {
5289 wallet
5290 .sign_receipt(SignedHealthReceipt {
5291 id: String::new(),
5292 body: crate::protocol::HealthReceiptBody {
5293 chain_id: "testnet".into(),
5294 tx_hash: tx_hash.clone(),
5295 request_id: request_id.clone(),
5296 executor: String::new(),
5297 observed_at: proposed_at,
5298 response_status: Some(503),
5299 latency_ms: 25,
5300 success: false,
5301 assertion_results: Vec::new(),
5302 response_headers: BTreeMap::new(),
5303 response_body_sample: None,
5304 error: Some("connection refused".into()),
5305 },
5306 signature: String::new(),
5307 })
5308 .unwrap()
5309 };
5310 let delegated_receipt = |agent: &Wallet, parent_validator: &Wallet, lease_id: &str| {
5311 agent
5312 .sign_delegated_probe_receipt(SignedDelegatedProbeReceipt {
5313 id: String::new(),
5314 body: crate::protocol::DelegatedProbeReceiptBody {
5315 chain_id: "testnet".into(),
5316 monitor_id: spec.monitor_id.clone(),
5317 slot_key: slot_key.clone(),
5318 agent_public_key: String::new(),
5319 parent_validator: parent_validator.address(),
5320 lease_id: Some(lease_id.into()),
5321 request_id: Some(request_id.clone()),
5322 region: Some("us-west".into()),
5323 network: Some("public".into()),
5324 observed_at: proposed_at,
5325 response_status: Some(503),
5326 latency_ms: 25,
5327 success: false,
5328 assertion_results: Vec::new(),
5329 response_headers: BTreeMap::new(),
5330 response_body_sample: None,
5331 error: Some("connection refused".into()),
5332 },
5333 signature: String::new(),
5334 })
5335 .unwrap()
5336 };
5337
5338 let batch = MonitorConfirmationBatch {
5339 monitor_id: spec.monitor_id.clone(),
5340 slot_key: slot_key.clone(),
5341 validator_receipts: vec![
5342 validator_receipt(&validator_a),
5343 validator_receipt(&validator_b),
5344 ],
5345 delegated_receipts: vec![
5346 delegated_receipt(&agent_a, &validator_a, "lease-a"),
5347 delegated_receipt(&agent_b, &validator_b, "lease-b"),
5348 ],
5349 };
5350
5351 let missed_block = validator_b
5352 .sign_block(SignedBlock {
5353 hash: String::new(),
5354 body: BlockBody {
5355 chain_id: "testnet".into(),
5356 height: 2,
5357 view: 0,
5358 previous_hash: create_block.hash.clone(),
5359 proposer: String::new(),
5360 proposed_at,
5361 transactions: Vec::new(),
5362 health_batches: Vec::new(),
5363 browser_batches: Vec::new(),
5364 compute_batches: Vec::new(),
5365 monitor_browser_batches: Vec::new(),
5366 heartbeat_observations: Vec::new(),
5367 monitor_evaluations: vec![MonitorEvaluation {
5368 monitor_id: spec.monitor_id.clone(),
5369 slot_key: slot_key.clone(),
5370 kind: MonitorEvaluationKind::SlotMissed,
5371 observed_at: proposed_at,
5372 }],
5373 confirmation_batches: vec![batch],
5374 storage_proof_batches: Vec::new(),
5375 },
5376 signature: String::new(),
5377 approvals: Vec::new(),
5378 })
5379 .unwrap();
5380 let mut missed_block = missed_block;
5381 missed_block.approvals = vec![
5382 approval_for(&validator_a, &missed_block),
5383 approval_for(&validator_b, &missed_block),
5384 ];
5385 let error = state.apply_block(&missed_block).unwrap_err();
5386 assert!(error.to_string().contains("delegated regions"));
5387 }
5388
5389 #[test]
5390 fn scheduled_browser_monitor_slot_charges_budget_and_marks_slot_ok() {
5391 let owner = Wallet::generate();
5392 let validator_a = Wallet::generate();
5393 let validator_b = Wallet::generate();
5394 let treasury = validator_a.address();
5395 let created_at = Utc::now();
5396 let genesis = GenesisConfig {
5397 chain_id: "testnet".into(),
5398 treasury: treasury.clone(),
5399 validators: vec![validator_a.address(), validator_b.address()],
5400 chain_started_at: created_at,
5401 block_time_secs: 3,
5402 min_health_receipts: 2,
5403 airdrops: BTreeMap::from([(owner.address(), HEALTH_CHECK_BASE_COST * 12)]),
5404 storage_airdrops: BTreeMap::new(),
5405 compute_airdrops: BTreeMap::new(),
5406 dns_airdrops: BTreeMap::new(),
5407 };
5408 let mut state = ChainState::from_genesis(&genesis).unwrap();
5409 let spec = sample_browser_monitor_spec(
5410 "browser-hourly",
5411 created_at,
5412 &owner.address(),
5413 &validator_a.address(),
5414 );
5415 let package = spec.browser_package().unwrap().clone();
5416 let slot_cost = crate::protocol::monitor_browser_slot_cost(&package).unwrap();
5417
5418 let create_tx = owner
5419 .sign_transaction(SignedTransaction {
5420 hash: String::new(),
5421 signer: String::new(),
5422 body: TransactionBody {
5423 chain_id: "testnet".into(),
5424 nonce: 1,
5425 created_at,
5426 kind: TransactionKind::MonitorCreate {
5427 spec: spec.clone(),
5428 initial_budget: slot_cost * 2,
5429 },
5430 },
5431 signature: String::new(),
5432 })
5433 .unwrap();
5434 let create_block = validator_a
5435 .sign_block(SignedBlock {
5436 hash: String::new(),
5437 body: BlockBody {
5438 chain_id: "testnet".into(),
5439 height: 1,
5440 view: 0,
5441 previous_hash: "genesis".into(),
5442 proposer: String::new(),
5443 proposed_at: created_at,
5444 transactions: vec![create_tx],
5445 health_batches: Vec::new(),
5446 browser_batches: Vec::new(),
5447 compute_batches: Vec::new(),
5448 monitor_browser_batches: Vec::new(),
5449 heartbeat_observations: Vec::new(),
5450 monitor_evaluations: Vec::new(),
5451 confirmation_batches: Vec::new(),
5452 storage_proof_batches: Vec::new(),
5453 },
5454 signature: String::new(),
5455 approvals: Vec::new(),
5456 })
5457 .unwrap();
5458 let mut create_block = create_block;
5459 create_block.approvals = vec![
5460 approval_for(&validator_a, &create_block),
5461 approval_for(&validator_b, &create_block),
5462 ];
5463 state.apply_block(&create_block).unwrap();
5464
5465 let slot_key = created_at.to_rfc3339();
5466 let tx_hash = monitor_browser_tx_hash(&spec.monitor_id, &slot_key).unwrap();
5467 let request_id = monitor_browser_request_id(&spec.monitor_id, &slot_key);
5468 let package_hash = crate::browser::browser_package_hash(&package).unwrap();
5469 let runtime_hash = crate::browser::browser_runtime_hash(&package.runtime).unwrap();
5470 let observed_at = created_at + chrono::Duration::seconds(61);
5471 let sign_receipt = |validator: &Wallet| {
5472 validator
5473 .sign_browser_receipt(SignedBrowserReceipt {
5474 id: String::new(),
5475 body: BrowserReceiptBody {
5476 chain_id: "testnet".into(),
5477 tx_hash: tx_hash.clone(),
5478 request_id: request_id.clone(),
5479 monitor_id: Some(spec.monitor_id.clone()),
5480 slot_key: Some(slot_key.clone()),
5481 executor: String::new(),
5482 observed_at,
5483 package_hash: package_hash.clone(),
5484 runtime_hash: runtime_hash.clone(),
5485 latency_ms: 1_250,
5486 success: true,
5487 failed_step_index: None,
5488 final_url: Some("https://example.com/dashboard".into()),
5489 outcome_class: BrowserOutcomeClass::Success,
5490 console_error_count: 0,
5491 network_error_count: 0,
5492 screenshot_artifact: None,
5493 trace_artifact: None,
5494 video_artifact: None,
5495 error: None,
5496 },
5497 signature: String::new(),
5498 })
5499 .unwrap()
5500 };
5501
5502 let browser_block = validator_b
5503 .sign_block(SignedBlock {
5504 hash: String::new(),
5505 body: BlockBody {
5506 chain_id: "testnet".into(),
5507 height: 2,
5508 view: 0,
5509 previous_hash: create_block.hash.clone(),
5510 proposer: String::new(),
5511 proposed_at: created_at + chrono::Duration::seconds(65),
5512 transactions: Vec::new(),
5513 health_batches: Vec::new(),
5514 browser_batches: Vec::new(),
5515 compute_batches: Vec::new(),
5516 monitor_browser_batches: vec![MonitorBrowserBatch {
5517 monitor_id: spec.monitor_id.clone(),
5518 slot_key: slot_key.clone(),
5519 receipts: vec![sign_receipt(&validator_a), sign_receipt(&validator_b)],
5520 }],
5521 heartbeat_observations: Vec::new(),
5522 monitor_evaluations: Vec::new(),
5523 confirmation_batches: Vec::new(),
5524 storage_proof_batches: Vec::new(),
5525 },
5526 signature: String::new(),
5527 approvals: Vec::new(),
5528 })
5529 .unwrap();
5530 let mut browser_block = browser_block;
5531 browser_block.approvals = vec![
5532 approval_for(&validator_a, &browser_block),
5533 approval_for(&validator_b, &browser_block),
5534 ];
5535 state.apply_block(&browser_block).unwrap();
5536
5537 let slot = state
5538 .monitor_slot_history
5539 .get(&spec.monitor_id)
5540 .unwrap()
5541 .get(&slot_key)
5542 .unwrap();
5543 assert_eq!(slot.status, MonitorSlotStatus::Ok);
5544 assert_eq!(slot.confirmation_success, Some(true));
5545 let monitor = state.monitors.get(&spec.monitor_id).unwrap();
5546 assert_eq!(monitor.status, MonitorStatus::Up);
5547 assert_eq!(monitor.budget_balance, slot_cost);
5548 }
5549 }
Gossip Protocol Peer-witnessed monitoring, compute, storage, DNS, swaps, and publishing.
